Friend,

Have you heard about the petition circulating around the internet calling for Clarence Thomas to be impeached? Well, it’s kind of a big deal. Recently, the organizers announced that they’ve _**gathered 1.2 million signatures.**_

If we fail to take back the Senate and give Democrats to more years of control, we’re afraid that “moderate” Democrats like Raphael Warnock from Georgia will move to impeach the Justice.

By this own reporting, Warnock is trailing Republican nominee Herschel Walker by JUST ONE POINT in a state that went for Joe Biden by 11,000 votes. What’s more, Warnock has more than $22 million in the bank to spend on the race against Walker.

**We simply cannot allow radical Democrats like Warnock to win this fall. If he does, all bets are off. A victory for Raphael Warnock in Georgia could spell the end of Clarence Thomas.**

**ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR PETITION: DEFEND THE SENATE. DEFEND CLARENCE THOMAS.**
**We need 2,000 new signatures today and every day until the month. Can we count on you to add yours right now?**
[**SIGN NOW -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a42f1f6ee14742f5bf0ae3ce2e34d165&_e=slsHs5J4o89tbEqyO6AsBtXC0XPGmy8rKMOY61S4NlohXxn1Hl2fX91LktWiIRgFsu2H_i-UEdnCjInVPYts-TVkc9WirYkSrNAlrMxjCc-xKDISyyq75ZSisyBtuhOKytQDutNYl9lu46HeioO2hHNV7l4xk1dU78kG6x9_41XyrwnwxsryZ0yeO0gd6HF1moi__dwJr8iqt1_zQnGtbwTRpIc4meawKqDKOrYFVnrozbfSoLZ8778VpdZYsXD2xG0QTuL6ERP8N_MJAtipXz5cdxNq03v8o7Rh7cMFCatiU2zM_BNCJJJAqBgb19PpYOtFsf2BxKOk-_D7UA9Ie2RdaRFarmgMH84e48zVaU2JK41yZRtJyFRVE0K2z3A6cWPyxWKogpwahOc3kSh0p8prB3un6MEu1_azrHL7oUcxc6qYm6Ei8YhrHDSwVtWwxIhWzNhKwW_5uyOpU9Nk6Pk58Z-aPUWANyynpAEETMZ8iG_qwKufcci7hlCQ8N9Z)
We have to build awareness around this issue. If we fail in our fight to block Democrats from retaining their Senate majority, the Court could be lost to conservatives forever.

Please don’t wait. Add your name today.

Thanks,

Senate Republicans

Fellow American,

A new report reveals that Senator Raphael Warnock used campaign funds to cover personal legal expenses from a lawsuit brought against him by a member of his church in Atlanta.

This is just plain wrong - _and illegal_. After all, it is a violation of federal law to spend campaign donations for personal use.

To divert attention away from his campaign violations and disastrous record of voting with President Biden 96% of the time, Senator Warnock's campaign has launched a series of attack ads against Herschel Walker. They've clearly decided that since they can't defend their own record, they only have one option left: attack, attack, attack!

Herschel is down a point or two in the polls, **but he can pull ahead again if we increase our Media Fund and run our ads across Georgia.**

| [](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=c4c7c7bc163b404385fc56677b880bb1&_e=K-l2EFdgYrUBxsQyut0g9iEEJlSdhlC6txNXn4RvdkcxgDDq5bbNRSkG0HvyiXz20uMsaICDVkpA4RrYJoIcn8thLDMmNAvqRgf9YqDCmDuEQUhgDmF2fXIZSike_tiMBCEm5TlebWi2SbulBh1pL0r0X7SAybtIRjpkaA8eAiZr5UJxfWA1ZAnVPOJuwVAvXlOkDtMoLYCGOGtXYQGVU5ME3Usu3Qrf9DSy7PtrIbtOvAVgrq-yHMjmBANzyPsa03VECAGage9jG7ftuj1xPOpLn3uliTtaakx7YEqZYsAAq8SZBTyJKqcAatHk1cvSz6HgYck4sx08B0PL377ZdXsG7hfvUP9u622IcCT6lLaepTuCpW6BONeQZ3F8tfcJdbaBsrjuEBE-Vced_s_WjxaAkgJTPXunsKV9FqnZEpmKJ5TPAllDk8FaK7jlnS23MuUcfaaQ82RLBrWoOyNlT-rW9GGLs-Abbckej49XPhYCJcj8DQyS8wkQiVXZwSeL)

---
Friends:

A new poll was just released that has my opponent, Mike Franken, inching closer than any of my previous Democrat opponents have since I first ran for Senate. Simply put, the race is tightening, and the Democrats are outraising us.

Mike Franken raised twice what we did last quarter. Don’t forget, in 2020, liberal Democrats spent more than $230 million trying to take down my colleague, Senator Joni Ernst. And now they’re coming after me.

I need your support right now to keep Iowa Red and help take back the Senate Majority. I can defeat Mike Franken, but only if I get your support as soon as possible.

The Republican Majority hangs in the balance, and we need your help.

Mike Franken is the most radical opponent in Iowa Senate History. He wants to make Iowa as liberal as California. Mike Franken supports:

❌ Raising taxes across the board on all working Americans
❌ Biden’s multi-trillion dollar Build Back Better inflationary spending plan
❌ Enacting a single-payer health care system that would gut private health insurance and replace it
with 100% government-run bureaucracy
❌ Taxpayer-funded abortion-on-demand, even right before birth
❌ New taxes and regulations that would cripple Iowa agriculture
❌ Preventing parents from having a say in their child’s education
❌ Censoring people and viewpoints he disagrees with
❌ Reprogramming police funding...that’s code for defunding the police
❌ Open borders and allowing people to come to America without our permission

I need your help to fight back. clean_body: | Friends: A new poll was just released that has my opponent, Mike Franken, inching closer than any of my previous Democrat opponents have since I first ran for Senate. Simply put, the race is tightening, and the Democrats are outraising us. Mike Franken raised twice what we did last quarter. Don’t forget, in 2020, liberal Democrats spent more than $230 million trying to take down my colleague, Senator Joni Ernst. And now they’re coming after me. I need your support right now to keep Iowa Red and help take back the Senate Majority. I can defeat Mike Franken, but only if I get your support as soon as possible. The Republican Majority hangs in the balance, and we need your help. Mike Franken is the most radical opponent in Iowa Senate History. He wants to make Iowa as liberal as California. Mike Franken supports: ❌ Raising taxes across the board on all working Americans ❌ Biden’s multi-trillion dollar Build Back Better inflationary spending plan ❌ Enacting a single-payer health care system that would gut private health insurance and replace it with 100% government-run bureaucracy ❌ Taxpayer-funded abortion-on-demand, even right before birth ❌ New taxes and regulations that would cripple Iowa agriculture ❌ Preventing parents from having a say in their child’s education ❌ Censoring people and viewpoints he disagrees with ❌ Reprogramming police funding...that’s code for defunding the police ❌ Open borders and allowing people to come to America without our permission I need your help to fight back. | Thank you for your continued support, Chuck Grassley P.S. Did you know Mike Franken said President Biden is doing a “fabulous" job? Meanwhile, gas and grocery prices are going through the roof. The cost of living is at 40-year highs. Iowans can’t afford to give President Biden another vote in the U.S. Senate. Please donate $15, $25, or even $100 to fight high gas prices and Biden’s liberal agenda. subject: FW: Today is a critical deadline, and I urgently need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

We just got the numbers in from last night, and I’ve got bad news...

We came up $647 short of funding our budget before the deadline.

What’s even worse, though, is that we just got Katie Porter’s latest fundraising numbers in and she raised a whopping $2 million last quarter and now has nearly $20 million cash on hand.

This is putting even more pressure on us to make up our fundraising deficit ASAP. So, please, will you rush in an emergency donation TODAY so we can avoid budget cuts?
**SECURELY DONATE HERE:** [https://secure.winred.com/scott-baugh-for-congress/came-up-short-july](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=efea69b244&e=8a657725d1) Thank you in advance, \- Scott

Sent from my iPhone.

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Scott Baugh** <info@baughforcongress.com>
Date: Fri, Jul 15, 2022 at 3:30 PM
Subject: Today is a critical deadline, and I urgently need your help.
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=947629e4a3&e=8a657725d1)
---
|
---
| Peter,

Tonight at midnight, our campaign faces a financial deadline that we simply can’t afford to whiff on. We’re still [$2,048 short of funding our budget](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=8ebe0ee9c1&e=8a657725d1), and if we come up short, we’ll need to make painful budget cuts.
---
| [CHIP IN TO AVOID BUDGET CUTS](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=cb1aeb57c7&e=8a657725d1 "CHIP IN TO AVOID BUDGET CUTS")
---
| Republicans can’t afford to lose this race. It is one of just four in the entire country that we must win to Take Back The House.

On top of that, this is the seat represented by far-left radical Katie Porter. Yes, that Katie Porter. The one who supported trillions in inflation-causing spending and then told families they should get abortions to bring costs down.

So, you can see why this is a must-win race.

I’ve been endorsed by Kevin McCarthy, Ted Cruz, the California Republican Party, and more. But without the resources to compete, none of that will matter.

That’s why I’m urgently reaching out to you with just hours left on the clock before this deadline. Please, will you help me make up the difference?
---

---
| Thank you,
Scott Baugh

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Join the winning team...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heidi for Governor
body:
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter, As we all saw this week, **[_inflation rose to 9.1% in June_](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-y/),** which was even MORE than economists expected. Jared Polis and Joe Biden are teaming up to take our country, and our state, into an economic crisis.**I'm a successful entrepreneur who can make our state affordable again.**
* **CEO, Camp Bow Wow (Nation's Largest Pet care Franchise)**
* **Fortune Magazine's 10 Most Promising Entrepreneurs**
* **Founder, Bow Wow Buddies**
* **Founder, SheFactor**
* **Founder, Moms Fight Back**
* **Founder, Fight Back Foundation**
* **Led the fight to protect TABOR, No On Prop CC**
* **Oversaw $5 billion budget and 30,000 employees as CU Regent**
* **Chaired the finance & audit committees as CU Regent**

[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-j/) **_Media_ :****** It's always a fight to get the real story out there. Thank you, Dan Caplis, for having me on your show to explain our debate challenge to Jared Polis. I look forward to Polis explaining his failed record to voters all across our beautiful state. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-t/) [Click here to listen](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-i/) It's going to take a movement to beat Jared Polis. I'm pleased to share that our winning team includes a growing number of Democrats who agree that Colorado is moving in the wrong direction. This week, we launched Democrats for Heidi, a coalition of Democrats and former Democrats that are supporting our campaign and my ideas for unleashing our state's potential. Dems for Heidi Leader Derek Ayers, a Combat Veteran and Medical Services Officer for the 10th Mountain Division and father of two. The election is less than four months away! I need your help to get our message out. If you can spare your time or treasure, now is the time! Thank you for all your support!Heidi [$10](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-d/) [$50](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-h/) [$100](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-k/) [Other](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-u/) [Volunteer](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-n/) Never miss a beat, follow me on social media! [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-p/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-x/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-m/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-c/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-q/) | Heidi for Governor
PO Box 754
Fort Lupton, CO 80621 Paid for by Heidi for Governor. Registered agent: Sam Schafer. [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-qqtjul-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-a) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-u-qqtjul-ttjjilthht-f/)

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Watch: Protecting reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens
body:
I spoke on MSNBC about anti-choice extremism and how we must restore reproductive rights in Ohio.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47933724/356238462/1144435635?refcode=nw_em_templateheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzZhYTAxNi02YjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9S5ZM9QC3pE1KnTs_1PYFEVLo4Jk73BbasuTRYghSY=)

Team,

Within hours of the Supreme Court’s decision overturning _Roe_ , Mike DeWine and his attorney general made their move, enacting a ban on abortion after just six weeks of pregnancy.

The consequences have been devastating and far-reaching, from forcing people to travel out of state to access needed medical care – including minors and those facing life-altering diagnoses – to the reality that people are going to leave our state for places where reproductive rights aren’t under assault.

**[This week, I spoke on MSNBC about the critical need to codify the protections provided by Roe into the Ohio constitution. Take a moment to watch, and then chip in to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47933725/356238463/1817993124?refcode=nw_em_220716_1_t2_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzZhYTAxNi02YjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9S5ZM9QC3pE1KnTs_1PYFEVLo4Jk73BbasuTRYghSY=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47933726/356238464/1817993124?refcode=nw_em_220716_1_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzZhYTAxNi02YjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9S5ZM9QC3pE1KnTs_1PYFEVLo4Jk73BbasuTRYghSY=)
Mike DeWine likes to pretend that he isn’t as radical as the Republican colleagues and extremists he surrounds himself with.

But the policies he supports and signs tell the real story. Not content with a six-week abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest, the Ohio GOP is now going for a complete and total ban on abortion.

**[It could not be clearer that the right to safe, legal abortion is on the ballot this year. Please, watch right now, and if you agree that we need to act to codify reproductive rights, chip in>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47933727/356238465/1817993124?refcode=nw_em_220716_1_t2_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzZhYTAxNi02YjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9S5ZM9QC3pE1KnTs_1PYFEVLo4Jk73BbasuTRYghSY=)**

Onward,

Nan Whaley

clean_body: I spoke on MSNBC about anti-choice extremism and how we must restore reproductive rights in Ohio. = Team, Within hours of the Supreme Court’s decision overturning Roe , Mike DeWine and his attorney general made their move, enacting a ban on abortion after just six weeks of pregnancy. The consequences have been devastating and far-reaching, from forcing people to travel out of state to access needed medical care – including minors and those facing life-altering diagnoses – to the reality that people are going to leave our state for places where reproductive rights aren’t under assault. = = Mike DeWine likes to pretend that he isn’t as radical as the Republican colleagues and extremists he surrounds himself with. But the policies he supports and signs tell the real story. Not content with a six-week abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest, the Ohio GOP is now going for a complete and total ban on abortion. = Onward, Nan Whaley **= Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens PO Box 2815, Dayton, OH 45401 This campaign is powered by supporters like you, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, .

Peter,

Have you heard about the petition circulating around the internet calling for Clarence Thomas to be impeached? Well, it’s kind of a big deal. Recently, the organizers announced that they’ve _**gathered 1.2 million signatures.**_

If we fail to take back the Senate and give Democrats to more years of control, we’re afraid that “moderate” Democrats like Raphael Warnock from Georgia will move to impeach the Justice.

By this own reporting, Warnock is trailing Republican nominee Herschel Walker by JUST ONE POINT in a state that went for Joe Biden by 11,000 votes. What’s more, Warnock has more than $22 million in the bank to spend on the race against Walker.

**We simply cannot allow radical Democrats like Warnock to win this fall. If he does, all bets are off. A victory for Raphael Warnock in Georgia could spell the end of Clarence Thomas.**

**ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR PETITION: DEFEND THE SENATE. DEFEND CLARENCE THOMAS.**
**We need 2,000 new signatures today and every day until the month. Can we count on you to add yours right now?**
[**SIGN NOW -> **](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=0a77e2778641447f9dae2dfe2b19f3ae&_e=A_ruquEd8t-cLC4RwneRnUVasuK6ED8uu2fdoQi8P9IcJ9r_I8TzLaOvJwifQIeI_vRV0m3zLJeQmCFnn6VYi_D3e_Q4sZdixRtHPqbgs6jZoRq-qTwFzPuUTBUYVO01HZaPVHI14heAFE4GIBh958ny-2T--1Ls9aJOn8eLkqNjhfEZCL7W5fsh0O9iX-1AQurT9ufZQ-xrqMBxLZC0hD4fIFOD_MU92ny1l2BcZYtZLYtxlP2ygJz7_-JtDKBIl3TyPUlJI_dNLd0Utw3MVIhV0ogURp6jdk-XbhZT3g6td1nsY8pEdXneD9LhFWtwzaWsH_xcGK8kmcnB_CEBsWnEQ7dUQYrRmIAmF5iekXM6xskOWJRf88aFDsutyRdinoXDUU0jj6ABa7s5TOBRmT-g46AJSHqxCXfw0PqEkhD8BX7fXMlSKhhA_In5PrzT6TCXpskTjGQ9tYS9JyEvurPATOyGZDmNyroKFlW26QAwspa_EgtgZZh6pytdQSNH)
We have to build awareness around this issue. If we fail in our fight to block Democrats from retaining their Senate majority, the Court could be lost to conservatives forever.

Please don’t wait. Add your name today.

Thanks,

Senate Republicans

clean_body: Peter, Have you heard about the petition circulating around the internet calling for Clarence Thomas to be impeached? Well, it’s kind of a big deal. Recently, the organizers announced that they’ve gathered 1.2 million signatures. If we fail to take back the Senate and give Democrats to more years of control, we’re afraid that “moderate” Democrats like Raphael Warnock from Georgia will move to impeach the Justice. By this own reporting, Warnock is trailing Republican nominee Herschel Walker by JUST ONE POINT in a state that went for Joe Biden by 11,000 votes. What’s more, Warnock has more than $22 million in the bank to spend on the race against Walker. We simply cannot allow radical Democrats like Warnock to win this fall. If he does, all bets are off. A victory for Raphael Warnock in Georgia could spell the end of Clarence Thomas. ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR PETITION: DEFEND THE SENATE. DEFEND CLARENCE THOMAS. We need 2,000 new signatures today and every day until the month. Can we count on you to add yours right now? We have to build awareness around this issue. If we fail in our fight to block Democrats from retaining their Senate majority, the Court could be lost to conservatives forever. Please don’t wait. Add your name today. Thanks, Senate Republicans If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. body:
This headline says it all. Now he’s attacking to distract.
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fb79426952fc41b3b5f931f4e27fde55&_e=z-JlUNsZPlXPA9BonHrnmp9vg7Jc7RWRcA6AV5QgKUn1qHYQVHsfiTFJ6XzMBqpgmYwvRufW7Un_9eQKAL_ikiF26Ue_S-Fp1r_mM5DqyQ7gjfl02Jw8aumA8bd_I6djbiPUjwY6i-hrHBPEPvGenItP28BUI61bg6B_i1Kq0FHeGnYnhJdB3YxRtcyLD-Ww_D16LHNy1KaMhxdXdOsJKIQ2Wv5YIB2UA23WW7se1ofNUwXuL3Iicn2wIHHROi3-swpQEcd__nPa05yOAS_ugIeKFzt-1G6zfxS49nOFkRO_NZ3__dLK-0rBkIq-S48iRDLQYA4oDKVM-LVA2xiBoBArZ3DSzjXNo9xQ_rbPOkDBHn8d0vDMuYblfp_nArEIgY2z8Fltm_cWopzwwMCgiAixbqzHtfvjhxnRIoyFOWhelV72jLqmyLYQmr-E0io2T_bXBA8mdrG1X5hU_WXTQpiloinSOO6eBKvp-WLD0mw%3D)

---
Fellow American,

A new report reveals that Senator Raphael Warnock used campaign funds to cover personal legal expenses from a lawsuit brought against him by a member of his church in Atlanta.

This is just plain wrong - _and illegal_. After all, it is a violation of federal law to spend campaign donations for personal use.

To divert attention away from his campaign violations and disastrous record of voting with President Biden 96% of the time, Senator Warnock's campaign has launched a series of attack ads against Herschel Walker. They've clearly decided that since they can't defend their own record, they only have one option left: attack, attack, attack!

Herschel is down a point or two in the polls, **but he can pull ahead again if we increase our Media Fund and run our ads across Georgia.**

**[Are you able to contribute $5, $10, $25, or even $100 right now so we can expand our advertising and highlight the differences between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fb79426952fc41b3b5f931f4e27fde55&_e=z-JlUNsZPlXPA9BonHrnmp9vg7Jc7RWRcA6AV5QgKUn1qHYQVHsfiTFJ6XzMBqpgmYwvRufW7Un_9eQKAL_ikiF26Ue_S-Fp1r_mM5DqyQ7gjfl02Jw8aumA8bd_I6djbiPUjwY6i-hrHBPEPvGenItP28BUI61bg6B_i1Kq0FHeGnYnhJdB3YxRtcyLD-Ww_D16LHNy1KaMhxdXdOsJKIQ2Wv5YIB2UA23WW7se1ofNUwXuL3Iicn2wIHHROi3-swpQEcd__nPa05yOAS_ugLeCCX30IYZ84EGQUxD8LGQGLpoycEfJYnnewEXD0o9ldZvGfXSUyT_KrX3Jec4oWi3l3K9QjFJf10yBLDSrkApLW6uV9okn0MryCidZyO4viHu5Eq5PvGeoHgPMWfc_pQrH9JbAsffgoR7NfNERJH7JQaKGEVnGVE4EX9IvUSENp7CvlGSoZoFXlBo4KyyjHO6yplCtwY00daGCe9HE7XA%3D)**

[** Stand with Team Herschel -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fb79426952fc41b3b5f931f4e27fde55&_e=z-JlUNsZPlXPA9BonHrnmp9vg7Jc7RWRcA6AV5QgKUn1qHYQVHsfiTFJ6XzMBqpgmYwvRufW7Un_9eQKAL_ikiF26Ue_S-Fp1r_mM5DqyQ7gjfl02Jw8aumA8bd_I6djbiPUjwY6i-hrHBPEPvGenItP28BUI61bg6B_i1Kq0FHeGnYnhJdB3YxRtcyLD-Ww_D16LHNy1KaMhxdXdOsJKIQ2Wv5YIB2UA23WW7se1ofNUwXuL3Iicn2wIHHROi3-swpQEcd__nPa05yOAS_ugApCxB9rI4ycWHTUBlWgd5S6vpvGB0i1CKhYhIJ6P6ixU0h5sFMy--adu8cYWHWM13sUoiTe5CVJABPsGVNY05997Cr7lfFJbQbXK94NjZMFXD0s_dZcIIm6nsB7LZszxyylCY9iJskd9s5YF1q8he7pRpWTFdV1ZV5jGu4k_bR3kvBG2TvUx0YBrz6wfKQkr2asLfTYuHocRZlCWhSwIGk%3D)
**Raphael Warnock is:**
1. Breaking campaign finance laws (a real Washington move).
2. Raising MILLIONS to bury the truth about his troubling record.
3. Taking our country in the wrong direction.

clean_body: This headline says it all. Now he’s attacking to distract. | Fellow American, A new report reveals that Senator Raphael Warnock used campaign funds to cover personal legal expenses from a lawsuit brought against him by a member of his church in Atlanta. This is just plain wrong - and illegal. After all, it is a violation of federal law to spend campaign donations for personal use. To divert attention away from his campaign violations and disastrous record of voting with President Biden 96% of the time, Senator Warnock's campaign has launched a series of attack ads against Herschel Walker. They've clearly decided that since they can't defend their own record, they only have one option left: attack, attack, attack! Herschel is down a point or two in the polls, but he can pull ahead again if we increase our Media Fund and run our ads across Georgia. Raphael Warnock is: 1. Breaking campaign finance laws (a real Washington move). 2. Raising MILLIONS to bury the truth about his troubling record. 3. Taking our country in the wrong direction. 4. Barely ahead in the polls. Senator Warnock has proven that he's a typical Washington politician who doesn't think the laws apply to him. It's time to hold him accountable. Thanks, Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: I’ll cut to the chase
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60817975:J6Q7uNVNF:m:1:3253819041:85D7344B21D37E4977B4610EEB56FA51:r)
You know me.
I'm not the kind of person to beat around the bush. President Trump and I have that in common.
**So I hope you 'll listen to me when I tell you that I'm devastated:**
The Democrats pulled in over a BILLION dollars online last year with one express purpose: to wipe out each and every ally of President Donald J. Trump. It's more cash than any of us could have imagined. This is bad. VERY bad.
_So I 'll cut to the chase:_
I know it's a lot to ask, but we need a [**surge of donations**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60817975:J6Q7uNVNF:m:1:3253819041:85D7344B21D37E4977B4610EEB56FA51:r) ASAP if we're going to save President Trump's closest allies... tomorrow will be too late.
I'm hoping you'll rise to the occasion right now before the end of the day.
[**Help Save President Trump 's Top Allies >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60817975:J6Q7uNVNF:m:1:3253819041:85D7344B21D37E4977B4610EEB56FA51:r)
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
**The way I see it, you only have two choices:**
You can either delete this email, wave the white flag, and let the Democrats overwhelm ALL of President Trump's most loyal allies in Congress with their massive fundraising advantage...
[**... OR YOU CAN STAND WITH US, FIGHT BACK, AND WIN!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60817975:J6Q7uNVNF:m:1:3253819041:85D7344B21D37E4977B4610EEB56FA51:r)
I've made my decision. I'm standing with President Trump. _What about you?_
For freedom,
Jim Jordan

name: American Update
subject: Shepherd - Father - King
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9485%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=NwiUTTcrUl4OYTsYlqOLGw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38973%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EFwzU4qc%2f%2fkyWAWhPLQTfw&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38974%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h1qwQ%2bTautoJrqSOWuNPag&sysid=1)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38985%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xsavqTH6W2JQEt5AqquMhg&sysid=1)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38974%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h1qwQ%2bTautoJrqSOWuNPag&sysid=1)**
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Sean Themea
subject: “I used to be an Obama supporter”
body:
The Liberty Movement is important to me—I want to create a future of liberty and freedom for our children. But more than that
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkagm941s3pf1u04t0qj4b7258t4ridj72q3pgf0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3l65gm4sdle9g64sj765r74spm6mq68pr7choe4sr161orac3lm6or1cthc6rjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p30pjkciqr2o3mchj30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk033m1955mioj0v8vba9vdm67hq25qk4r0bsq9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)

Friend,

The Liberty Movement is important to me--I want to create a future of liberty and freedom for our children.

But more than that, it's deeply personal.

You see, I used to be a liberal. I was an Obama supporter. I believed that the government should provide for us and protect us.

But then I joined Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) and learned that there is an alternative to the Left's indoctrination.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Sean Themea, Chief of Staff at YAL.

When I joined YAL, I discovered something I never knew I was good at - organizing for pro-liberty candidates. **_Now YAL is fighting to elect 250 hardcore pro-Constitution, pro-liberty state legislators to defend our country from tyranny_. **

And Friend, we've already had 179 victories.

I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this week so YAL can continue recruiting student activists who will engage in this important work in key districts around the country. These students are critical to electing hardcore liberty leaders and defeating the Establishment.

[_**It costs roughly $500 per student to get them out knocking on doors. Can I count on you to join the fight with a donation of $25, $50, $100, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent donation today >>> **_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zljlqpkcojtcmnpt56d2dh80475jkqpo1pb8guhg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)

And YAL's formula works--students are recruited through YAL's Operation Win at the Door (OWD) to knock doors and advocate for the election of pro-liberty state legislative candidates.

Through this program, YAL-recruited activists knock doors for principled, liberty candidates across the country who are set on limiting the size and scope of government. To date, YAL activists have elected 174 liberty candidates to state legislatures across the country and this year alone have knocked doors for 55 additional candidates who won their primaries with safe general election races.

This year our trained activists are knocking on over 2 million doors in key districts across the country. We have a once in a generation opportunity to radically shift the direction of our country.

Now, more than ever, you and I can't let up.

_**Consider supporting our crucial effort as our trained activists reach over 2 million voters this year**_**.**

**YAL-recruited students helped achieve 24 election night wins in Kentucky and Pennsylvania,** and ousted 11 establishment incumbents who had track records of voting against important, pro-liberty bills.

In Kentucky, 3 incumbents were defeated thanks to the work of YAL-recruited students. These unseated candidates supported gas taxes and were partially responsible for helping to expedite COVID mandates; one of which even personally donated to Hillary Clinton.

Altogether, Make Liberty Win PAC, YAL's sister organization, with YAL-recruited activists in Kentucky resulted in over _**23,000 doors knocked to bring in 6 big wins for liberty.**_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8dugenrf7d8l74fbb5kq0j236up0624iakbjol0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)

In Pennsylvania, the Establishment also had two incumbents on the ballot and YAL had one incumbent on the ballot who the Establishment tried to whisk away through redistricting. _The Establishment failed_.

What's even more impressive is that the two replaced incumbents have served in their positions for 20 and 30 years, respectively, and were important members of leadership.

These were the types who thought they could get away with any bad vote and the district would still be handed to them. They were wrong.

[_**Click here to pass the torch of liberty on to the next generation, with a donation of $25, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zis9711k5cekn72ol6u016d2vt9uev81hcuq3deo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)

**Remember, it was the states that pushed back against COVID mandates and the gun grabs from the Feds. The States are the bulwark to defend our liberty, which is why this is so important.**

That's why we have to focus on the state-level elections rights now.

Can you help sponsor a student activist and help us meet our goal of raising $50,000? **Click any link below to donate.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znufc2gbm4ede7vuit380j4ut4k5dfm5r3kevmq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zortij13odrh3205blpsgc1qm4nj7um6f3q2mroo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfbdbh123pfoug8m406e4p2h438la5cul78rukng_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk238qitfob1abf3nlpuors9fpjn472lvnn9ht28_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 to Sponsor 1 Student Activist >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z21gb533lvqn1n1v6l1eakifrp72h5rdtff4itr0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 to Sponsor 2 Student Activists >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuc98crcv67j9mhik1hsft73oabld05o9nn66b58_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $3,000 to Sponsor 6 Student Activists >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6nfokdgni5929hba184d59k0b6dgqm6c5jje5fg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $6,000 to Sponsor 12 Student Activists >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zquc18brkkpgvuq1f3lv6n1484u8nt1tq1nuc60o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p31cph2bs)

Thank you,

Sean Themea
Chief of Staff
Young Americans for Liberty, Inc.

_Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution._

name: ICYMI News
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5frckptf6ipkjjuomcsuo9arvnkh5320ess7f00_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p34chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sdgs1pn4tdjehgr4s9imsp79d1hm9o60ohi68obcshnc9pnao30eip64t7165g6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p30pjkciqr2o3mc5j31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmv1lak04r7rs21q11si4vl7a60pqapg4bec8el8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p34chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5gis39lketmt43u7c1mjpa24o15qpg7snnjthn8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p34chh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zagcv4tvircs73emvp7oa2fcre7cbmlajmoq8ehg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4p34chh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi3fpt96ht7987egfru39ts1actqdb5k1c3dt880_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c3g6aoj4chi649fg)

body:
Open this immediately >>
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlqmqdo4h7448v5krecs2b112helddl6l59cd7k8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlegqjatlmmqoj4tbn6cr39c9k6sr34ob0cpr31o3gmgo7adjgc9pm6tjncep30puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdn6ko60shicoq61cr1cuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4o32c9h2bs)
Open this immediately >>
**BREAKING NEWS ALERT:
PRESIDENT TRUMP MADE UP HIS MIND ABOUT 2024** Drop everything: Donald J. Trump made his final decision about whether or not he's running for President. We're rushing to you before he officially makes his announcement with our MOST IMPORTANT poll yet: [**If Trump runs for president again, would you vote for him a THIRD time?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1ha4u21is42ice0dbe8h1hovfv1hhhvrkkl75a8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4o32c9h2bs) **[YES: I STAND WITH TRUMP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo9luieg4ffhri6rd4n32aseicq3evt2l8o6eio8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4o32c9h2bs)** **[NO: I DON 'T SUPPORT TRUMP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbdkbf2518scjcdom9cg1cebun74rjbfs2cuvreg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4o32c9h2bs)** **Trump could make his announcement at any moment... it could be as soon as TODAY.** Before he does, we want to hear from our top supporters -- and you made the cut! We don't have much time, so please answer right here and right now: [**If Trump runs for president again, would you vote for him a THIRD time?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn90q7c4eq45sa21kqgsii706kikoa8usmg27big_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4o32c9h2bs) Thank you, Breaking Trump News
Sent via Team Scalise

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A historic opportunity
body:
In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zparuujnsocpg6hli6r6cptq0h3sggopso351bn0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbom2plncdim2o34eooj4t5h6sqncpj7cmp32ob56qqbadpjm8qm0t3gmlgm3cdnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rjac30e8p6cd32mdi6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clge0pb2c1j61oh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I've been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I'm guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that's why I asked if I could send you this email today. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3s9c4r9r4oulthn2kbn9t2j6gqu3u71nav9q13g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4o36c3h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ The U.S. Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that's why we need YOU! **Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today?** We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That's why we're asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don't wait. You can make your tax-deductible gift to protect life in states across America using this secure link: **[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-states-confirmation](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhp6ahd81et0aoc43lvshmcti83oj3odi8eqkvb8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1im4o36c3h2bs)** Thank you so much for any support you can offer. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: It's time to make change
body:
In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6265%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=27qhXgDSvf7ebMClDq6iCg&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I’ve been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I’m guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that’s why I asked if I could send you this email today. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64522%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NVMWRelrs3n7SKTlbXrJYg&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ The U.S. Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that’s why we need YOU! **Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today?** We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That’s why we’re asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don’t wait. You can make your tax-deductible gift to protect life in states across America using this secure link: **[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-states-confirmation](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64523%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=86twOPttJ86UZIBYuE%2bHqg&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for any support you can offer. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6265%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=27qhXgDSvf7ebMClDq6iCg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6265%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=27qhXgDSvf7ebMClDq6iCg&sysid=1)

Instead of offering solutions, Albany Democrats are pushing for a 55-cent INCREASE in the gas tax, adding new mandates on family farms, and advancing radical energy policies and other unaffordable policies that further increase the cost of living in our state.
New York needs leaders who who will fight to make our state more affordable.
We must vote out One Party Rule if we want change.
Make your voice heard and sign the petition below.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfdrp89n4hk8rcu6l5nik65sc2r654ll8ocql4a0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1imaor2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcd75chjr6t3mclq3ed30m5graplictg74olmmho64pb5m4p66d3nmlpmctpkcsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8o6ct34mmq3fcjicoor1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z70pdnooogfbb0luu8ojrl7afo9jh4knk06o9ptg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1imaor2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zob68alcvocbesq9qj8d3mu8qqs75r86tqiajdpg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1imaor2clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqgpfgpfljpq66ego31het8ml9fol3rdseveg2c0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1imaor2clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Mike Pence
subject: Biden sent American oil WHERE?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom Inc |
body:
You will not BELIEVE this headline... but it explains a whole lot about our gas prices right now. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9481%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KH8LRKo8jdz6I6vGPZl4%2fg&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38988%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gL7s%2fot1u2Alw1BquK5cJA&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, Wondering why you’re paying $5 per gallon for gas? **While Joe Biden was planning his trip to Saudi Arabia to beg for foreign oil this week, his Administration was****shipping off precious US oil reserves to other countries.**
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38989%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fZH2hYmWOZU2St8LhZg0yA&sysid=1)
---
That’s right: President Biden is sending OUR strategic oil reserves to Communist China to ease their burden... and leaving YOU stuck with rising gas prices. This is unacceptable, and we need to hold Joe Biden accountable! _[**Tell Joe Biden:****NO sending our oil to Communist China while the American people are suffering!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38980%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GANxbfX8NtWbK1G9V4hBCQ&sysid=1)_
---
[**FIGHT BACK NOW**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38981%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0ekXLLgBWYfgpLg01mw1yw&sysid=1)
---
This is just one example. Joe Biden’s terrible policies are destroying America as we know it. We’re watching it happen right before our eyes. **That’s why I called on dozens of other conservative leaders to work with me to put together a plan to fight Biden’s failures:****_To save America, we MUST return to the pro-freedom policies of Reagan and Trump._ ** American energy independence is only one piece of this plan. Friend, the **Freedom Agenda** is THE complete plan to push back against the far-left Biden administration, right now. But I need your help to make it happen. __Remember what life was like under the Trump-Pence administration?__ In just 48 months, we achieved:
* the lowest unemployment,
* the highest household incomes,
* the most energy production,
* the most pro-American trade deals,
* the most secure border,
* and the strongest military in the history of the world.

_**And we can do it again.**_ **The organization I founded, Advancing American Freedom, brought our movement’s leaders together to build a plan to do just that.****_And now, we’re ready to fight to make it happen._** We don’t need to wait for a change of leadership in Washington to start building the conservative comeback. _We’ve got the roadmap right here._ **All we need is YOUR SUPPORT to fuel our efforts.** Step one is getting the word out and making sure the American people know that this gas crisis is no accident -- it is a direct result of Joe Biden’s failed policies. ** Will you join me in holding Joe Biden accountable today?**
---
[ **DONATE NOW**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38982%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n3Nj2S2Brc0gXgaDk2ERgQ&sysid=1)
---
Thank you, Mike Pence Founder, Advancing American Freedom
---
| | |
---
| |
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9481%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KH8LRKo8jdz6I6vGPZl4%2fg&sysid=1)

Admiral Mike Franken is the Democratic nominee running against Chuck Grassley to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue, and if Mike wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold onto (or even expand!) our Senate majority this year. But Mike needs your help. Right now, we’re still 432 donations short of our daily goal and what we need to help Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions to try to defeat Mike and turn the Senate red. But Mike Franken’s not taking money from corporate PACs so if he’s going to win, he needs grassroots donors like you to chip in now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Chuck Grassley is vulnerable this November. Ann Selzer confirms it. And with your help now, we know we can do it. Thank you so much, Team Franken Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

| Hey Peter, it’s Melissa King, John’s wife. I’m truly grateful to have spent the better part of the past year and a half on the campaign trail with my husband. It’s been one of the greatest honors of my life to hear your stories and band together to fight for change. The momentum our campaign has seen in the past few months is all because of your support — from the bottom of my heart, thank you. With the future of our climate, reproductive rights, and state economy on the line, there’s never been a more critical election — and we have a real shot at flipping Maryland blue this year. But in order for John to become the Democratic nominee on Tuesday, **we need every single one of you to dig deep and pitch in whatever you can to ensure that we have the resources to flood the airwaves with John’s message, staff polling places, and knock on more doors than ever before.** [_**I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important, Peter — can you pitch in right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47937985/356257945/-1597515454?source=email-ngp-20220717-fr_full-MSK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220717-fr_full-MSK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220717&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=MSK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=3490ef5b-d005-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDkwZWY1Yi1kMDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvmIB9rntn-Dsm5ya0ADY92U69EG5YnwuJuy1_hiM_c=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ | | [$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47937986/356257946/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220717-fr_full-MSK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220717-fr_full-MSK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220717&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=MSK_S1_C1&&&&express_lane=true&&&&amount=3&refcode2=3490ef5b-d005-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDkwZWY1Yi1kMDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvmIB9rntn-Dsm5ya0ADY92U69EG5YnwuJuy1_hiM_c=)

| | Hi, **I want to take a moment to introduce my friend and Congressional candidate, Eric Lynn. He's running in Florida's 13th Congressional District.** He's fighting tooth and nail to keep his community, Pinellas County, out of the hands of a Trump-endorsed candidate. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A historic opportunity
body:
In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu25to8i9ppg3hbea7e8sgvvbje05eudb8h0cai8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq75crkehh75ddgmcob8d31edp71or46lin2o7162qb1c30mpgb6o9hclj7fd5gcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i61j78o5lm5jrepb66aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clge0or2c3im9oh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I've been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I'm guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that's why I asked if I could send you this email today. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl4tmt9cg9cufmp5a3s09e9103vklrn2qd33p5qo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1hm4o75cjh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ The U.S. Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that's why we need YOU! **Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today?** We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That's why we're asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don't wait. You can make your tax-deductible gift to protect life in states across America using this secure link: **[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-states-confirmation](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zins18l37lmhph6a7vq3n1aahf5limtqd38hm1a0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1hm4o75cjh2bs)** Thank you so much for any support you can offer. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

clean_body: In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed t | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I've been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I'm guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that's why I asked if I could send you this email today. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute The U.S. Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that's why we need YOU! Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today? We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That's why we're asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don't wait. You can make your tax-deductible gift to protect life in states across America using this secure link: Thank you so much for any support you can offer. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: Charlie Crist
subject: We must impeach Justices Kavanaugh and Gorsuch for lying to Congress about Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
(sign my petition) |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47942112/356274737/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220717_p_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAzOThmMi1kNTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ8taxpeRYjhkzKwM9cZrwsp6P16YJHUx-khTPHRczI=)
---
Folks,

During their Supreme Court confirmation hearings, Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch testified, under oath, that in their view _Roe v. Wade_ was settled law.

Then, as we all know, they both joined the Court's majority opinion overturning _Roe v. Wade_ — and half a century of settled law. This means only one thing: **Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch lied under oath to the U.S. Senate.**

**_[Perjury is a crime. And if perjury is found to have occurred, the correct remedy is impeachment. I'm circulating a petition calling on the Senate to impeach Justices Kavanaugh and Gorsuch for lying in their confirmation hearings. Will you add your name?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47942113/356274738/280450294?refcode=20220717_p_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAzOThmMi1kNTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ8taxpeRYjhkzKwM9cZrwsp6P16YJHUx-khTPHRczI=&emci=b5253003-fb03-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=040398f2-d505-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)_**
[Sign the petition:
Kavanaugh and Gorsuch must be impeached](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47942114/356274739/280450294?refcode=20220717_p_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAzOThmMi1kNTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ8taxpeRYjhkzKwM9cZrwsp6P16YJHUx-khTPHRczI=&emci=b5253003-fb03-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=040398f2-d505-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)
---
In the meantime, I know folks are looking to their leaders to defend reproductive freedom, so here's my promise to you: **As governor of Florida, I will do everything in my power to defend the right to choose.**
* On day one of a Crist administration, I will sign an executive order prohibiting Florida state agencies from closing reproductive health care clinics or cooperating with any federal officials or states seeking to prosecute women for exercising their constitutional right to freedom.

* And after I defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis, if he takes lame duck action to ban the right to choose in Florida, **I vow to veto every single piece of anti-freedom Republican legislation until they repeal it**.

But we can't just respond to this vile, unconstitutional, and anti-American decision. We also need to hold responsible the ones who made this decision, especially the Supreme Court justices who stood before the U.S. Senate — and the American people — and **_lied_**.

**_[Please sign my petition calling for the immediate impeachment of Justices Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47942115/356274740/280450294?refcode=20220717_p_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAzOThmMi1kNTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ8taxpeRYjhkzKwM9cZrwsp6P16YJHUx-khTPHRczI=&emci=b5253003-fb03-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=040398f2-d505-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)_**
[Sign the petition:
Kavanaugh and Gorsuch must be impeached](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47942116/356274741/280450294?refcode=20220717_p_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAzOThmMi1kNTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ8taxpeRYjhkzKwM9cZrwsp6P16YJHUx-khTPHRczI=&emci=b5253003-fb03-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=040398f2-d505-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)
---
The fight continues, as it must.

— Charlie Crist

name: Debbie Lesko (R-AZ)
subject: Let me be very blunt : Joe Biden is SUING Arizona 🔗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here in Arizona, we believe ONLY U.S. CITIZENS should vote in America... Now Biden is SUING us!
My name is Debbie Lesko -- I'm about to lose it, so let me be very blunt:
Here in my home state, we believe ONLY U.S. CITIZENS should vote in our elections... **But now Joe Biden is SUING Arizona because we require proof of citizenship to vote!**
I knew I had to do something right away. [**That 's why I'm launching a brand new, one-day-only survey for the American People.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60818234:6GF4oNVVN:m:1:3317145305:6F718E8E06F8D68BCF440C39BF1994C1:r)
It's only a single question -- so please take a minute to add your response. _Your honest feedback is really important to me._
* * *
**Official Republican Poll:** Do you agree that ONLY U.S. CITIZENS should be allowed to vote in America?
**[YES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60818234:6GF4oNVVN:m:1:3317145305:6F718E8E06F8D68BCF440C39BF1994C1:r) **[NO](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60818234:6GF4oNVVN:m:1:3317145305:6F718E8E06F8D68BCF440C39BF1994C1:r)****
_Important note: If you have strong feelings on this issue, please make sure to respond before closing out of this email. All responses after 11:59 PM (EST) tonight will NOT be counted._
* * *
I know this survey might be an obvious answer for folks who think election integrity is important. But Joe Biden does NOT fall into that category and, truthfully, the only opinion that really matters to me on this issue is the American People.
**Because _that's_ who should be choosing our elected leaders!**
[**Remember -- I 'm only conducting this survey through the end of the day. If you think ONLY U.S. citizens should be voting in our elections, please respond to my official poll right now.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60818234:6GF4oNVVN:m:1:3317145305:6F718E8E06F8D68BCF440C39BF1994C1:r)
Blessings to you,
Debbie Lesko
_GOP Congresswoman From Arizona_
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I am the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, my work in the Senate is guided by the timeless and powerful Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to repair and improve the world. So today, I want to take just a moment to share a little bit more about my faith with you.
I am the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants. From a young age, my family taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I learned how Jewish women have been holding our communities together and taking a stand against injustice from the time of the Torah to today.
Now, as both the third Jewish woman Senator in U.S. history, and the only former synagogue president in the U.S. Senate, **I'm proud to carry these values with me in everything I do to serve Nevada and our country.**
And in this present moment, we're facing no shortage of issues – many of which directly impact women and the Jewish community. From growing antisemitism to attacks on abortion rights, to attacks on our very democracy, I know it's my duty to respond with clear resolve and a commitment to social justice.
If we truly want to repair the world, then it’s up to all of us to come together, roll up our sleeves, and do the repairing.
**There is so much work ahead of us to make this nation better – for ourselves and for future generations.** **[So if the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you – if you're with me in the fight to make real progress for our country – I hope you'll chip in $5 or more today to help me continue this critical work in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47942771/356277425/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1863-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmI1NWY1NS1kNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GO0NrftZ5SqU37LW2rOilP6GCTbHyuyw0p1mFHBc_ic=)**
When everybody stands firm and does their part to help better this world, we can move mountains to make positive change happen. Thank you, friend, for joining us.

Jacky
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47942772/356277426/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1863-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmI1NWY1NS1kNzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GO0NrftZ5SqU37LW2rOilP6GCTbHyuyw0p1mFHBc_ic=)

body:
Decades of protections for abortion rights gone.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47943904/356282302/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_220717AbortionResend_RR_SB_30DO_5_NG_N_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmFkNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8y2_fzMHW9Bk7NOf03AqUiWvx9I5vLFxLm6idplGkGM=) Peter,

**The Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade has stripped away decades of protections for abortion rights.** With this decision, we’re likely to see total abortion bans in several states. Even right here in Ohio, _Republicans' Heartbeat Bill has been enacted to ban abortion as early as six weeks, even for cases of rape and incest._

It’s time to protect reproductive rights permanently. We need the Women’s Health Protection Act now more than ever. Without the protections of Roe, thousands will lose their reproductive freedom and privacy, and I will not just stand by.

[**_To protect abortion rights, we must expand our Democratic majority in Congress. With several critical House races and one of the most-watched Senate races in the nation, Ohio is key to the future of abortion rights. Congresswoman Shontel Brown

body:
Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47944496/356284146/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFlNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whOrmkRgHIXOahWi9oktli5LoVmybEYJv_8dPibyrJs=)
Can I explain something, team? [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47944497/356284147/67415181?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220717_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFlNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whOrmkRgHIXOahWi9oktli5LoVmybEYJv_8dPibyrJs=) In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” To say the least, I was not an obvious choice. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47944498/356284148/67415181?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220717_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFlNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whOrmkRgHIXOahWi9oktli5LoVmybEYJv_8dPibyrJs=) And it’s true, I had never run for office before. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47944499/356284149/67415181?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220717_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFlNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whOrmkRgHIXOahWi9oktli5LoVmybEYJv_8dPibyrJs=)
_Source: The New York Times_ But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47944500/356284150/67415181?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220717_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFlNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whOrmkRgHIXOahWi9oktli5LoVmybEYJv_8dPibyrJs=)
_Source: The Denver Post_ So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47944501/356284151/67415181?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220717_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFlNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whOrmkRgHIXOahWi9oktli5LoVmybEYJv_8dPibyrJs=) I was ready to fight for the state we loved and the country that welcomed my and many others’ immigrant families. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47944502/356284152/67415181?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220717_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFlNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whOrmkRgHIXOahWi9oktli5LoVmybEYJv_8dPibyrJs=)And thanks to folks like you, we’ve been here ever since working to expand opportunity for all.[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47944503/356284153/67415181?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220717_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFlNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whOrmkRgHIXOahWi9oktli5LoVmybEYJv_8dPibyrJs=) But now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target. All Republicans have to do is flip one seat to retake the Senate majority, and it’s clear they have their sights set on Colorado. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47944504/356284154/67415181?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220717_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFlNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whOrmkRgHIXOahWi9oktli5LoVmybEYJv_8dPibyrJs=) To make matters worse, my team tells me we're $23,229 short of where we should be just days after news broke that half of my opponent's fundraising came from his own bank account last quarter. **We cannot afford to lose the Senate majority. Can I personally count on you to donate $10, so we can have the resources to fight back and protect this seat?** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47944505/356284155/67415181?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220717_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFlNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whOrmkRgHIXOahWi9oktli5LoVmybEYJv_8dPibyrJs=)_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47944506/356284156/67415181?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220717_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFlNjRiZS1kODA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whOrmkRgHIXOahWi9oktli5LoVmybEYJv_8dPibyrJs=)****
