clean_body: Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” | = Can I explain something, team? = In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” To say the least, I was not an obvious choice. = And it’s true, I had never run for office before. = Source: The New York Times But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with. = Source: The Denver Post So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate. = I was ready to fight for the state we loved and the country that welcomed my and many others’ immigrant families. thanks to folks like you, we’ve been here ever since working to expand opportunity for all.= But now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target. All Republicans have to do is flip one seat to retake the Senate majority, and it’s clear they have their sights set on Colorado. = To make matters worse, my team tells me we're $23,229 short of where we should be just days after news broke that half of my opponent's fundraising came from his own bank account last quarter. We cannot afford to lose the Senate majority. Can I personally count on you to donate $10, so we can have the resources to fight back and protect this seat? you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= I’m refusing to accept a single cent of corporate PAC or lobbyist money, so I mean it when I say I’m counting on your grassroots donation (and videos with Hick and his banjo) to fuel our campaign. = Thanks, Michael = Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

clean_body: Chris is dedicated to fighting for our common good, and for him, that includes fighting to protect our reproductive rights. | = Hey Derek, Chris is dedicated to fighting for our common good, and for him, that includes fighting to protect our reproductive rights and ensuring women and girls across the Commonwealth have access to abortion. That’s why we want to know: Do you agree that we should do everything we can to protect the right to an abortion? | = = Your response will be sent directly to Team Deluzio. Thank you for sharing your thoughts with Chris and our team, Team Deluzio PS. Recently, Chris spoke on TV about his opponent’s radical and out-of-touch abortion stance. = | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. Our entire democracy is at stake, team. Holding Tom’s seat is the difference between upholding American values and civil rights or plunging into years of an extremist political majority.

We just learned that Kevin McCarthy’s dark-money Super Pac raised over 40 million dollars in the last three months alone – they’ve been coming after Tom all year – and now they're surely going to do anything in their power to sabotage our campaign!

[Please donate today to support Tom Malinowski and protect the House!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47946197/356290449/-1267168966?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220717_1_3&refcode2=84b8a13d-dc05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGI4YTEzZC1kYzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kFUGFNo7C0sostV8sV1Ui6lo5_Asdy74xeYYYjvoxdA=)

Hi Team,

With less than four months to go in my re-election campaign, we’re heading into the homestretch.

[This is going to be a fight to the finish, team. That’s why I’m asking for your support to bring this home on behalf of New Jersey and our entire country. Chip in $10 or whatever you can right now to help put us over the top:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47946198/356290450/-1267168966?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220717_1_3&refcode2=84b8a13d-dc05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGI4YTEzZC1kYzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kFUGFNo7C0sostV8sV1Ui6lo5_Asdy74xeYYYjvoxdA=)

[https://act.malinowskifornj.com/a/july-donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47946199/356290451/-1267168966?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220717_1_3&refcode2=84b8a13d-dc05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGI4YTEzZC1kYzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kFUGFNo7C0sostV8sV1Ui6lo5_Asdy74xeYYYjvoxdA=)

Team, my opponent is running for Congress for the FOURTH time — but today, he’s even MORE dangerous and LESS trustworthy than in the past.

Tom Kean Jr. has made a career out of hiding from his constituents and avoiding facing the tough issues — cowering behind his father’s name, but without any of the moderation and decency his father embodied. The MAGA wing of the GOP is pouring money into our race to tip the scales in Kean Jr.’s favor, including with major contributions from Kevin McCarthy’s PAC.

Team, the battle for our district is going to be one of the closest races in the country. And with Kean Jr.’s open embrace of the Trump agenda — including his refusal to condemn the insurrection and refute Trump’s Big Lie — the stakes couldn’t be higher.

[At a time when our democracy is increasingly fragile, Kean Jr. is the exact opposite of the leadership we need in Congress. This race is not only the key to more progress on the issues we care about, from health care to climate change to protecting women’s rights — our democracy itself is on the line. Our House majority is the most powerful defense against Republicans trying to subvert the next presidential election, and to place our country under permanent minority rule.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47946200/356290452/-1267168966?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220717_1_3&refcode2=84b8a13d-dc05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGI4YTEzZC1kYzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kFUGFNo7C0sostV8sV1Ui6lo5_Asdy74xeYYYjvoxdA=)

But team, here’s the good news. New Jerseyans — Democrats, moderate Republicans and Independents alike — are coming together to reject Kean Jr.’s cowardly refusal to defend democracy and demand principled, responsible leadership. Our coalition is fast becoming a model for the rest of the country, because we’re showing what it looks like to put country over party and unite in the fight to save democracy.

[I’m not under any illusions, team. This race is going to be very, very close. But with the fate of our House majority and our democracy itself on the line, we’ve got to stay the course towards victory. Will you chip in $10 today to help make that happen — and show up for our communities, our state, and our democracy as a whole?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47946201/356290453/-1267168966?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220717_1_3&refcode2=84b8a13d-dc05-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGI4YTEzZC1kYzA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kFUGFNo7C0sostV8sV1Ui6lo5_Asdy74xeYYYjvoxdA=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: As a diplomat in the Obama administration, Tom Malinowski stood up to dictators overseas. Now experts say his re-election could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Did you catch Tom’s last email? Our entire democracy is at stake, team. Holding Tom’s seat is the difference between upholding American values and civil rights or plunging into years of an extremist political majority. We just learned that Kevin McCarthy’s dark-money Super Pac raised over 40 million dollars in the last three months alone – they’ve been coming after Tom all year – and now they're surely going to do anything in their power to sabotage our campaign! = See Tom’s original email: Hi Team, With less than four months to go in my re-election campaign, we’re heading into the homestretch. = = Team, my opponent is running for Congress for the FOURTH time — but today, he’s even MORE dangerous and LESS trustworthy than in the past. Tom Kean Jr. has made a career out of hiding from his constituents and avoiding facing the tough issues — cowering behind his father’s name, but without any of the moderation and decency his father embodied. The MAGA wing of the GOP is pouring money into our race to tip the scales in Kean Jr.’s favor, including with major contributions from Kevin McCarthy’s PAC. Team, the battle for our district is going to be one of the closest races in the country. And with Kean Jr.’s open embrace of the Trump agenda — including his refusal to condemn the insurrection and refute Trump’s Big Lie — the stakes couldn’t be higher. = But team, here’s the good news. New Jerseyans — Democrats, moderate Republicans and Independents alike — are coming together to reject Kean Jr.’s cowardly refusal to defend democracy and demand principled, responsible leadership. Our coalition is fast becoming a model for the rest of the country, because we’re showing what it looks like to put country over party and unite in the fight to save democracy. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = I can’t tell you how grateful I am to be able to count on your support. Let’s keep pushing, Tom * | Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district — which experts say could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. = = Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress Tom Malinowski for Congress P.O. name: Debbie Lesko (R-AZ)
subject: I'm about to lose it: Biden is SUING my home state 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here in Arizona, we believe ONLY U.S. CITIZENS should vote in America... Now Biden is SUING us!
My name is Debbie Lesko -- I'm about to lose it, so let me be very blunt:
Here in my home state, we believe ONLY U.S. CITIZENS should vote in our elections... **But now Joe Biden is SUING Arizona because we require proof of citizenship to vote!**
I knew I had to do something right away. [**That 's why I'm launching a brand new, one-day-only survey for the American People.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60818224:JnjMVNVHN:m:1:3253819041:3BD06B77A109EAEFC1C6036287BFE2D2:r)
It's only a single question -- so please take a minute to add your response. _Your honest feedback is really important to me._
* * *
**Official Republican Poll:** Do you agree that ONLY U.S. CITIZENS should be allowed to vote in America?
**[YES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60818224:JnjMVNVHN:m:1:3253819041:3BD06B77A109EAEFC1C6036287BFE2D2:r) **[NO](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60818224:JnjMVNVHN:m:1:3253819041:3BD06B77A109EAEFC1C6036287BFE2D2:r)****
_Important note: If you have strong feelings on this issue, please make sure to respond before closing out of this email. All responses after 11:59 PM (EST) tonight will NOT be counted._
* * *
I know this survey might be an obvious answer for folks who think election integrity is important. But Joe Biden does NOT fall into that category and, truthfully, the only opinion that really matters to me on this issue is the American People.
**Because _that's_ who should be choosing our elected leaders!**
[**Remember -- I 'm only conducting this survey through the end of the day. If you think ONLY U.S. citizens should be voting in our elections, please respond to my official poll right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60818224:JnjMVNVHN:m:1:3253819041:3BD06B77A109EAEFC1C6036287BFE2D2:r)
Blessings to you,
Debbie Lesko
_GOP Congresswoman From Arizona_

I hope you're enjoying a restful Sunday with family and friends. This weekend, Team Franchot is out in force speaking with voters at the doors and on the phones, and I’ve been busy meeting with Marylanders on the campaign trail.
With just TWO DAYS TO GO until the July 19 primary, we are doing everything we can to continue to spread our message, and reach as many voters as possible to build the critical mass of support needed to win this highly competitive election.
We are coming down to the wire, and we need all the help you can spare to give us the edge in these final, critical days. My team has set a $9,000 GOTV fundraising goal by our July 18, 11:59 PM deadline. If you are able to help us, will you rush a donation to power our movement to victory?

Yet, Republican lawmakers, most of whom are still under Donald Trump’s thumb, have abandoned all pretense of supporting democratic values and basic individual rights.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: America was founded as a Christian nation…here’s proof
body:
Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” has been our guiding principle since the beginning. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6267%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=kNtzeV2yPekbFbJcXnPkmg&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64536%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1uP96%2b9Jq0QWSOzoqsrriw&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64536%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1uP96%2b9Jq0QWSOzoqsrriw&sysid=1)
---
Hello,

Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government.

That simply isn’t true, and I can prove it. In my brand-new coffee-table style book, _America Is a Christian Nation_ , you can see how our country has moved from its reliance on God to its rejection of God. It’s a short read, and we’ve paired the written content with some gorgeous patriotic photos that you’re going to enjoy looking through.
---
| | [LEARN THE TRUTH](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64537%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tuq7LdWF8oVnvMq1VG5%2bIA&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64536%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1uP96%2b9Jq0QWSOzoqsrriw&sysid=1)
---
In appreciation for any gift you are able to make to _Pathway to Victory_ today, we’d like to send you a copy of this book along with a DVD copy of my message, _America is a Christian Nation_. I think you’ll find it informative and engaging. You can receive your copy by making your donation here: [https://ptv.org/donate/july-2022-america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64538%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IqLqV%2b%2f6bAfX0pMxd%2f0g0w&sysid=1)

You may already be convinced that America was founded as a Christian nation and that we have strayed far from that foundation. The question in that case is, how do we get back? You’ll find the answer to that question as well at the end of _America Is a Christian Nation_.

As believers, we need to do all we can to both preserve America’s unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. I hope you’ll stand with me in doing so.

Sincerely,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6267%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=kNtzeV2yPekbFbJcXnPkmg&sysid=1)_

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: We did it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
We hit our mid-month fundraising goal thanks to grassroots donors like you
| | |
---
We did it, team!

We hit our mid-month fundraising goal thanks to grassroots donors like you, so I’m reaching out to say thank you.

From the beginning, we knew this was going to be a tough race — but I've won tough races before. And with your support, I’m confident we can do it again.
And now, with Mitch McConnell threatening to ban abortion in all 50 states, keeping our Senate majority and staying in this fight has never been more important. **[We’ve got the momentum that we can’t afford to lose, so today I’m asking if you can chip in just $3 to help me hang onto this seat and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47951697/356304440/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1322-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjA3MzBkNC1lMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZNdfQGcddjSClUK7JJulLX0WPPsnML6daRoAF6mhsj4=)**
McConnell knows that he only needs to flip one seat to return to the majority leader’s office and enact his radical right-wing agenda. That’s why he and his dark money allies are spending $21 million trying to flip this seat. But instead of backing down – with your support – we’re standing up.
I am incredibly grateful for your support.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: We hit our mid-month fundraising goal thanks to grassroots donors like you | | | We did it, team! We hit our mid-month fundraising goal thanks to grassroots donors like you, so I’m reaching out to say thank you. From the beginning, we knew this was going to be a tough race — but I've won tough races before. And with your support, I’m confident we can do it again. And now, with Mitch McConnell threatening to ban abortion in all 50 states, keeping our Senate majority and staying in this fight has never been more important. = McConnell knows that he only needs to flip one seat to return to the majority leader’s office and enact his radical right-wing agenda. That’s why he and his dark money allies are spending $21 million trying to flip this seat. But instead of backing down – with your support – we’re standing up. I am incredibly grateful for your support. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: Jamie Long
subject: Friend, we need your help
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
Friend, We have a very important fundraising deadline coming up and we need your help. A strong fundraising number will show how serious we are about protecting our House DFL majority. Can you help us out with a donation today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately Contribute $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-july2022?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=071722deadline1] Contribute $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-july2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=071722deadline1] Contribute $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-july2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=071722deadline1] Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-july2022?express_lane_other=true&refcode=071722deadline1]Protecting our DFL majo rity is a must, friend. If we don’t hold the House, we know what’s at risk: reproductive rights, an open and fair democracy, safe schools for our children, and protecting our climate for future generations. That’s not the future we need for Minnesota. Thank you for supporting our fight for a Minnesota that works better for everyone.
Thank you,
Jamie Long
Minnesota House of Representatives

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=810ff5c5ec8c4e0fb3d052be37b93c92&_e=MZVqmbNCyNk9sAqX1pfbRRrxviJPad_ke7tfTBFMAOlcFpDulKSI2T42xLhO0ldCqb4uIjvP4O80sbM6Im1bY2_cZtxgk3M9lEfXZkPugmRP1MPYcI2XC1D6AT76UOYqYtVsLo3CkZGbsAKi9sSB2aBaBp_1cGudbtpYtHea8wcMHu7fMWYHPhTl4QzmWmfZGAX_HalcFicXb4ZTi2E5ZXwhLjgE9MFLAm2IMn2D2tbQt0BbwH_dZsljQoi1J_GnTkGJDa9Eyxyzqwc4DOsXlTT7XUOW3BNz11tPGC4c0MLXQi_Utwy2JNZz0nq9djcLtNNRcOrU_UlvdhCcjZPIJ_7Vex6i7AyEX3HPzKX-UqpBVOZikrn9YT2HwU1zge8VhdUgk-udv5-LhstRlDr3eDR5lqH2SC2oaggU2nb8EZMvhbPApuNrE3meBrrPymgcICRM5J9kLAjmHIS2qxIp0Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=810ff5c5ec8c4e0fb3d052be37b93c92&_e=MZVqmbNCyNk9sAqX1pfbRRrxviJPad_ke7tfTBFMAOlcFpDulKSI2T42xLhO0ldCqb4uIjvP4O80sbM6Im1bY2_cZtxgk3M9lEfXZkPugmRP1MPYcI2XC1D6AT76UOYqYtVsLo3CkZGbsAKi9sSB2aBaBp_1cGudbtpYtHea8wcMHu7fMWYHPhTl4QzmWmfZGAX_HalcFicXb4ZTi2E5ZXwhLjgE9MFLAm2IMn2D2tbQt0BbwH_dZsljQoi1J_GnWCkb38woUUpbMalwNA4x9CZGwG2VppWWRtt8lSdU4dJo-Hte3PPX6MbpHkSG9ET0900kfPY9pqi5cvUf04G0ammeZ9cC9nLIOBrqmLGW3lK4oAwpwb1a5wIb5kT-HSZsC3zWA507-FJ-70IvRz2lBpzYfNRoMwL7W_7wTIX2QOTxK7A6hV88TuvsNIC8gq3fQ_sBw1KsFALXcr7xTieWzg%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=810ff5c5ec8c4e0fb3d052be37b93c92&_e=MZVqmbNCyNk9sAqX1pfbRRrxviJPad_ke7tfTBFMAOlcFpDulKSI2T42xLhO0ldCqb4uIjvP4O80sbM6Im1bY2_cZtxgk3M9lEfXZkPugmRP1MPYcI2XC1D6AT76UOYqYtVsLo3CkZGbsAKi9sSB2aBaBp_1cGudbtpYtHea8wcMHu7fMWYHPhTl4QzmWmfZGAX_HalcFicXb4ZTi2E5ZXwhLjgE9MFLAm2IMn2D2tbQt0BbwH_dZsljQoi1J_GnqnPf292PfkpoCKwdSLCqOeuZC5HCJECD2rJQm5oWD575w1HWErYAdMeZv0b0-iT5bUv-Q4SJDf2LveRYvcZp5PHXVZ3lOsJwnVd5qo8V5Ugl9_aE2PWAQkKFLzMVAgd-CH7m0otC3l-tqlK7SnQ6f4CxnAKPpTr_vJ65OkYpMueTQIxSCs3FdojGLuayRTop1SfOOebQwHexSfEsjpTyKw%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is flawed and outdated —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: The Federalist Papers. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist Papers as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ The Federalist Papers ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of “The Federalist Papers” today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

What’s causing the biggest Mass Exodus of Californians in the history of the state?

What is driving California’s record-low population growth?

Why are businesses packing up and leaving?

Why are families forced to leave in order to put food on their tables?

Why has all this happened under Gavin Newsom’s watch?

We just released a documentary: Mass Exodus that explains it all.

Hit play below to watch it.

body:
Trudy Busch Valentine is running for Senate to bring compassion, integrity, and a nurse's heart to Washington.
| | |
---
**Peter – Trudy Busch Valentine is running for Senate to bring compassion, integrity, and a heart and mind of a nurse to Washington.**
As senator, she will partner with her colleagues in Washington to:
✅ Tackle **the opioid crisis,** which is tearing our communities apart
✅ Give everyone a chance to achieve their own **American Dream**
✅ Restore our **reproductive freedoms** and defend our **civil liberties**
Trudy is working her heart out every single day to win this race. But she's counting on your grassroots support to overcome:
🚨 The**hyperpartisanship** that's obstructing any progress
🚨 **Gridlock and corporate greed** running rampant in Washington
🚨 Racist **voter suppression laws** that are undermining our democracy and keeping people away from the ballot box
**Trudy will bring real, bold leadership to families here in Missouri – but to win on Election Day, she needs grassroots people like you to stand with her.**
**[So please, before our 11:59 p.m. deadline tonight, will you pitch in a $5 donation to elect a nurse who will lead with kindness and fix what's broken in Washington? name: Jeff Merkley
subject: I need your signature on this critical petition about the filibuster:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47956639/356315958/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmQ4NGFjMC1lOTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ewGWVnXagrpNZxz2MDcgN0FSysPncyN8lyTIZDV-e54=&emci=3c020ff0-f655-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=7fd84ac0-e905-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=7731215)
---

| | America is gripped by four great crises: the pandemic, the climate crisis, racial justice, and the threat to our very democracy. We must act boldly and swiftly. The American people gave Joe Biden the most votes of any president in history with a clear mandate to act. subject: Biden SUES Arizona for requiring proof of citizenship to vote

body:
Arizona just passed a law that would require voters to show their proof of citizenship to vote.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z15jqk8b2emvpmkrcv6k5ftr56ejl8b23u8jnhho_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1jmcor3c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf7d1gs1qrdcdhehp7eo5m6aqb5ddmcmoe2t1lmphn0sbm6dhb2ctgmpqbcojl63jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coored9gc1p76phh62qr2ptgmlin49fg)

**BREAKING: Biden SUES Arizona for requiring citizenship to vote** __[**[NEW POLL] Do you think proof of citizenship should be required to vote?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuabchtb6adim4u7eukp89b78159cg0bst428cdo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1jmcor3c9h2bs)__ [**Yes**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z83etr9efsog8sivdfmrms0crakrnfad824jj4to_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1jmcor3c9h2bs) [**No**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zen8iflkes3pmptn1tl7ibj30u4ngsji9egsm04o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1jmcor3c9h2bs)

Friend,
Arizona just passed a law that would require voters to show their proof of citizenship to vote.
_Now, Joe Biden is taking them to court to STOP THEM!_
America First Patriots in Arizona need to know there are Patriots across the country who support them. [**So we 're turning to you: do you think proof of citizenship should be required to vote? **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbj4nlpodf2pnidb4n6pi54hi6dtul39lhqet8lo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1jmcor3c9h2bs)

| | Peter, This is my least favorite part of campaigning. The other side will stop at nothingーthey're shameless.

They don't care who they take their money from, whether it be Zuckerbucks or handfuls of dark money from other liberal billionaires. But I only need your grassroots support to win. **[If you can chip in a first-time donation of $10 or more today, I'll send you a special thank you gift for your support.](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=cd5c375444bd49759b131d52463f1031&_m=f46e6bf982cb48aabcfb7d93eb92bb01&_e=6Gy_0aB7uX2gJEB0Vq0gP5lJgvX9vsec_JEWhHMqKqQKhNMA2-TDcw89UrhBIaTva4LdjWBBURBLxbKUws7rV2r1I9tkwD1MIZALSqAyiIza0JtUxpBpBnc0ryUSwOI-mXlcwXXTz-KRwNxMcJVKjRfvjAUjpDLp7BarX8Zzo2whBHha-a4nBdlvAKPoFqhnCko2E6Z2QQjPTXLEKaALIAmoU__of4lbZDzFbbE7DbTFf3DgS6tTm7DicDm0eQMmDMEM_4Lb_t4OcdME6Eqfi0CpFBG3ogYct-TNqtGiZw_DAkhh8-hdJXtIo_3Ma_qnCqcpMaJL1E07FlUi6mJB8hZeFH7RSViyZAcm6kpGPZJxF5bzrAyN-VWtixtqn4tl-k5-v2Lv9g-ViQmS8xQp5EPud9akHRvsW1URpl-0h3x_NmPz4GkyOKX4Xb_ocAyPeLdLwVTi6YLGi_T6hEs396yYnn7jkoKzbxMeZUbTpE9iyXvvkwVqrHQEw1PJjxcH)** **An ‘exclusive grassroots digital donor badge’ that you can share and show on social media.****It’s the campaign button of the 21st Century!** I am running for U.S. Congress because my parents taught me that service is more important than anything else. When I joined the US Army, I was repeatedly taught that service and sacrifice are the greatest achievements a person can accomplish. And my faith has taught me that service before self is of the utmost importance. I served as an Apache pilot in Iraq, then came home to run my family’s business and create American jobs. After facing and learning from these challenges, I concluded that the best way to continue improving my community was to help fix the mess in Washington. Unfortunately, a big part of getting to Washington is raising money. Without adequate resources, we can’t compete. We’ll be drowned out by special interests before we have a chance to make a difference. **Can I count on your support?**

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: devastating ads just released
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | My heart is racing. Republicans just launched their first ads attacking our Senate Majority. \-- They're going after Raphael Warnock in Georgia.
\-- They're going after Mark Kelly in Arizona.
\-- They're going after Cheri Beasley in North Carolina.
\-- They're going after John Fetterman in Pennsylvania. | Peter, Primary Election Day is just 2 DAYS AWAY, and it's clear that we have the momentum behind us to win this thing. Our campaign is proud to have received several high profile endorsements — from MD National Organization of Women, Our Revolution, Sierra Club MD, Pro-Choice Maryland Action, Sunrise Movement MD, National Iranian American Council, **and in case you missed it, Senator Chris Murphy.** Chris has been leading the fight for gun regulations for years, and is making big strides as the lead Democrat negotiator in the current fight for gun safety legislation. He gave us his full endorsement because he knows John’s record supporting safe schools, pushing for mental health programs, and working towards common sense gun control. We are honored to have Chris’s support in this race. body:
This is a disgrace

When I saw this post by the U.S. Marines, I almost dropped my phone. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60818368:6QsJINVWN:m:1:3253819041:0D9F1E8A6A29C3D50C92EAEEBF4A1948:r) This is Congressman Ronny Jackson. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. _**These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don 't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country.**_ I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. I spent 24 years serving this great nation. I fought every day and put my life on the line to protect the freedoms America offers. _**I did NOT serve so that the woke radicals could politicize our military.**_ **Now, I 'm running for Congress in the great state of Texas to stop Radicals like Beto and Pelosi from turning America into a Woke Wasteland.** But the DC Swamp hates this about me. clean_body: This is a disgrace When I saw this post by the U.S. Marines, I almost dropped my phone. This is Congressman Ronny Jackson. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don 't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. I spent 24 years serving this great nation. I fought every day and put my life on the line to protect the freedoms America offers. I did NOT serve so that the woke radicals could politicize our military. Now, I 'm running for Congress in the great state of Texas to stop Radicals like Beto and Pelosi from turning America into a Woke Wasteland. But the DC Swamp hates this about me. Hi, it's John. So uh Nate Silver’s 538 analysts released their 2022 Senate Election forecast and... [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47958181/356323278/934264986?refcode=220711&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU2Y2MxNS1mMDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0wel6VnxWZzAA7zbCD80_feyq-yFLkI282PchHqA40=) Their model named us the closest Senate race in the country. [**We can’t leave anything up to chance. Will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and Seth Moulton and help us pull ahead of Dr. Oz? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47958182/356323279/934264986?refcode=220717&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU2Y2MxNS1mMDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0wel6VnxWZzAA7zbCD80_feyq-yFLkI282PchHqA40=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47958183/356323280/-1896278260?refcode=220717&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU2Y2MxNS1mMDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0wel6VnxWZzAA7zbCD80_feyq-yFLkI282PchHqA40=)
Let me first say I’m so grateful for this team. We just had a killer end-of-quarter grassroots fundraising push, all thanks to yinz guys. 🥰 So I hate to come right back to your inbox with another ask. Seriously. But here are three reasons why, as soon I saw Nate’s new forecast, I knew I didn’t have a choice:
1. 538 has the entire Senate rated as a toss-up!!! Yep, Dems staying in control of the Senate could come down to a single race (ours).
2. They’re projecting a vote margin of just 0.3% in our race. Doing the math, that’s like, a few thousand PA voters at most. That’s the kind of *tiny* margin that could tip either way purely based on how hard we campaign.
3. Dr. Oz is primed to spend TONS of money attacking me. My dude is so rich, the limit basically does not exist.

So if we don’t want Dr. Oz and his buddies Trump + McConnell to tip the scales against us with massive, MAGA-y ad campaigns, we can’t skip a beat with our online fundraising. [**Please, if you’re ready to defeat Dr. Oz, flip this seat, and keep the Senate blue, consider splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Seth Moulton today so we aren’t outspent.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47958184/356323281/934264986?refcode=220717&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU2Y2MxNS1mMDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0wel6VnxWZzAA7zbCD80_feyq-yFLkI282PchHqA40=) With your help, I know that we’ll be able to keep up with Dr. Oz and his MAGA money through donations of $5, $25, or whatever yinz can pitch in. It’s how we’ve run this campaign so far, and how it’s going to stay. Thank you for fighting back today. TBH, I’m really hoping our team will see your name pop up on ActBlue when you make your first-ever (!) donation. John Fetterman
Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania

name: Primary Sinema
subject: The future of abortion in Arizona
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
It’s not just Joe Manchin. | | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q9IIE2XtEvKx2Sp_oDxvjPPV9fB3vt0zH8r1ea6CSiKB_0o1C9ydUJ1LhFt4rs7Ll7HOGBpxaNpcuAjfGb5gUbEDwnPRoWos9-mb-rK-G2WNxPMS8W_Bm8T8oHdhayns_tn0BZaHHnEjUyCXZ-0RBOHXYw9rEcbMW8iuvHdz88wOjd1ZgeD30VTHln069HVdqlXmUexWUVKPrt59X_lM4Sv/3nt/u1UTJhrbQ9ufnkZNtoC3wg/h0/8i0B3-63uYjpF1PruA_GG-yPniHqC7iyr1u-NFMo4kc)

Peter, Arizona is one of 13 states that have now banned or *severely* restricted abortion (with more state bans coming soon). Here’s what it’s like on the ground: The Supreme Court’s decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_ has unleashed legal chaos in Arizona, leaving Arizonans scrambling to figure out if they can get the abortion care they need. Earlier this week, a federal judge blocked an unthinkably extreme statute. But there’s another, older law on the books that would ban abortion without exception even for rape and incest, and the Republican Arizona attorney general is seeking to enforce it. With the legal future of abortion still unclear, nearly all providers in the state, including Planned Parenthood, have halted abortion services — leaving millions of Arizonans without access. The chaos in Arizona is yet more proof that we can't rely on the courts to save us — _and the Supreme Court has already made that crystal-clear._ It's up to our elected leaders to do their jobs, fulfill their campaign promises, and protect our rights! Which leads us to our ultimate question here: **WHERE IS SINEMA?** The fact that one of Arizona’s two Democratic U.S. Senators has chosen to do _nothing_ , is horrifying. 48 Democrats are willing to change the filibuster rules and support codifying _Roe v. Wade_ into law. But not Sinema! We must hold her accountable for failing to do her job. **_[Please, Peter, consider pitching in a donation to our grassroots movement to primary Sinema. We’re using the threat of a primary challenger to pressure her to ditch the filibuster and codify abortion rights. If she doesn’t, we’ll ensure she loses office.](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSTeNOE4YP01D8z6aJUhbuVZFo6yMcxxd66Ge6bfjySl9RJJYJtAUXgYa4AvbOgZxKjSwh3QvKL3XzIE_HxspoGuzz4jAX8_UANlbL8hP9ZsA_n_yYxKv9kqpDUGzL2C9boC8wEn0YaYyDLgbFr9HkGQOkIvl1f5XW5K-CSAukDcdHHso3Z30sDQx3dCHOxPZT0NNTKMWQiZQIBsYcxyJgz_YneeB3En19aMmTuBFy1bNi1xoM1XI3f2O6Ss8Ed4BGSs2MikoVP5aoZN11eCojVm_anCcjmausLvpSDTpN-p6cQLpfNWjD_--Cq8m0_eVr/3nt/u1UTJhrbQ9ufnkZNtoC3wg/h1/TV6GZXmg8uxWMAk0FA14TyG2cCj3bpaTUjCegVvrgLw)_** **_[](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSTeNOE4YP01D8z6aJUhbuVZFo6yMcxxd66Ge6bfjySl918G__U7R2on0lP9TiSQX5mPf4pvHVXLGWWGhYb0g9bmUhZLOIC8pG4Nr7P2AwUh2-SrzdviNf91UGWMbnRNuaJw8hYEQMYKQCLwFOh-KVYmJTwrypRyRmn8YrXqbNF9ThsoNHQafbUARMtpILbcS7wtTd_m18fsg89pS3JaTe8lCvH9A-8cC-U4ERQgEGEadXtpSiYHDdaATd2yr08KXLKe4kzk03Ie5_YNcl2msh3tXXryZWqcqPm5yUGsqb9lTp6WbpDgTxJonhDHc75Hj8/3nt/u1UTJhrbQ9ufnkZNtoC3wg/h2/OC06ex0ZkFTg97Kum9KrSci4z1ANBjUvKcRboULLOpQ)_****__** **[Donate](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSTeNOE4YP01D8z6aJUhbuVURAFsE6yU_oeQGAe_dwp4xbNpqXrqaX9fC0VlOuV2bX9oJ6KIKHfxj8gHEVdUfSU5AmfpFAc-TAyvzeLNYS4DwnaK7avS38Jm9bRSM96DlYmaCxU6i5l5BTJshW1HaxXPMw9vC63f_rOI8mCDvjM9BWYR7kRQx8AvlkVbwxm2s_1ZX8K0YIOrbpFzYDJUGr0U1oUGse8iId6n2jGtvtg4Jhig71FM89vX75MLr-3vecnjiYkqZFYQ17oc3ZSsM0afh2jfR0gLUl0gpovgvYEuy7A2fdmzOsVB_azpbn_zO_/3nt/u1UTJhrbQ9ufnkZNtoC3wg/h3/WaoAveXPxvwc8hAkrCzo-vmrp02fwAhHOWsylbE3x-Q)** **** We won’t stand for Sinema’s inaction — not when the fundamental rights of tens of millions of Americans are in the balance. Thank you for taking action, Primary Sinema Project

clean_body: It’s not just Joe Manchin. | | | Peter, Arizona is one of 13 states that have now banned or severely restricted abortion (with more state bans coming soon). Here’s what it’s like on the ground: The Supreme Court’s decision overturning Roe v. Wade has unleashed legal chaos in Arizona, leaving Arizonans scrambling to figure out if they can get the abortion care they need. Earlier this week, a federal judge blocked an unthinkably extreme statute. But there’s another, older law on the books that would ban abortion without exception even for rape and incest, and the Republican Arizona attorney general is seeking to enforce it. With the legal future of abortion still unclear, nearly all providers in the state, including Planned Parenthood, have halted abortion services — leaving millions of Arizonans without access. The chaos in Arizona is yet more proof that we can't rely on the courts to save us — and the Supreme Court has already made that crystal-clear. It's up to our elected leaders to do their jobs, fulfill their campaign promises, and protect our rights! Which leads us to our ultimate question here: WHERE IS SINEMA? The fact that one of Arizona’s two Democratic U.S. Senators has chosen to do nothing , is horrifying. 48 Democrats are willing to change the filibuster rules and support codifying Roe v. Wade into law. But not Sinema! We must hold her accountable for failing to do her job. ** We won’t stand for Sinema’s inaction — not when the fundamental rights of tens of millions of Americans are in the balance. Thank you for taking action, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. name: Welch for Vermont
subject: Our entire progressive agenda is at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Our race in Vermont is shaping up to be one of the most consequential in the country, can you chip in $5 right away?

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=669%2E61531%2EN9wW2H)
Hello,

We’ll get straight to the point: our race in Vermont is shaping up to be one of the most consequential in the country. Democrats hold the slimmest of Senate majorities, meaning one race could decide control.
[**To keep Vermont and the Senate blue, we need All Hands on Deck. So we’re asking: Can you chip in $5 or more to elect Peter and prevent Mitch McConnell from retaking power?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3472?t=3&akid=669%2E61531%2EN9wW2H)
[CHIP IN ](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3472?t=7&t=21&akid=669%2E61531%2EN9wW2H)
---
National Republicans have targeted Vermont as a must-win state—and we know they’ll spare no expense to win. In fact, they’re on a spending blitz to the tune of $141 million to take back the Senate, and **with the Senate split 50-50, they only need one seat.**
**Just imagine a world where Mitch McConnell becomes majority leader again. Our progress will be set back decades.** He’ll block President Biden’s nominees and continue his decades-long project of packing the federal courts with extreme conservatives. He’s even said he’d consider passing a national abortion ban.
Everything—voting rights, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, lowering prescription drug prices, reproductive justice, racial and economic justice, _everything_ —stands no chance at getting passed under a McConnell-controlled Senate. **The other side is fighting for failure.**
Peter’s ready to fight for us on Day One, but he can’t do it alone. National Republicans have their chosen candidate—a Trump appointee—and they’re trying to flip this seat so they can advance Mitch McConnell’s interests, not Vermont’s. Let’s come together and send a message that we won’t let them.
[**If you can, please chip in $5 or more to protect our Democratic majority and keep the Senate blue.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3472?t=4&akid=669%2E61531%2EN9wW2H)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Trump for Speaker [Live Poll for, Peter]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Peter,

I've promised that my first vote in the next Congress will be to fire Nancy Pelosi.

**And I want my next vote to elect Donald J. Trump as Speaker of the House.**

But I need to know if I have your support.

I'm asking all of my top supporters who they want to see as Speaker of the House: Donald Trump or Nancy Pelosi?

I want to know if the America First movement stands with me in supporting Donald Trump for Speaker of the House.

**So I'm asking you to respond to this poll my team prepared.**

**[Please answer the poll my team specially prepared just for you and tell me if you want Donald J. Trump or Nancy Pelosi to serve as Speaker of the House](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60483134:slaYpYhqN:m:1:2365227053:6C60D5606716C03681DB8E6CFF7C788F:r)**. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60483134:slaYpYhqN:m:1:2365227053:6C60D5606716C03681DB8E6CFF7C788F:r) [_**HELP MATT GAETZ
CLICK HERE TO TAKE THE POLL**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60483134:slaYpYhqN:m:1:2365227053:6C60D5606716C03681DB8E6CFF7C788F:r) After you answer the poll, please **[chip in a contribution of $10, $25, or $50](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60483134:slaYpYhqN:m:1:2365227053:6C60D5606716C03681DB8E6CFF7C788F:r)** to help me elect an America First majority that will fire Nancy Pelosi and hold Joe Biden accountable.

With an army of America First conservatives by my side, I will work with a new Speaker of the House to:
---
*** **Investigate Hunter Biden's laptop** from hell and expose the Biden Crime Family's corruption. *** **Force Hillary Clinton to testify** for her treason in spying on Donald Trump's 2016 presidential campaign. *** **Build the wall** and end Joe Biden's illegal alien invasion. *** **Ban critical race theory** in the United States military.
_If Nancy Pelosi is Speaker, I can promise you Democrats will_ : continue the January 6 witch hunt to ban Donald Trump from running for President in 2024, grant amnesty to tells of millions of illegal aliens, push critical race theory in the military and schools, and push America one step closer to becoming a socialist nation.

I have a plan to stop this nightmare.

**[That's why I've prepared this one-question poll to see if you want Donald Trump or Nancy Pelosi to serve as the next Speaker of the House](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60483134:slaYpYhqN:m:1:2365227053:6C60D5606716C03681DB8E6CFF7C788F:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60483134:slaYpYhqN:m:1:2365227053:6C60D5606716C03681DB8E6CFF7C788F:r) [_**HELP MATT GAETZ
TAKE THE POLL TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60483134:slaYpYhqN:m:1:2365227053:6C60D5606716C03681DB8E6CFF7C788F:r) Once you answer the poll, I hope you will **[chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60483134:slaYpYhqN:m:1:2365227053:6C60D5606716C03681DB8E6CFF7C788F:r)** so I can help elect rock-solid America First champions to Congress.

**The America First movement needs a strong speaker committed to an agenda to make America Great Again.**

You and I can't afford any Liz Cheney or Adam Kinzinger-type RINOs that just want to show their face on CNN and attack conservatives to win cheers from the fake news media.

I plan to vote for Donald Trump as the next Speaker of the House.

But I want to know who you want to see as the next Speaker of the House: Donald Trump or Nancy Pelosi?

**[So please answer the poll my campaign prepared so I can personally see the results](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60483134:slaYpYhqN:m:1:2365227053:6C60D5606716C03681DB8E6CFF7C788F:r).**

**And after you complete this quick one-question poll, please[chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,900](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60483134:slaYpYhqN:m:1:2365227053:6C60D5606716C03681DB8E6CFF7C788F:r) so I can help elect an America First majority in Congress next year.** [_**HELP MATT GAETZ
CLICK HERE TO TAKE THE POLL**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60483134:slaYpYhqN:m:1:2365227053:6C60D5606716C03681DB8E6CFF7C788F:r) Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: My time with Vanity Fair
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
from my long days and nights in Congress to even longer nights on the Orlando police beat
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47958653/356325645/596838240?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3758-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUxNTRlNS1mMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6L4rSuzOgVITOrzWBhcBJJcL35NRJYZs7gHGeayWHPE=)
---
When Vanity Fair joined me on the campaign trail, friend, here's what I told them: **When I make it to the U.S. Senate, it will not be the same._I will never tire of doing good. _**

**[If you're already committed to our movement to flip Florida blue, I'm asking you to give $5 now. If you aren't, friend, I'm hoping you'll give me a minute to explain to you why I'm running.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47958654/356325646/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3758-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUxNTRlNS1mMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6L4rSuzOgVITOrzWBhcBJJcL35NRJYZs7gHGeayWHPE=)**
The way I see it, senators like my opponent, Marco Rubio, have forgotten who they serve. But from my long days and nights in Congress to even longer nights on the Orlando police beat, what it means to truly give back has been ingrained in me. I have my mom and dad to thank for that.
When my siblings and I were young (all seven of us!), Mom and Dad would tell us to define ourselves by our ability to work hard – by our belief in _ourselves._ "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – _never tire,_ " my mom would tell me. These are sentiments I hold close to my heart. Even though we grew up poor, even though life was tough sometimes, Mom and Dad instilled in me a sense of duty that's never wavered. **I'll bring this duty to the U.S. Senate, and when I do, it will not be the same.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47958655/356325647/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3758-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUxNTRlNS1mMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6L4rSuzOgVITOrzWBhcBJJcL35NRJYZs7gHGeayWHPE=)
Photo credit: Vanity Fair and Annie Leibovitz
The sad thing about career politicians like Marco Rubio, friend, is that they don't truly _see_ people anymore. It's something I lived through growing up in poverty. As I told Vanity Fair recently, people would walk by my parents like they weren't even there – like being a janitor and a maid raising seven kids in the segregated South didn't _matter._

That's why I speak so often to strangers here in Florida and invite them back to my office to chat. It's why in Congress I always remember to strike up a chat with painters, janitors and cafeteria workers – the hardworking Americans that are the backbone of our nation's capital. I want people to know I see them. I want people to know they're here, and they _matter._ **I'll bring this humanity to the U.S. Senate, and when I do, the Senate will not be the same.**
**[If you're ready for change in the U.S. Senate, if you believe in the opportunity to do good and truly tackle the challenges before us, then I'm asking you to help me win. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47958656/356325648/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3758-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUxNTRlNS1mMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6L4rSuzOgVITOrzWBhcBJJcL35NRJYZs7gHGeayWHPE=)**
After long days on the campaign trail, Mom's words – _never tire –_ resonate in my mind. They're what I hear when I remember gun violence striking my community at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando – resolving me to fight for change, to never tire, until the epidemic of gun violence in America is no more.

_Never tire_ are the words I hear as more and more truth comes out about the habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: former President Donald Trump. Nobody is above the law, and I'll never tire to hold him accountable for what he's done to our democracy.

**_Never tire_ are the words I'll hear when I make it to the U.S. Senate. And because a little Black girl grew up with so much grit – because her parents, a maid and a janitor, taught her to persevere – the Senate will not be the same.**
**[But I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is _resources. _The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to change our U.S. Senate and entire country for the better, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47958657/356325649/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3758-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUxNTRlNS1mMTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6L4rSuzOgVITOrzWBhcBJJcL35NRJYZs7gHGeayWHPE=)**
Thank you for being in this with me. _Never tire._

Val Demings

clean_body: from my long days and nights in Congress to even longer nights on the Orlando police beat | | | = When Vanity Fair joined me on the campaign trail, friend, here's what I told them: When I make it to the U.S. Senate, it will not be the same.I will never tire of doing good. = The way I see it, senators like my opponent, Marco Rubio, have forgotten who they serve. But from my long days and nights in Congress to even longer nights on the Orlando police beat, what it means to truly give back has been ingrained in me. I have my mom and dad to thank for that. When my siblings and I were young (all seven of us!), Mom and Dad would tell us to define ourselves by our ability to work hard – by our belief in ourselves. "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire, " my mom would tell me. These are sentiments I hold close to my heart. Even though we grew up poor, even though life was tough sometimes, Mom and Dad instilled in me a sense of duty that's never wavered. I'll bring this duty to the U.S. Senate, and when I do, it will not be the same. = Photo credit: Vanity Fair and Annie Leibovitz The sad thing about career politicians like Marco Rubio, friend, is that they don't truly see people anymore. It's something I lived through growing up in poverty. As I told Vanity Fair recently, people would walk by my parents like they weren't even there – like being a janitor and a maid raising seven kids in the segregated South didn't matter. That's why I speak so often to strangers here in Florida and invite them back to my office to chat. It's why in Congress I always remember to strike up a chat with painters, janitors and cafeteria workers – the hardworking Americans that are the backbone of our nation's capital. I want people to know I see them. I want people to know they're here, and they matter. I'll bring this humanity to the U.S. Senate, and when I do, the Senate will not be the same. = After long days on the campaign trail, Mom's words – never tire – resonate in my mind. They're what I hear when I remember gun violence striking my community at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando – resolving me to fight for change, to never tire, until the epidemic of gun violence in America is no more. Never tire are the words I hear as more and more truth comes out about the habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: former President Donald Trump. Nobody is above the law, and I'll never tire to hold him accountable for what he's done to our democracy. Never tire are the words I'll hear when I make it to the U.S. Senate. And because a little Black girl grew up with so much grit – because her parents, a maid and a janitor, taught her to persevere – the Senate will not be the same. = Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire. Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . name: Trump News HQ
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znvdl62birmcci7m312efrpsas1kpf7inhkm1slo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1jm9o36cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sji6dp68cjn6cpbbcplmph68p3lmopj8s75ejjmdcrmekpr0p1ksdq68c9gserrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p30pjkcaqr9ptmcdj32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6bj8is16lubc3dcg15uvg8ijsftrbhs5ppp8hng_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1jm9o36cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztv5pf2jis615rv28qjbghiaii052l9v81g19llg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1jm9o36cth2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2aunm8qpallblqp28ij3ck08ljsie9ejg4j8eu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1jm9o36cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: John Fetterman
subject: Hannity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m not about to let Hannity drag my name through the mud.
#
Derek, it’s John.
It brings me *no* pleasure to ask, but are you familiar with the host of a little show on Fox News named Sean Hannity??? 🙄
I’m just asking because my opponent made an appearance on his radio show this week.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220717-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220717-6535&refcode2=6535_434096_cZHoVC&akid=6535%2E434096%2EcZHoVC)
And if you couldn’t guess already... **My dudes Dr. Oz + Sean Hannity spent the entire time spreading BS lies + ATTACKING me and our campaign.**
[**_Can you please rush a donation of $5 right now to help me fight back? We need to counter Hannity + Dr. Oz’s attacks with as much grassroots support as possible right now._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220717-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220717-6535&refcode2=6535_434096_cZHoVC&akid=6535%2E434096%2EcZHoVC)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220717-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220717-6535&refcode2=6535_434096_cZHoVC&akid=6535%2E434096%2EcZHoVC)**
During the interview, Dr. Oz said *yours truly* is a “radical,” then he said I’m “crazier than you think.”
Then he said the filibuster would destroy the governance structure of our country.
Yeah... Ok, dude. 🙄
**Look, I’m not gonna stand for Hannity + Oz dragging our team through the mud. That’s just unacceptable. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help fighting back.**
[**_Please rush a donation of any amount right now to help me fight back against this Fox News attack + future ones. I’m counting on yinz + youse to have my back on this one._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220717-1?refcode=em20220717-6535&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6535_434096_cZHoVC&akid=6535%2E434096%2EcZHoVC)
Thank you so *very* much for your support,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of PA

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220717-6535-footer&t=1&refcode2=6535_434096_cZHoVC&akid=6535%2E434096%2EcZHoVC)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: I’m not about to let Hannity drag my name through the mud. Derek, it’s John. It brings me no pleasure to ask, but are you familiar with the host of a little show on Fox News named Sean Hannity??? 🙄 I’m just asking because my opponent made an appearance on his radio show this week. And if you couldn’t guess already... My dudes Dr. Oz + Sean Hannity spent the entire time spreading BS lies + ATTACKING me and our campaign. During the interview, Dr. Oz said yours truly is a “radical,” then he said I’m “crazier than you think.” Then he said the filibuster would destroy the governance structure of our country. Yeah... Ok, dude. 🙄 Look, I’m not gonna stand for Hannity + Oz dragging our team through the mud. That’s just unacceptable. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help fighting back. Thank you so very much for your support, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of PA | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

subject: Do you have the courage and determination to help stop them? 🤔

Hear me on this:
Dear Peter,
**This is Governor Kristi Noem. I have some pressing news for you.** I just got wind that the Democratic National Committee is unleashing a tidal wave of cash to help Liberals in red states. They're striking us in must-win GOP strongholds and I'm worried it's having a major effect...
Republicans and Democrats are virtually TIED in the latest polls.
I'm partnering up with Republican Whip Steve Scalise because this is an emergency -- we just set up a [**rapid-response goal**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60818276:66GhwNVlN:m:1:3317145305:F724B0BF247A13FE33A6CFF17D31C6A9:r) of $150,000 before our top GOP allies are completely overwhelmed. **According to the latest intel, the DNC is mobilizing quickly to:**
* Launch anti-Trump ad campaigns across America
* Deploy Liberal field teams to battleground districts
* Train an army of door-knockers to reach new voters
* Organize high-profile fundraisers to prop-up vulnerable Democrats
* Flood the airwaves with false and misleading stories about Republicans

**[Rapid Response Goal: Add Support Now ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60818276:66GhwNVlN:m:1:3317145305:F724B0BF247A13FE33A6CFF17D31C6A9:r)**

I have a hunch you're not one to give up when the going gets tough -- or when a bunch of Liberals try to buy an election. **That 's why your name is at the top of the list.**

body:
You decide.
| Friend — He’s under criminal indictment. He’s broken Texas laws. He tried to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He’s attacking LGBTQ+ Texans. And just the other day, he let everyone know that he’s such a far-right extremist, he’d rather let women die than comply with the Biden Administration’s order that life-saving abortion care must be provided. Oh, he’s also at risk of _losing his license to practice law_ in the state of Texas. (An Attorney General who isn’t an attorney seems... a little contradictory.) **Ken Paxton already believes he’s above the law, and so far, he’s been proven right. name: Virginia Democrats
subject: Glenn Youngkin Lies About Same Sex Marriage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
It’s a simple question, Governor.

|
---
Derek, Last weekend, Glenn Youngkin was asked plainly on _**CBS’s Face the Nation**_ if he would take the necessary steps to protect same-sex marriage in Virginia, in the event that the conservative-packed U.S. Supreme Court were to overturn _Obergefell v. Hodges._ Rather than providing a resounding **YES** to what should be a simple question, Glenn Youngkin danced around the question, with dog-whistle phrases like _“returning the rights to states”_ and _“protecting the right of lawmakers to make laws.”_ Pushed on it once more, Glenn Youngkin claimed same sex marriage was already protected in Virginia. **Perhaps someone should loan Glenn Youngkin a history textbook:_this is simply not true._** **Same sex marriage remains banned in the Code of Virginia** , and if the Supreme Court were ever to “return the power” back to the states on this issue, same sex marriage would become illegal in Virginia. **In fact, earlier this very year, the Virginia GOP blocked a proposal to codify marriage equality in the Commonwealth.** The Governor’s comments show that he either has no clue what is actually in Virginia’s Constitution, or he is actively choosing to lie to Virginians. Either way, we should not have to wonder whether our Governor is incompetent or just a liar. **[We need to elect pro-LGBTQ Democrats to the General Assembly to protect marriage equality, and we need your help. clean_body: It’s a simple question, Governor. | Derek, Last weekend, Glenn Youngkin was asked plainly on CBS’s Face the Nation if he would take the necessary steps to protect same-sex marriage in Virginia, in the event that the conservative-packed U.S. Supreme Court were to overturn Obergefell v. Hodges. Rather than providing a resounding YES to what should be a simple question, Glenn Youngkin danced around the question, with dog-whistle phrases like “returning the rights to states” and “protecting the right of lawmakers to make laws.” Pushed on it once more, Glenn Youngkin claimed same sex marriage was already protected in Virginia. Perhaps someone should loan Glenn Youngkin a history textbook:this is simply not true. Same sex marriage remains banned in the Code of Virginia , and if the Supreme Court were ever to “return the power” back to the states on this issue, same sex marriage would become illegal in Virginia. In fact, earlier this very year, the Virginia GOP blocked a proposal to codify marriage equality in the Commonwealth. The Governor’s comments show that he either has no clue what is actually in Virginia’s Constitution, or he is actively choosing to lie to Virginians. Either way, we should not have to wonder whether our Governor is incompetent or just a liar. = Virginia Democrats | =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: The might and drama
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsz7NLYhNn

Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its
sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our
fascination ....
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osz7NLYhNn

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

We
generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and
powerful emperors.

But
overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of
imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through
a far different form of government.

Did you
know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his
Empire from the Roman Republic?

The story
of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes
in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the
Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating
narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the
perils of success.

To help
tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently
released our free online course, "The Rise and Fall of the Roman
Republic."

You can
now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the
Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or
more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of
liberty.

And, for
a limited time, we'll also send you a free color map of the Roman
world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper.
This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will
illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.

Simply
use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of "The Rise and
Fall of the Roman Republic," along with the companion map today:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd

Learning
the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary
to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way.
That's why we produced "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"
and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Before I
go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future
generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale
College!

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

Friend,

God has blessed America. But our freedom will only survive if we protect it, if we take our duty and our obligation seriously.

But I also know that at this moment, we are confronting a domestic threat that we have never faced before. And that is a former president who is attempting to unravel the foundations of our Constitutional Republic. And he is aided by Republican leaders and elected officials who have made themselves willing hostages to this dangerous and irrational man.

Now, some in my party are embracing former President Trump. And even after all we’ve seen, they’re enabling his lies. Many others are urging that we not confront Donald Trump, that we look away. **_And that is certainly the easier path._**

But to argue that the threat posed by Donald Trump can be ignored is to cast aside the responsibility that every citizen – every one of us – bears to perpetuate the Republic. We must not do that, and we cannot do that.

During this time of testing, I am asking for your help. My bid for re-election is going to be a fight, but it is a fight I am ready to wage. **_[And it is a fight that I encourage you to join.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=82429fe08c9549038a1874d4b15925ae&_e=cTEyKH6Cjk1UrMd-syb6v_Yl6QDyWxBAaqP3TOcFygl1JxKrFrtk-8TrVySwaV-uCVyPVSuS4CaauYRAAtAlCOZjMGmta7vAAx9NCkvm9iEDlGK8p8qZ1CATyOiJfyUkn5UVfEAxvZC0p4N5dUHFGrWzsSy7MJNwVlmCZWHFAEPQsDGsYf9A9gcRMVbmgUoyWZ-n-njwL9asB_p9WW4kT3kLeRnzrPuSjk9uJgQVU9tB0vLCNpoPJHbVXFZl-6WdemL5BL8H1J4edR2k8WXX4E8n92UWl-IwMDkhRJHXAq-MLhwLK1z-NZPTmnAAk6XcVqe64MfCgKEJJTrX8584OZYWMvsQTwHT03L5D_Use6ttVHy-eGqVTi393l1WYZ0uUfcICAjMaMX9bU0hIHpmOJyN-b7x5e99Y_kDSlA67qn_Qc0rMNgalNSiPE1PmgTf9_WzkMr_2rqQJ5-i9rzR6Ov9hg2kd6-1X-9gxviTKJOO24Ytj4OBqJc_OnA5yvh5lV1T9hyGBkPTQm9ABnD0_bZieBm0rH_yXJGsvsc98NixHQ8pWAqqta7lVsMP4TfG-biK0d9QgmyXovVz6KPOFQ%3D%3D)_**

name: VoteVets.org
subject: We’re going BIG for 5 women veterans and military family members in TOUGH races.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
This week, we launched a massive ad campaign supporting five Democrats in close House races.
#
Derek -
This week, we launched a massive ad campaign supporting five Democrats in close House races.
All five are women.
All five are incumbents.
All five are either veterans or national security experts.
All five seats are important if we’re going to hold the House.
All five need our help.
[**Please make a $3 contribution to support our seven-figure ad buy supporting five women in tough House races this November. Control of the House is on the line.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vvh-em-july22.txYRMT&refcode=em220717-1-15&t=1&akid=6508%2E3013755%2EyhRF26)
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vvh-em-july22.txYRMT&refcode=em220717-1-15&t=2&akid=6508%2E3013755%2EyhRF26)
---
Here’s a snapshot of some of the spots.
**Rep. Abigail Spanberger in Virginia.**
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vvh-em-july22.txYRMT&refcode=em220717-1-15&refcode2=6508.3013755.yhRF26&t=3&akid=6508%2E3013755%2EyhRF26)
**Rep. Mike Sherrill in New Jersey**
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vvh-em-july22.txYRMT&refcode=em220717-1-15&refcode2=6508.3013755.yhRF26&t=4&akid=6508%2E3013755%2EyhRF26)
**Rep. Chrissy Houlahan in Pennsylvania**
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vvh-em-july22.txYRMT&refcode=em220717-1-15&refcode2=6508.3013755.yhRF26&t=5&akid=6508%2E3013755%2EyhRF26)
**Rep. Elissa Slotkin in Michigan**
