name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Never doubt a mom
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I’m no stranger to tough fights, and I don’t back down from a challenge.
#

Friends -
In my first election, my opponent said I wouldn’t be able to mount a successful candidacy as a young mom.
So I proved them wrong. I grabbed the diaper bag and a stroller to go door-to-door with my twin boys, and I won — by over 30 points.
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220717-1-ma&refcode2=1235.357359.o-EoVk&t=1&akid=1235%2E357359%2Eo-EoVk)_Curt and I with our twin boys._
Yet still, we face pundits and naysayers who doubt us. Some have said that flipping North Carolina’s Senate seat and becoming the third African American woman to serve in the U.S. Senate — and the first African American senator from North Carolina — will be too difficult.
But I’m no stranger to tough fights, and I don’t back down from a challenge.
[**If you're ready to expand our Senate majority, can you make a $3 donation to our campaign? It’s going to take a historic grassroots effort, but I know that we have what it takes to win.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220717-1-ma&t=2&akid=1235%2E357359%2Eo-EoVk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2574?c0=cb-em-july22.vdnk-G&refcode=em220717-1-ma&refcode2=1235.357359.o-EoVk&t=21&akid=1235%2E357359%2Eo-EoVk)**

---
****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2576?c0=cb-em-july22.F-KyA9&refcode=em220717-1-ma&refcode2=1235.357359.o-EoVk&t=23&akid=1235%2E357359%2Eo-EoVk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2569?c0=cb-em-july22.9SesFt&refcode=em220717-1-ma&refcode2=1235.357359.o-EoVk&t=24&akid=1235%2E357359%2Eo-EoVk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2570?c0=cb-em-july22.EO0rHo&refcode=em220717-1-ma&refcode2=1235.357359.o-EoVk&t=25&akid=1235%2E357359%2Eo-EoVk)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2573?c0=cb-em-july22.Nzvxsb&refcode=em220717-1-ma&refcode2=1235.357359.o-EoVk&t=26&akid=1235%2E357359%2Eo-EoVk)**
---
****
It’s time for us to try something new in North Carolina. That’s why this campaign has thrown out the old, failed playbook.
The obstacles are real when you’re challenging the conventional wisdom to do something new, but I’ve won statewide twice before and know what it takes to win this race too.
But it is going to take all of us. No candidate can win a race like this on their own, so my hope is you can answer the call at this important moment for our campaign.
So I need to ask you, please:
[**If you can afford it, please make a $3 donation to our campaign to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat. Every donation matters in a race as competitive as this one.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220717-1-ma&t=27&akid=1235%2E357359%2Eo-EoVk)
I’m grateful to everyone that’s taken this leap of faith with us. I am confident that we will accomplish incredible things when we win this race and expand our majority — together.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220717-1-ma&t=28&akid=1235%2E357359%2Eo-EoVk)**

**_Do not for a second think that Liz Cheney is alone in her fight for truth._**

Her commitment is the same one that we all bear some responsibility for... **the commitment to fight to do what is right. We must be able to look back at these days and say, in our time of testing, that we did our duty and that we stood for truth.**

Standing for truth is an American tradition. _It has afforded us the freedoms that other nations are not entitled to._

**_We must work as though everything depends upon us, because it does._**
**[Liz Cheney is a proven representative. More than that, she is a voice that our Republic depends on. This election is important. clean_body: Because it does. Because it does. | | Do not for a second think that Liz Cheney is alone in her fight for truth. Her commitment is the same one that we all bear some responsibility for... the commitment to fight to do what is right. We must be able to look back at these days and say, in our time of testing, that we did our duty and that we stood for truth. Standing for truth is an American tradition. It has afforded us the freedoms that other nations are not entitled to. America is exceptional. We are a good and a great nation. And our history teaches us that ordinary Americans in every generation have done extraordinary and heroic things. We must work as though everything depends upon us, because it does. Team Cheney Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming

name: Will Rollins
subject: Ken Calvert's homophobia comes back to haunt him.
body:
In his very first reelection campaign, Calvert ran homophobic mailers attacking his then opponent Rep. Mark Takano for being a gay man. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47960965/356335417/-707005773?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTA4ZjJmNS1mZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TERNWFoHJ9dLHhPQuP0JWA2AFhSy0xZ5UsjdL7fCG8Y=)
Peter,

My opponent Rep. Ken Calvert is seeking his 16th term in Congress -- making him the longest serving California Republican in Congress.

He’s made a name for himself over the years as a staunch opponent of LGTBQ rights. But now that he’s been redistricted into Palm Springs, he's trying to soften his radical, anti-LGBTQ record with voters in our district.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47960966/356335418/192312732?refcode=em-7.17.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTA4ZjJmNS1mZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TERNWFoHJ9dLHhPQuP0JWA2AFhSy0xZ5UsjdL7fCG8Y=)
**We're not falling for it: Calvert’s political career began with homophobia.**

In his very first reelection campaign, Ken Calvert sent out homophobic mailers attacking his then opponent Rep. Mark Takano for being a gay man.

His bright pink mailers asked voters if they _"knew the real Mark Takano..."_ and sounded the alarm about Takano's _"secret"_ homosexual agenda.

It wasn't long ago that being gay was literally a crime in some states, and as an openly gay candidate for Congress, I'm grateful for LGBTQ leaders like Rep. Mark Takano who paved the way for me to run for office today -- even if it meant enduring the hatred and homophobia of guys like Calvert.

**Times have changed, but Calvert's attacks on LGBTQ Americans have not.** He is still a staunch opponent of gay marriage. He voted against gay adoptions, voted down the Equality Act, and even voted to allow employers to fire employees simply for being LGBTQ. He also voted against the repeal of the military’s “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” policy which is personal for me because it discouraged me from serving my country after 9/11.

**[I can't think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with a gay American who will fight for equal rights. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll chip in a donation of $3 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47960967/356335419/192312732?refcode=em-7.17.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTA4ZjJmNS1mZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TERNWFoHJ9dLHhPQuP0JWA2AFhSy0xZ5UsjdL7fCG8Y=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ****[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47960968/356335420/192312732?refcode=em-7.17.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTA4ZjJmNS1mZDA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TERNWFoHJ9dLHhPQuP0JWA2AFhSy0xZ5UsjdL7fCG8Y=)****

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I would like to tell you a story, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek —

In a moment, [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220717_B1_Grandmother_S1_T1_SYA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1028%2E1862389%2EQLV04I ]I will ask you to donate to our campaign for One Georgia,
but first, I want to tell you a story. It’s a story my grandmother, Wilter
Abrams, told me about the first time she cast a ballot.

The year was 1968, and my grandmother, born and raised in Mississippi, was
eligible to vote in a presidential election for the first time. For so
many Black voters in the South, this chance to cast a ballot was the
culmination of centuries of struggle.

Outfitted in his Sunday best, my grandfather called out for her to finish
getting dressed and head to the precinct. But my grandmother hesitated.

I asked her why she faltered after such a long fight — after braving the
dogs, the hoses and the billy clubs. She told me, "I wasn’t afraid of the
right to vote — I was afraid of the power." She was most afraid that she
would finally be able to exercise this fundamental right — one that she
and so many others fought so hard for — and that nothing would change.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220717_B1_Grandmother_S1_T1_SYA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=1028%2E1862389%2EQLV04I ]Our voices have immense power,
Derek, and we can change our
future together. Will you contribute $5 today to help fund
a campaign determined to create a brighter future for Georgia?

My parents raised me to believe the right to vote is sacred and that you
work for it — and you work to ensure everyone else can too. But our
opponents would rather make it harder for Georgians to participate in our
democratic process than to lose control.

Despite her fears, my grandmother voted that day. She voted because of the
people — including my parents — who had sacrificed their liberty and, for
some, their lives, to secure the possibility. And she never missed an
election. My mission is to protect our right to vote so that our democracy
reflects the needs and ambitions of those it governs.

We have the power to build a better Georgia — for ourselves, for our
parents and grandparents, for our children and their children. But the
current governor is going to put obstacles in our path every step of the
way to stop that from happening.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220717_B1_Grandmother_S1_T1_SYA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=1028%2E1862389%2EQLV04I ]Derek, I am
fighting to make sure we remove the barriers people like my grandmother
and families all across Georgia face. Will you contribute
$5 now to our fight to open the gates of opportunity for
all Georgians?

If we get to work, we can change the future.

Thank you,

Stacey

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=1028%2E1862389%2EQLV04I ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1028%2E1862389%2EQLV04I

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Ditching the old playbook.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47947378/356294652/-1752180686?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGEyNDgxZC1kZTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbZCHDs3aNPgO2kzYDHKkC_UPS91403maEw5fmYEGaE=)
Peter,

It's been a non-stop few weeks on the campaign trail.

Our primary win last month was an incredible moment that I won't soon forget, though we didn't have much time to rest or celebrate. We're quickly refocusing on our general election campaign, and it's expected to be one of the most competitive in the country.

I'm embracing this new, fast pace, but it's important to hit pause from time to time and remind supporters (and myself) why I got in this race.

Earlier this week, I (finally) had the chance to sit down and get my hair cut. My barber was quick to tell me that many clients who I'd crossed paths with were thrilled that I'd won, and are now looking forward to voting for me in November.

Normally, a candidate might write this anecdote off as something that's nice to hear, but doesn't say much about real support. _"Just a few people at the Barbershop? Not exactly a district-wide poll... and it's not like any political 'bigwigs' come here."_

**But that's not how I view it, Peter. In fact, nothing signals momentum stronger than hearing that my personal interactions are making an impression.**

From the start, this campaign has been about building relationships and establishing trust with this community. We're ditching the “poll-tested” playbook that puts voters on spreadsheets. I think we need better, more personal communication with the people. That's what it's going to take to bridge the partisan divide on the issues, and it’s why I’m in this race.

**[If you think Congress can be a little more connected to the people they are supposed to represent, join me by chipping in a donation today. We have big goals for our General Election push, and every donation we receive right now will go a long way in winning this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47947379/356294653/-295409223?refcode=em-7.17.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGEyNDgxZC1kZTA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbZCHDs3aNPgO2kzYDHKkC_UPS91403maEw5fmYEGaE=)**

As always, thank you for your support,

\- Eric
\--
Eric Sorensen
Meteorologist | Candidate for Congress (IL-17)
309-306-1717

clean_body: | = Peter, It's been a non-stop few weeks on the campaign trail. Our primary win last month was an incredible moment that I won't soon forget, though we didn't have much time to rest or celebrate. We're quickly refocusing on our general election campaign, and it's expected to be one of the most competitive in the country. I'm embracing this new, fast pace, but it's important to hit pause from time to time and remind supporters (and myself) why I got in this race. Earlier this week, I (finally) had the chance to sit down and get my hair cut. My barber was quick to tell me that many clients who I'd crossed paths with were thrilled that I'd won, and are now looking forward to voting for me in November. Normally, a candidate might write this anecdote off as something that's nice to hear, but doesn't say much about real support. "Just a few people at the Barbershop? Not exactly a district-wide poll... and it's not like any political 'bigwigs' come here." But that's not how I view it, Peter. In fact, nothing signals momentum stronger than hearing that my personal interactions are making an impression. From the start, this campaign has been about building relationships and establishing trust with this community. We're ditching the “poll-tested” playbook that puts voters on spreadsheets. I think we need better, more personal communication with the people. That's what it's going to take to bridge the partisan divide on the issues, and it’s why I’m in this race. = As always, thank you for your support, \- Eric \-- Eric Sorensen Meteorologist | Candidate for Congress (IL-17) 309-306-1717 = | | = | Eric Sorensen is a former meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL running for U.S. Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. name: Nikki Haley
subject: What you need to know
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=9449de8438a34c028177d943371c5b94&_e=CZ5E4F0KdvrsBK4EyKc1N8ksRYCp5k91b7G63ciJEes7FjgkbBjV9BZUj3IcvYiQqqkvmHg8hMHxITbu5YGlxbDPrgG0_VLuz6s6tOsQ_fYWOaSxo1WIOX91rH1K-W4DoiRjcBtnVusFuNpMTN3DqG95_sNu8ZHmC3ODRyQ7pMhEczw9U6VZQcg0-EVuvdi5rXXWxhRjvUb-PL_WE9kKloeIQDFLWyJNPYwY07R0ddGhkRiltstQc9z1rixZH9qH959PhhCXlK6MxpN59uS_ABMA4ujqiufz9Nn448ovpqIwV4DyqkwzcjyuYMHvQMH0liJBP5SgqHD3GEtYi6jPOR0IHYnj4o-Iyhv6OplyIQQt9OfMbwGtN15eWp4ssv9PjJ5S2Dmdk5Z8t-3o0ZJC5HMGxklf3aZMz_3VjMuqolp9X583C7ibbjShf4YqadgB)
---
Friend,
---
I know how to win an election. My track record speaks for itself: I’ve never lost an election. I’ve won three for state legislature and two for governor — one against a 30-year incumbent. I also know it’s not easy. **To win, we have to start early and go full force until the finish line. ** Our battle to help strong Republican candidates win in November is a sprint AND a marathon, and it has only just begun. Every day from now until Election Day is crucial to retaking control of the House and the Senate. I knew we had to start early. That’s why I launched Stand For America PAC last year to endorse, train, advise, and financially support strong conservative candidates. We’ve endorsed more than 40 candidates so far, but our work is far from over. I’m traveling across the country right now, building an alliance of conservative leaders who will defend our Constitution and our American values. [**Every member of my team will play a crucial role in our path to winning in November. I need you, and I hope you will be a part of my team starting now.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=9449de8438a34c028177d943371c5b94&_e=CZ5E4F0KdvrsBK4EyKc1N8ksRYCp5k91b7G63ciJEes7FjgkbBjV9BZUj3IcvYiQqqkvmHg8hMHxITbu5YGlxbDPrgG0_VLuz6s6tOsQ_fYWOaSxo1WIOX91rH1K-W4DoiRjcBtnVusFuNpMTN3DqG95_sNu8ZHmC3ODRyQ7pMhEczw9U6VZQcg0-EVuvdi5rXXWxhRjvUb-PL_WE9kKlnilaD_wO316P1kh5Unz6BdRz6KWl4INCBx_ALkI9jA2aDb20Eq7L-Soci2-BBw1pyoejkfvZMsCldIIOsp0-6hTgsldNEe32rwEkATX1wnU-q6gz7RsZRSFpLz6dgWq4Xf7YJpTwwhdUzFbdMSuDFJRjvO4D72gSIuaneTZuSAQmzBdYmZYCWYa_gXPkdLahfwuH_hFDNsa6_IVsD-Zr-V7wGzxreWX_1UyjPONa9S4) We’re standing for you and Americans like you, friend. It would mean the world to know you’re on my side as we eradicate the liberals’ radical agenda in November. clean_body: | | | Friend, I know how to win an election. My track record speaks for itself: I’ve never lost an election. I’ve won three for state legislature and two for governor — one against a 30-year incumbent. I also know it’s not easy. To win, we have to start early and go full force until the finish line. Our battle to help strong Republican candidates win in November is a sprint AND a marathon, and it has only just begun. Every day from now until Election Day is crucial to retaking control of the House and the Senate. I knew we had to start early. That’s why I launched Stand For America PAC last year to endorse, train, advise, and financially support strong conservative candidates. We’ve endorsed more than 40 candidates so far, but our work is far from over. I’m traveling across the country right now, building an alliance of conservative leaders who will defend our Constitution and our American values. We’re standing for you and Americans like you, friend. It would mean the world to know you’re on my side as we eradicate the liberals’ radical agenda in November. This year, I’m standing with conservatives across the country, campaigning everywhere from Iowa to Texas to North Carolina and more. We’ll need your help in this next election. When I left my role as UN ambassador, I promised to never stop standing for America. I always have, and I always will. You can help me continue to fulfill my promise and fuel a red wave of conservative wins in November. I know it won’t be easy, but I know how to get it done. So, if you’re able to send any amount today, I would be incredibly grateful. I would be lucky to have you on my team. My very best, Nikki Haley | | | A Note From Nikki: Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. name: Carson Coates
subject: A big endorsement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Reagan Dunn for
body:
The News Tribune Editorial Board knows what we know, Reagan is
the candidate best positioned to take on Kim Schrier in the
General Election. We received a big endorsement this morning from
the editorial board of The News Tribune in Tacoma.

Team -

We received a big endorsement
this morning from the editorial board of Tacoma News Tribune, the
second largest newspaper in the state.

The TNT Editorial Board knows
what we know, Reagan is the candidate best positioned to take on
Kim Schrier in the General Election.

By now, most voters have received
their ballots and have started voting. But we still need to reach
undecided voters and let them know that Reagan is the ONLY
candidate to ever beat Kim Schrier in a publicly released poll.

Will you help us harness this momentum by chipping in $25 or more
to help us reach more voters with our message of returning to
fiscal responsibility, supporting law enforcement, and unleashing
America's energy independence?

Thank you for your continued
support!

Carson

DONATE TODAY

To contribute by personal check,
please make checks payable to "Reagan Dunn for Congress" and send
to: Reagan Dunn for Congress - PO Box 1390 - Issaquah, WA 98027

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If we got your name or any information wrong, we apologize. To
update and correct your information, click here. If you would
like to unsubscribe, click here.

Thank you for supporting Reagan
Dunn's campaign for Congress.
Paid for by Reagan Dunn for
Congress

Folks,

Let me be the first to wish you and your family a **Happy National Ice Cream Day!**
[ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=8a2ffcad64494e7eb8d862c0e3adb207&_e=MOTiqFBjonZabQSg4HjzYsJCvokHJwGoa3sgQHnO9fv04nKSInwWuBGKgAAnzCOva5sSQzGQA4OFZwE3voXGNbOgKe2RI4LMRbYL4BFYBhdEAI5NfcIPnDnuQ5riIRh3wrFUoELztMq9MAm-ymQpONlPVF4XwjRidL65VyXnnmXqtzMaxUb45x0U9scNEsznJazKf9WMwWgbK9oUdC95RJvcVSh_UeUD4rFIw7AlbG2a-JQpfKCdSW9SozHr-w61Q31Z217-V9at8yWf0Y0hnQ5fw_8BARGHJ-CWv6ivqKsU7ozFkcGoAeWbouIOvHZag1BpIlSM_fu0agy_Guhls_RUDBJIs-nF-C90xk6DLsaoUhyBqkgUlXSVfOAPbxft0WDcGEYwZOezG3I6A82FPPoRN-Bc0ZIvt1f-OVtNC6jeYMEwqxr-8wtg1JEKUiIg26N3Dk5UCPYpA9fTr3vzVOy9nYYLryvldMgAS72FKNlO0HHp-Ffy78q6_u2N1wvsJMldvzh52bqcxvF4Lgi32Q%3D%3D)
I wake up every morning at 4 a.m. to get my 2-mile run in before I get to the office at 6 a.m. Staying in shape also has the added benefit of enjoying a scoop of ice cream as often as possible. But this year, I’ve had to cut back because the price of ice cream has increased by 10% since President Biden got in office.

**That’s right – ice cream costs are rising even higher than the 40-year high national inflation rate of 9.1%.**

clean_body: Happy National Ice Cream Day! | Folks, Let me be the first to wish you and your family a Happy National Ice Cream Day! I wake up every morning at 4 a.m. to get my 2-mile run in before I get to the office at 6 a.m. Staying in shape also has the added benefit of enjoying a scoop of ice cream as often as possible. But this year, I’ve had to cut back because the price of ice cream has increased by 10% since President Biden got in office. That’s right – ice cream costs are rising even higher than the 40-year high national inflation rate of 9.1%. | We’ve got to stop the Democrats’ reckless spending spree and War on Energy that’s driving up costs, from ice cream to gas prices. Keep in touch, Chuck Ernest Grassley Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. Copyright © 2022 The Grassley Committee, All rights reserved.

name: Yoni Landau, Movement Labs
subject: We used testing to take the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rapid Resist Action
body:
See the image we sent to a quarter million voters

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47961426/356337966/-616942871?refcode=EM_FR_MLWelcomeSeriesC3_N_ML_SeriesC_8_N_N_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzczYzJjYy0wMjA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AriBIbQut6QsVTELwyHIoOUiHLBks1dJNsLgvRvYGq8=)
Team, I’ll admit, I am obsessed with experimenting and testing all possibilities in the pursuit of driving the progressive movement forward. As “making an impact” increasingly becomes trendy nomenclature, I am even more obsessed with centering sophisticated tools and practices to measure our impact.
There is a reliable way to know if you're making an impact - through Randomized Control Trials (RCTs). This method divides people into two groups whose only difference is the testing, which can be a variety of experiments, i.e., a series of texts, door-knocking, or a vaccine trial. It’s the same process scientists use to know if medicine is safe and effective.
Movement Labs uses Randomized Control Trials regularly, including when we helped flip the Georgia Senate seats in 2020. How? We sent a picture of Kelly Loeffler campaigning with a neo-Nazi to a random sample of persuadable voters. Guess what we saw after we surveyed that same group and a group of their peers? **The image shifted people’s votes.** Our trial worked, and since we knew that it didn’t provoke a backlash, we scaled the program and sent the image to a quarter-million voters the night before the election - about 3 times more than the amount of votes we ended up winning by.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47961427/356337978/-616942871?refcode=EM_FR_MLWelcomeSeriesC3_N_ML_SeriesC_8_N_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzczYzJjYy0wMjA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AriBIbQut6QsVTELwyHIoOUiHLBks1dJNsLgvRvYGq8=)

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqgehnf4d53nk52faoqt6596kntj5kfpf5efibkg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u1o74obiegobaobncaob6dthc6pm1pr16hqefc3kecp37c30stim4c37clj6ao37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shgcpq6ed9icup36phh62p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c3g61ob1cphm49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkc1ia890igq0por6afbr89ivlc417qk5imu116g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1ge2ob6cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpl56phuh29bgq0fr6hjueo2jb26gq92tiagntco_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1ge2ob6cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc1i3qggr4v7b7ve4opsvggourc349hklecf5sk0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1ge2ob6cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2z7qavpf72n72i5ehpl4hoir007ko8l65b6pj9oe8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs1t05k3b7qog5o78ioe8j4ss6i19957l1la4gcg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c3g61ob1cphm49fg)

body:
Experts are calling my seat one of the most likely to flip
| | |

Team, if you donate to just one campaign today, it should be this one. Let me explain: **To be blunt, if we lose in New Hampshire, we’ll lose the Senate – and Mitch McConnell could move to ban abortion nationwide.**
Experts are calling my seat one of the most likely to flip, and the GOP is spending millions against me to ensure I lose.
**[**Please, will you make a donation to my campaign? The future of the Senate comes down to this race, and this race comes down to grassroots supporters like you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47961964/356339737/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1301-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWJmZjA1Ni0wMzA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FAxSyAr4VAdz8Z2WPH4epG9FoI4mpm7uTY2XILOto_s=)**

body:
Freedom

| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=e492196181564f6e9999639f0177635a&_e=7P0og-mh-v-LAvwbuQW3AhsEzbaUe_4G57oI0i7VXDeWmERLIlTy1bFYv5FTStX5d_SkNDgPQ5BQUa1OS-_twfnU8enNu5kzuIEz3UmS-cUpeAMdYZwz4tDRuEM4WfRYoEy68N_NlFmqNVqxD7StEPbWHImEHYA-FFjIVn6MKrO-U7gCsQZugZLnrJGskxkCrVkt8h6cRav-e6N8j-p-vzeBTh8py18X41MgYrOMDZoQL_PQvSQkiehwiUB34QClImNvs0JERl7xDHhaQd7GrUOavFL-LmAcmCSW6wQyXHqb1xRPXX3gx9Aej4NA00GOujPtDM8rZEs_7S4NK-kHciZENSLFn_hqYMGYmujmF_tzmQzCRxfwO77msQJhpK4G0H1vit3G4RwPVixchZCFTshxJ2OUEWZ_Hhsr1ouKLNvqhueQGXyE9D-vkSz49-S0a6Cc6fwqJRERzpuXyNGEbRCC8AJ_aC5u2G8pvHLrG49r6ZdOI4-UBCOjYcg6zOP9kn2cCmDMJ68Vn98htYsVBQ%3D%3D)
---

**Friend!** **_What’s on the ballot this November?_**

Freedom vs. Socialism.

Law and Order vs. Lawlessness.

A lower cost of living vs. Record Inflation.
_**To put it simply - our Country cannot afford another two years of the Biden-Spanberger agenda.**_

I’m running for Congress not because I want the fancy title, lapel pin, or screentime from Washington, but because I live to serve. I have served my community for years, I serve my family, and I want to serve the American people - specifically, those here at home in VA-07.

clean_body: Freedom | Friend! What’s on the ballot this November? Freedom vs. Socialism. Law and Order vs. Lawlessness. A lower cost of living vs. Record Inflation. To put it simply - our Country cannot afford another two years of the Biden-Spanberger agenda. I’m running for Congress not because I want the fancy title, lapel pin, or screentime from Washington, but because I live to serve. I have served my community for years, I serve my family, and I want to serve the American people - specifically, those here at home in VA-07. Please remind your friends, neighbors, and loved ones just how important it is that we ALL turn out and vote this November. The election may be a few months away, but we need your help NOW. Following the news can be difficult and confusing, but it’s important to understand the _stark_ differences between the candidates for Florida governor. Today, we’re cutting through the noise to spell out what makes Charlie Crist so unlike Ron DeSantis.
[_If you already know what Charlie Crist stands for and want to contribute to his campaign, you can click here._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47962102/356340474/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220717_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTg3OTI3NC0wNTA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW4VI31E3x9v6O8qc4pogOwe0cAcFtW4TJY6N8B-Qc4=)

How are Ron and Charlie different? Let us count the ways ...
❌ Ron is in court trying to force extreme abortion restrictions on Florida women.

✅ Charlie believes in a woman’s right to choose and has pledged to protect reproductive freedoms with an executive order on his first day as governor.

❌ Ron is a loyal servant of the gun lobby — which is why he’s weakened gun safety laws and vowed to ban background checks on gun sales.

✅ Charlie believes in common-sense gun safety reforms — he’ll ban the sale of assault weapons, enforce gun laws, and fight for a safer Florida.

❌ Ron attacks companies and organizations that dare to disagree with his hateful and discriminatory policies — like he did to Disney and even _the Special Olympics_ ...

✅ Charlie will be a unifying leader who believes in following the Golden Rule. _Charlie’s running for governor again to bring those shared values back to Tallahassee!_
The contrast this year could not be clearer: a tried and tested leader who is trusted by Floridians vs. a divisive governor who repeatedly attacks Florida’s people and institutions.

Charlie Crist is the clear choice for Florida governor, but Ron DeSantis has powerful special interests on his side. **That’s why Charlie needs overwhelming grassroots support to win this November.** [_Can we count on you to chip in $10 or more today to elect Charlie and send Ron packing?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47962104/356340476/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220717_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTg3OTI3NC0wNTA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW4VI31E3x9v6O8qc4pogOwe0cAcFtW4TJY6N8B-Qc4=)

Let us count the ways ... ❌ Ron is in court trying to force extreme abortion restrictions on Florida women. ✅ Charlie believes in a woman’s right to choose and has pledged to protect reproductive freedoms with an executive order on his first day as governor. ❌ Ron is a loyal servant of the gun lobby — which is why he’s weakened gun safety laws and vowed to ban background checks on gun sales. ✅ Charlie believes in common-sense gun safety reforms — he’ll ban the sale of assault weapons, enforce gun laws, and fight for a safer Florida. ❌ Ron attacks companies and organizations that dare to disagree with his hateful and discriminatory policies — like he did to Disney and even the Special Olympics ... ✅ Charlie will be a unifying leader who believes in following the Golden Rule. Charlie’s running for governor again to bring those shared values back to Tallahassee! The contrast this year could not be clearer: a tried and tested leader who is trusted by Floridians vs. a divisive governor who repeatedly attacks Florida’s people and institutions. Charlie Crist is the clear choice for Florida governor, but Ron DeSantis has powerful special interests on his side. That’s why Charlie needs overwhelming grassroots support to win this November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Team Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

WHEW. I just took a look at our weekly fundraising numbers and it’s not
looking good.

We’re at a pivotal moment in our race that will decide Senate control—and
this is literally the worst moment to fall behind.

I think we’ve been doing a pretty good job at letting you know about all
of the good news coming out of our campaign: We’ve been upgraded to a
toss-up, we’re ahead in the polls, and we have a winning strategy to reach
out to voters.

BUT, none of that matters if we don’t have the resources to compete with
the $80 million national Republicans are spending to stop me from flipping
Ohio blue and expanding our majority in the Senate.

That’s why I’m personally reaching out. You’ve always got my back
and I could REALLY use your help today. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17170?t=1008&amount=25&akid=4641%2E3611125%2EzFtGdt ]Will you chip in
$25 ASAP
to get our digital fundraising back on track? We're up river without a
paddle if we don’t get out of this hole and FAST.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17170?t=1009&amount=25&akid=4641%2E3611125%2EzFtGdt ]RUSH A DONATION

Counting on you!

—Tim Ryan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben=20Smilowitz?=
subject: My Campaign is Running out of Time! Help Now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
body:
I need you now! | | | |
---
|
---
| | | **Dear Peter,** I know that I've been emailing you a lot recently, but my election is now just *2* days away. **I'm running out of time.** We are _still_ reaching out to _thousands_ of voters every day.

**_We need to raise at least $2,500 more *today* - can you please help us reach that goal?_** **[Can you](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=7e86b73b63&e=0faa9de128)[donate today to help my campaign with our final push? $25, $50, $100, $250, or whatever you can spare could make all the difference.](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=08104301f9&e=0faa9de128) ** You've been so helpful already, and I know you're busy - so I'll keep this short.

When voters hear about the difference between Rep. David Trone and me, they vote for me. I've heard that from countless voters all over the district. **We have a real chance to replace a big-money self-serving Rep. with a genuine public-interest Democrat in this election. **

**[I know I've asked this a lot lately, but please - if you can - donate to my campaign now.](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=9fa274f022&e=0faa9de128)[ I'm not even asking for me. I'm asking for our kids and for the generations to come. We need real leadership and we need it now _._](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=9894b4c100&e=0faa9de128)**

My focus in Congress will be advancing the well-being of people and putting the _people_ of Western Maryland first, above Big-Money politics and special interests.

Ironically, my opponent talks about his freedom of "special interests." Yet he fails to mention his own (literal) elephant in room - he owns a multi-billion dollar business _while_ serving in Congress. _He is the special interest._

Thank you for everything you do. **Please help me now if you can. This is it.**

Sincerely,
Ben
---
| | | | Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
---
| **Our mailing address is:**
Ben Smilowitz for CongressPO Box 275Gaithersburg, MD 20884-0275
[Add us to your address book](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=53b29d50cc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=53b29d50cc).

---

body:
The Radical Left has collected over 1,000,000 signatures to impeach Justice Clarence Thomas.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm9gnlspl08nga0nsgqf0gqp5bdppjuajak3uad0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpj8ddic8pn6o9kmmpr2tlge6rrapdgehhmdchimeqb4ppmmqp3cddgmmpn2odnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rjac37mtj6cd70mdh6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clge0o73c9h62oh5u)
The Radical Left has collected over 1,000,000 signatures to impeach Justice Clarence Thomas.

|
---
| | | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhuqteas3iggf4ml8huu2ls4stb9sk0e4ajfgipg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0s1ge6oj2c5h2bs)
---
_**-The Hill**_
Did you hear the news?!? The Radical Left has already collected over 1,000,000 signatures to impeach Justice Clarence Thomas.

_**With this act, they are declaring war on the sanctity of the Supreme Court. **_

I spent 24 years serving this great nation. name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: Please read a personal message.
body:
In case you didn’t already know, our race for Governor in the state of Nevada this year is quickly becoming one of the most closely watched in the entire country this year...
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Peter,
In case you didn't already know, our race for Governor in the state of Nevada this year is quickly becoming one of the most closely watched in the entire country this year...
And according to the polls, it's also one of the most competitive as well. Our campaign is neck-and-neck with Steve Sisolak, even with all of the millions he's been receiving from national Democrat groups. Every little thing is going to make a difference in a race this close.
Still not convinced of how important our work is? Well then here's something else to keep in mind...
The outcome of this election is going to have ripple effects in the state of Nevada for decades to come. Whether we turn our economy around, fix our education system, stop pro-criminal policies from bringing lawlessness to our state... It all depends on what we do over the course of the next 3 and a half months.
So while campaigning all across the state on top of fulfilling my duties as Sheriff hasn't left me much time, I felt it was important to send you a personal note given how crucial this race is to our state's future.
If you don't know why I'm so focused on Keeping Nevada Safe, allow me to quickly share my background:
I've been serving my community for over 30 years now as a law enforcement officer. Before that, I served my country in the United States Army and National Guard.
Protecting those I serve is what I know best. So as soon as I realized that this leadership was desperately needed in Carson City - after Sisolak turned his back on small businesses with his failed COVID response and enacted policies that made it harder for us in law enforcement to even do our jobs \- I didn't sit around and wait.
I decided to serve the communities I love once again by running for Governor myself.
But here's the thing - this is a mission I know I can't do alone. I'm going to need an entire team of dedicated supporters by my side to clean up Sisolak's mess and Keep Nevada Safe.
So Peter, if you can see what's at stake and want to help WIN this close race, protect our communities, end single-party rule in Carson City, and get our state turned around, [can I count on you to support that mission with a campaign contribution of ANY amount today? >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eOPLC96K7hPVtQDo64YdiYMvqDo3E8W_EqA2SScj_d2W_O_zhjPveAsuu6pdxnmbABl7C5iiZnHd2ZAwvNCsDPp_pVXfhhLPHsm7IELKsVOpBsYFvCUKuYUio-EFAs-VbHwl3UVg6MPiNhT4gqvmoDQVo6sF922XF-RgTrwGuTFp8t650JuF4HHdsP2A9i_OQCBngkSLC1VJo0Vl_CKyBFuHBOAjptoZ&c=2yF6HaR0emthWoEVgOh0vEoiA7kjfxCDr0eDEXQO6lD1E-YwSPE0Tg==&ch=HZzz-Ip4xSAyRyplAbn_j4VR3WwkCcKMHF3GCVC2Fte6xEX7hfOAHw==)
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eOPLC96K7hPVtQDo64YdiYMvqDo3E8W_EqA2SScj_d2W_O_zhjPveAsuu6pdxnmbABl7C5iiZnHd2ZAwvNCsDPp_pVXfhhLPHsm7IELKsVOpBsYFvCUKuYUio-EFAs-VbHwl3UVg6MPiNhT4gqvmoDQVo6sF922XF-RgTrwGuTFp8t650JuF4HHdsP2A9i_OQCBngkSLC1VJo0Vl_CKyBFuHBOAjptoZ&c=2yF6HaR0emthWoEVgOh0vEoiA7kjfxCDr0eDEXQO6lD1E-YwSPE0Tg==&ch=HZzz-Ip4xSAyRyplAbn_j4VR3WwkCcKMHF3GCVC2Fte6xEX7hfOAHw==)
---
| Thank you for this critical support. It doesn't just mean a lot to me personally - it's also going to make a big difference for the future of Nevada and America!
-Sheriff Joe Lombardo
---

Before that, I served my country in the United States Army and National Guard. Protecting those I serve is what I know best. So as soon as I realized that this leadership was desperately needed in Carson City - after Sisolak turned his back on small businesses with his failed COVID response and enacted policies that made it harder for us in law enforcement to even do our jobs \- I didn't sit around and wait. I decided to serve the communities I love once again by running for Governor myself. But here's the thing - this is a mission I know I can't do alone. I'm going to need an entire team of dedicated supporters by my side to clean up Sisolak's mess and Keep Nevada Safe. So Peter, if you can see what's at stake and want to help WIN this close race, protect our communities, end single-party rule in Carson City, and get our state turned around, == | | | == | Thank you for this critical support. It doesn't just mean a lot to me personally - it's also going to make a big difference for the future of Nevada and America! -Sheriff Joe Lombardo | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | Lombardo for Nevada | P.O. Box 371176, Las Vegas, NV 89137 | | Sent by mailto:info@joelombardofornv.com

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: huge news
body:
Derek, this is huge: Recent polling shows me statistically tied with my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, right here in Georgia.
But with the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, I can't surge ahead and defend this critical seat without your immediate grassroots support. That's why I'm urgently asking: Will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and CommonGood to win in Georgia and keep the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220717_CGVA_Warnock]
I was getting worried, friend. After CNN named me the most vulnerable Democratic senator on the ballot, the GOP started coming after me as its top target for defeat. They poured over $16 MILLION into Walker's campaign – then polls showed me 1 point down. But now, with the general election officially underway, we've got the wind at our backs.
Experts at FiveThirtyEight say that our race could decide Senate control, so there's absolutely zero room for error. That's why we need to meet our midnight fundraising deadline – so we can take FULL advantage of this moment, keep up our momentum, and win – but we're falling dangerously short, and I need your help.
Please, Derek, will you split an urgent donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and CommonGood so we can pull ahead, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220717_CGVA_Warnock]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220717_CGVA_Warnock&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220717_CGVA_Warnock&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220717_CGVA_Warnock&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220717_CGVA_Warnock&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220717_CGVA_Warnock&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220717_CGVA_Warnock]
Your support is what fuels our people-powered movement forward. Thank you so much.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

Common Good Virginia

Arlington, VA 22215

clean_body: win seats, flip chambers, and protect our majorities | Friend, we'll get straight to the point: | = If we’re going to preserve not only our democracy, but also abortion rights, LGBTQ rights, and progress on every important issue facing the country right now, we have to do everything possible to build political power everywhere we can — which is why we’re targeting key races in 17 states this November. But friend, we wouldn’t be able to execute any part of our multi-pronged strategy without the support of people like you. Will you pitch in $10 or more right now to help us keep up our work all over the country? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. ** | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

subject: Do you support CONSERVATIVE health and parental rights?
body:
Join us at OKHPR.com! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b70576ec4b8f/do-you-support-health-and-parental-rights-13359504?e=91b640d118)
---
| |
---
| |
# Hi Peter!
We wanted to reach out and invite you to join our mission at Oklahomans for Health and Parental Rights!
---
| OKHPR is the fastest growing political action committee in Oklahoma. We were founded in 2015 by a group of mothers who were fighting to protect our children from government overreach. Since then we have grown tremendously and now seek to educate Oklahoma citizens on parental rights, health choice, health privacy and informed consent. We promote advocacy for the protection and strengthening of these fundamental rights for all Oklahoma citizens.

We are everyday Oklahomans united in this mission. Doctors, nurses, policy makers, teachers, counselors, service men and women, therapists, business leaders and more... all parents advocating to protect fundamental liberties. Our vision is for a healthier Oklahoma as we face the highest rates of chronic illness and neurological disorders that both our state and nation have ever seen.

If you agree with our mission, _**WE NEED YOU TO JOIN AS A FREE OKHPR MEMBER!**_

**Our parental rights are under attack. Oklahoma has many upcoming elections which will have a huge impact on our rights.**

Benefits of free membership:
* First look at the OKHPR Freedom Fighter Voting Guide
* List of parental rights friendly doctors
* Access to exclusive OKHPR members Facebook group
* Support for employees who are facing medical mandates
* Trained Senate District captains in your local area to connect local members and lead members in political advocacy
* Weekly Roar Release newsletters to alert you to important parental rights news

---
| [Become a Free OKHPR Member!](https://okhpr.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=115df097586f067cff0fd3aa0&id=b143cc5c63&e=91b640d118 "Become a Free OKHPR Member!")
---
|
---
| **Once you become a member, make sure to do these final things!**
* Sign up for text alerts by texting 405-251-8915
* Join our [Facebook group ](https://okhpr.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=115df097586f067cff0fd3aa0&id=95c4be6f68&e=91b640d118)for official members only (please fill out all the entry questions to speed up the approval process)
* Follow our [Facebook page](https://okhpr.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=115df097586f067cff0fd3aa0&id=96ba3c39a3&e=91b640d118) for updates
* Follow our [Instagram](https://okhpr.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=115df097586f067cff0fd3aa0&id=d1ff88adde&e=91b640d118), [T](https://okhpr.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=115df097586f067cff0fd3aa0&id=73cbc57ccb&e=91b640d118)[witter](https://okhpr.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=115df097586f067cff0fd3aa0&id=fd9d5f4bbf&e=91b640d118), or [MeWe](https://okhpr.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=115df097586f067cff0fd3aa0&id=80f6d0e9f0&e=91b640d118)

**Welcome to the Miyares Roundup!** ** Attorney General Miyares had another packed week fighting for Virginians. Check out this week’s highlights...**
---
| | **Loudoun Investigation Ruling** On Monday, our office had a HUGE win. Judge Plowman ruled that the grand jury investigation of the Loudoun County Public Schools’ handling of two sexual assaults can move forward, despite a legal challenge from the county school board. Why? Because the school board isn’t above the law.

Check out this week’s highlights... | | Loudoun Investigation Ruling On Monday, our office had a HUGE win. Judge Plowman ruled that the grand jury investigation of the Loudoun County Public Schools’ handling of two sexual assaults can move forward, despite a legal challenge from the county school board. clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Due to this alarming development, we need to find out if our Pennsylvania supporters still approve of President Joe Biden. | | | | [This tracking poll is registered to and is due within [24 HOURS]. Once you’ve opened this email, your participation has already started. Please respond now]() President Biden’s approval rating is tanking at the worst time. Despite countless attacks from Republicans, President Biden proven that he’s committed to: – Supporting Medicare – Protecting abortion rights – Solving America’s gun crisis – and so much more... We’re polling top Democrats in Pennsylvania to better understand how Democrats feel about the job Joe Biden has done as President. | | | Thanks for responding, Team Ruiz The Independent: “Biden’s approval poll sinks below Trump” | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Exciting update to share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
This is an incredible feat, but we can’t slow down
#
We just announced our fundraising numbers. So did Greg Abbott.
**We’re excited to share that we OUTRAISED Greg Abbott — and just set a new record for the most money raised in a single reporting period by a state-level candidate**** _in Texas history_****.**
**February 20 - June 30** | **Amount Raised** | **Contributions**
---|---|---
Beto O'Rourke | $27.6 million | More Than 511,000
Greg Abbott | $24.9 million | Nearly 113,000
This unprecedented grassroots fundraising happened because of you and your fellow supporters. We raised this money from over half a million different contributions — more than quadruple the number of contributions to Abbott. And more than 98.9% came in online, to emails just like this one.
Our grassroots donors have finally outpaced Abbott’s corporate mega-donors — right as new polls show his lead shrinking to just 5 points (a 10-point drop) and a growing majority of Texans say they disapprove of the direction Texas is heading in under his failed leadership.
**More than ever, it is clear that we have the momentum to defeat Greg Abbott.** But his fundraising is right on our tail, and his campaign has a war chest of funds. _We know for a fact that he plans to spend over $100 million against Beto before Election Day._
It’s absolutely critical that we don’t slow down. We can’t afford to.
**[Will you chip in $3 right now to help us keep the pace, continue our momentum, and defeat Greg Abbott in Texas? We have less than four months until Election Day, and we have to win.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220717-1.U_Vj1H&refcode=ema20220717-198568&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=198568%2E444211%2E1BHhKq)**
**[Donate Now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220717-1.U_Vj1H&refcode=ema20220717-198568&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=198568%2E444211%2E1BHhKq)**
It’s so important to us that you know how we’re using the record-breaking amount of money that supporters like you have generously contributed to our campaign.
First and foremost, these resources go toward the powerful work of our organizers and more than 78,000 volunteers — a historic number of folks giving their time and energy to a campaign to make change in Texas.
In June alone, we knocked more than 105,500 doors and made more than one million calls to Texans. These numbers will only increase as we move closer to Election Day.
Alongside our organizers and volunteers, Beto is days away from hitting the road for a 49-day, 5,600 mile Drive for Texas to visit over 70 communities across the state.
We’re ensuring that Republicans, Democrats, and Independents alike understand what we’re working toward: creating great jobs, investing in world-class schools, expanding health care so more people can see a doctor and lowering costs so families can afford to live in this state. We’re ensuring people know that our vision couldn’t be farther from Abbott’s dangerous and extreme positions on abortion and gun safety.
At the end of the day, one thing is clear as we outraise Abbott, close the gap in the polls, and expand our organizing across Texas: **There are more of us than Abbott’s special interest mega-donors.**
**[Abbott will try his best to outspend us, but we’re on our way to closing the gap. Please, if you can, add your first donation to help us defeat Abbott. We must keep up our momentum all the way to Election Day.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220717-1.U_Vj1H&refcode=ema20220717-198568&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=198568%2E444211%2E1BHhKq)**
Thanks for all you do,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220717-198568-footer&t=22&refcode2=198568_444211_1BHhKq&akid=198568%2E444211%2E1BHhKq)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=198568%2E444211%2E1BHhKq)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=198568%2E444211%2E1BHhKq)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

Thanks for all you do, Team Beto Email us: info@betofortexas.com

name: Team Durbin
subject: One Minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
This is a short email with an enormous impact:
#
Peter, this email will only take one minute for you to read. But this short email is an opportunity for you to make an enormous impact in the fight for control of the U.S. Senate.
Republicans are working overtime to install Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader in November. It’s up to us to stop them and ensure they can’t drag us backward with their extreme agenda.
**[We’re just a little bit short of reaching Senator Durbin’s $15,000 goal before midnight. body:
Peter, this is important.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47962995/356347483/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2JlZjMzYi0wZjA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kiefD8K7TO7lyt5do04jKsA6RZEGsyR9RR1B9yVjNhA=)
---
Peter, will you take a moment to read this longer (but important) email on an extremely personal topic?

Since COVID-19 began, I’ve been heartbroken to see unprecedented levels of violence against Asian and Asian-American people across our country. And it’s getting worse: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47962996/356347484/452722638?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220717_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2JlZjMzYi0wZjA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kiefD8K7TO7lyt5do04jKsA6RZEGsyR9RR1B9yVjNhA=) **It’s why I proudly led the fight to pass the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act which will help document and fight anti-Asian hate crimes.**

[**I won't stop fighting bigotry and racism. But I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in $3 to help me stay in Congress so I can fight for Asian and Asian-American justice in Washington? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47962997/356347485/452722638?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220717_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2JlZjMzYi0wZjA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kiefD8K7TO7lyt5do04jKsA6RZEGsyR9RR1B9yVjNhA=) | [500 DONATION GOAL: CHIP IN $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47962998/356347486/452722638?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220717_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2JlZjMzYi0wZjA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kiefD8K7TO7lyt5do04jKsA6RZEGsyR9RR1B9yVjNhA=)
---
Peter, this fight is personal to me and my family.

During World War II, 120,000 Japanese-Americans were unjustly forced into internment camps -- including my grandparents and parents. Our family still bears the scars of that dark time in our nation’s history.

Today, we see anti-Asian discrimination in different forms. Elderly grandparents, young people, even spa workers have become tragic victims of anti-Asian discrimination.

_I refuse to become blind or complacent to these injustices._

**I’m working to end anti-Asian hatred and discrimination in all its forms.** We can’t ignore the ugly history of anti-Asian racism in our country. We must speak out against injustice and demand protection for ALL marginalized communities.

I just hope you’ll join me...

[**So Peter, I need to ask again: Will you chip in just $3 to help me fight against anti-Asian hate? With your help today, I know we can make a real difference »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47962999/356347487/452722638?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220717_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2JlZjMzYi0wZjA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kiefD8K7TO7lyt5do04jKsA6RZEGsyR9RR1B9yVjNhA=)

clean_body: Peter, this is important. | = Peter, will you take a moment to read this longer (but important) email on an extremely personal topic? Since COVID-19 began, I’ve been heartbroken to see unprecedented levels of violence against Asian and Asian-American people across our country. And it’s getting worse: = It’s why I proudly led the fight to pass the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act which will help document and fight anti-Asian hate crimes. = | = Peter, this fight is personal to me and my family. During World War II, 120,000 Japanese-Americans were unjustly forced into internment camps -- including my grandparents and parents. Our family still bears the scars of that dark time in our nation’s history. Today, we see anti-Asian discrimination in different forms. Elderly grandparents, young people, even spa workers have become tragic victims of anti-Asian discrimination. I refuse to become blind or complacent to these injustices. I’m working to end anti-Asian hatred and discrimination in all its forms. We can’t ignore the ugly history of anti-Asian racism in our country. We must speak out against injustice and demand protection for ALL marginalized communities. I just hope you’ll join me... = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you. \-- Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Peter,
I know you're probably tired of getting emails talking about "goals" and "deadlines," but these benchmarks are critical to ensuring our fundraising is on track to keep our campaign going. And this weekend’s mid-month deadline is a doozie. Here's why:

office
has
been
the
only

of
defense
against

to

and

and

the
progress
we've
made.

won

just

last

clean_body: [] Peter, I know you're probably tired of getting emails talking about "goals" and "deadlines," but these benchmarks are critical to ensuring our fundraising is on track to keep our campaign going. And this weekend’s mid-month deadline is a doozie. Here's why: The Governor's office has been the only line of defense against radical GOP efforts to defund education, restrict voting and civil rights, and undo the progress we've made. We won the governor's office by just 1.1% last time. Losing this year means ceding complete control of critical issues to Republicans. I am the only pro-choice woman running for Lieutenant Governor and I'm fighting like hell against the GOP's plans to criminalize abortion and even attack access to contraception. * Republicans and dark money special interest groups are already dumping millions into attack ads in Wisconsin, and we need to be able to set the record straight. In a swing state like Wisconsin, our ability to defend against radical attacks and win depends on meeting every single goal we set. Because falling behind will mean the difference between a red and blue state. That's why I'm reaching out to ask: Can you chip in $3 – or whatever you can afford – before our mid-month deadline expires this weekend? name: Charles Booker HQ
subject: How we’re going to win this race:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Rand is scared,
Peter.

Ever since Charles became the first Black Kentuckian to win the Democratic
primary, Rand knows that his seat has never been so vulnerable and that
our progressive movement is rising.

More Kentuckians than ever before recognize the fact that we deserve
better and we have the power to change that. If we keep growing this
momentum, we can replace Rand with a leader who’s boldly fighting for
people-first solutions like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal.

Charles may not be the favorite choice of the establishment or the
powerful groups that control D.C. — but he’s by far the favorite choice of
the people and that’s what matters.

That’s why we’re reaching out to ask: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/sign/personal-endorsement-2022-july/?source=em20220608&t=1001&akid=2238%2E346206%2E_h5oaJ ]Will you add your name right now
and give your personal endorsement for Charles? People power is how we’re
going to win this race and it’s critical we show our support now for the
bold, progressive movement we’re building.

ENDORSE OUR CAMPAIGN →

Some pundits think Kentucky is not winnable.

We call BS. We are building the largest grassroots movement this state has
ever seen, and we will make history in November.

Everywhere you go, folks agree on the same thing: it’s time for change.

We deserve a health care system that looks at us like human beings, and
not potential profits.

We deserve leaders who care more about saving lives than pleasing their
friends in the gun lobby.

We deserve Senators who prioritize our interests and needs, not their own
political agendas.

From our recent primary win, to the historic victories that were made
across the south in 2020 — there’s evidence all around us that we can turn
Kentucky blue.

But we need to know first who’s with us in this fight: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/sign/personal-endorsement-2022-july/?source=em20220608&t=1002&akid=2238%2E346206%2E_h5oaJ ]Will you add
your name today and give your personal endorsement for our campaign? We
want to collect a record number of personal endorsements from everyday
folks to show off the power of our grassroots campaign.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/sign/personal-endorsement-2022-july/?source=em20220717&t=1003&akid=2238%2E346206%2E_h5oaJ ]ENDORSE OUR CAMPAIGN →

Thank you for your support,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220717-2238-footer&t=1004&refcode2=2238_346206__h5oaJ&akid=2238%2E346206%2E_h5oaJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2238%2E346206%2E_h5oaJ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

clean_body: | | | Marlinga "best choice for Congress" in Democratic Primaries - Detroit Free Press We know it’s a Sunday, but we couldn’t wait to get this news in front of you, Peter. The Detroit Free Press in the Democratic Primary for Michigan’s 10th District in Congress, writing “we believe his unparalleled name recognition and long public service record make Carl Marlinga the superior choice for Democrats who hope to see their party win this seat in November.” The Detroit Free Press has long been a respected and reputable newspaper in Michigan. Carl is proud and honored to receive their endorsement for this critical election. Democrats will need a nominee who is capable of competing with John James in the general election, and after James reported raising over $2 million last quarter, it’s clear that Carl is the strongest candidate to take him on. The Free Press agrees, writing that the veteran Marlinga: "is the Democrat best equipped to wage that battle, and we hope Macomb voters have the wisdom to assign him the task.” This race is far from over, and we will need to continue building our momentum all the way through the August 2nd election. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Thank you so much, Marlinga HQ Carl is running for Congress in Michigan's 10th District. A lifelong Michigander, former prosecutor, former Probate Judge, and former Circuit Court Judge, Carl has the temperament, experience, and understanding of our district's issues to revitalize our economy and deliver for his constituents. These are the same motivations that have driven me to run for Congress today. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e32e96e0e05549ad88962bb737598f5e&_e=6KK75se87RUg5FYUz1lhfe4Hyt-eeWqwLzoVGhOMuG3sRl7vZKj8BwCEs4h3uQFGrpBx9vuplDREBQOkb6-dkVJ07sks2WAL0p5gTMa9jr7dpTr78eUom4nhP-RyubvlPmcI2OLVikP6Qoe33JiqcVAdJHE6P2a674acsrClZDu3AWJ61gpIOYPC0DnkvrYXUKJgmqeqgXk4ax9PiuLNDXTqv90BTTSVGlfLVorR5seBNSxOOL_ZvJN8KxHrbQ2BiKni878kiM3U4JeJV6y3R2xmfl-8ozDP8IfnhpUI6uU7CcJQpu7Yn_Vn_tp2Oe0ilIs3HcVd9jJ-JdsiTskM75CWIEHKxbcvuD_UkXqYjq_qlCb7HTKwILSF3IQo1Ukr-_37TOSPVLyx7xlcMLqKJUmV0gVw6ai5CULW9FSLVNPYisB2iPhluFZe1UfOC17pAaznH9N2lAZw9WbUsTZfXKG5i2DnjJfrVUKA-VULu6gl3xdOT-HO3aXM_roCzLjQ)
