Fellow American,

When I was commissioned into the Marine Corps more than ten years ago, it was for a multitude of reasons. I was inspired to take action, protect our country, and answer a call for public service. I believed America was worth protecting, _and I still do_.

[**These are the same motivations that have driven me to run for Congress today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e32e96e0e05549ad88962bb737598f5e&_e=6KK75se87RUg5FYUz1lhfe4Hyt-eeWqwLzoVGhOMuG3sRl7vZKj8BwCEs4h3uQFGrpBx9vuplDREBQOkb6-dkVJ07sks2WAL0p5gTMa9jr7dpTr78eUom4nhP-RyubvlPmcI2OLVikP6Qoe33JiqcVAdJHE6P2a674acsrClZDu3AWJ61gpIOYPC0DnkvrYXUKJgmqeqgXk4ax9PiuLNDXTqv90BTTSVGlfLVorR5seBNSxOOL_ZvJN8KxHrbQ2BiKni878kiM3U4JeJV6y3R2S-NZiUW4fdVw8jnJq1C9ezdJASH1PGzizQCx0o0p1TubbQ3LYkBUuqiTzIBl-NFjVEChxzaKuZm2B3awkWkFVrHM2WAA5RSQJbkVZvL8_H4nSpDR_aUKc_7uhRePU1xAM1FhZlXl7ZDQRH5FoNXwlGyq71lmL3egweSuZxrAQOnI6BqhlynmooqvXtpqODOwTCPxuRb9w-xx53oG1cjSajpJsCSHnwkaAeRW55OklV)

As Americans, we _deserve_ a new generation of leaders representing us in Congress. Leaders who understand the problems families all over the country are experiencing. Leaders who will fight for a strong economy, good paying jobs, affordable and high-quality healthcare, security and safety, education for our kids, and a better life for all Americans.

Many leaders in Congress right now have sold out our kid’s futures and put their own needs before the needs of constituents.

**The Marines taught me that teamwork is essential to the success of a mission, and a service-first mindset is fundamental.** Far too many folks in Washington are too busy playing partisan politics, instead of putting their heads down and doing the work of the people.

[**I promise you, as your next Representative in Washington, that I will commit to serving you and your family – because that’s what it’s all about right?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e32e96e0e05549ad88962bb737598f5e&_e=6KK75se87RUg5FYUz1lhfe4Hyt-eeWqwLzoVGhOMuG3sRl7vZKj8BwCEs4h3uQFGrpBx9vuplDREBQOkb6-dkVJ07sks2WAL0p5gTMa9jr7dpTr78eUom4nhP-RyubvlPmcI2OLVikP6Qoe33JiqcVAdJHE6P2a674acsrClZDu3AWJ61gpIOYPC0DnkvrYXUKJgmqeqgXk4ax9PiuLNDXTqv90BTTSVGlfLVorR5seBNSxOOL_ZvJN8KxHrbQ2BiKni878kiM3U4JeJV6y3R5-GX0PWl0Put1JbUdkfHjXJmMVxzHUlE1RCx6cHQF7VKoKpJahMSjljpPYMh-xkwFOibhxLv3xEsKcPxypASPa4Y0EalE9bk7e3VUZAov9b7HCg8YSWf9xV1_1VTOoJJhnVzpRwwxe4qnMz3mxFJugw-TpxLtGtM4TGrGcqdCRImoV31U3pTEvWuRxaAFZWjiaaoWRaOwsYRJe_2kIcUZfP3W3T9oCPafr2YvpcUhr2)

[**Will you support me today, so that I can make good on that promise, and be the change that Congress so desperately needs?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e32e96e0e05549ad88962bb737598f5e&_e=6KK75se87RUg5FYUz1lhfe4Hyt-eeWqwLzoVGhOMuG3sRl7vZKj8BwCEs4h3uQFGrpBx9vuplDREBQOkb6-dkVJ07sks2WAL0p5gTMa9jr7dpTr78eUom4nhP-RyubvlPmcI2OLVikP6Qoe33JiqcVAdJHE6P2a674acsrClZDu3AWJ61gpIOYPC0DnkvrYXUKJgmqeqgXk4ax9PiuLNDXTqv90BTTSVGlfLVorR5seBNSxOOL_ZvJN8KxHrbQ2BiKni878kiM3U4JeJV6y3RxxXAvNftyg3wMWXBHQsB6zixnd0cxAHw7F62JzowD3KhVl-J_N6M-HXdg598uNuXI6bWSkjAPpSAQMOqKa2glmKtt_zvFw8FDX7Lcc0jlWsH2ovsX1zzXrjatrQh498hgyM1ps2RQbj82URFGxFGEyzsXjeHimKY9jpG8HiwPAEsAVS-OQmkz3JArdyQV5D1cQ1mqB5EbhI30wm-vuZ1cntQkJA9xsIxVN6B9XzEsOD)

[**SEND IN THE MARINE » **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e32e96e0e05549ad88962bb737598f5e&_e=6KK75se87RUg5FYUz1lhfe4Hyt-eeWqwLzoVGhOMuG3sRl7vZKj8BwCEs4h3uQFGrpBx9vuplDREBQOkb6-dkVJ07sks2WAL0p5gTMa9jr7dpTr78eUom4nhP-RyubvlPmcI2OLVikP6Qoe33JiqcVAdJHE6P2a674acsrClZDu3AWJ61gpIOYPC0DnkvrYXUKJgmqeqgXk4ax9PiuLNDXTqv90BTTSVGlfLVorR5seBNSxOOL_ZvJN8KxHrbQ2BiKni878kiM3U4JeJV6y3RwON6Puo6O2ZAX4zDlw0FxQRVuJ8e9zEuBbZkeokNNu-y028VDjzimf7YaMM8IJxJznMRjjQ_fMIvPUiVl6agmyiWE2ehmVP5vZvX6jRvV9kqyjblPU_iq7l-PC-IIAeUj0QG-akj_ALgmF0oLefLHjBAHupzT40jFk45O-QtnKzOJOjUPu0EZ8obu47MMwivHnKdyYykwECFHogI5GiWBim93hxvA12Ye47t348fSNH)
When I first ran for Congress in 2020, _no one_ thought I had a shot.

I was facing a well-funded Democrat who took checks from the likes of Nancy Pelosi, corporate PACs, and special interest donors. _**But sitting around doing nothing went against every instinct in my body.**_ With zero resources or experience, I narrowly lost to my opponent, coming within just two points.

After a tough race and an even tougher loss, I picked myself up and decided to try again. **The Marines taught me to jump in, resolve problems, take action, and to have the courage to try.**

If I’ve learned anything in my 34 years on this earth, it’s that failure often teaches us more than success. So, I’m failing forward. I’m giving this race all that I’ve got. [**And I’m asking that you support me on this mission.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e32e96e0e05549ad88962bb737598f5e&_e=6KK75se87RUg5FYUz1lhfe4Hyt-eeWqwLzoVGhOMuG3sRl7vZKj8BwCEs4h3uQFGrpBx9vuplDREBQOkb6-dkVJ07sks2WAL0p5gTMa9jr7dpTr78eUom4nhP-RyubvlPmcI2OLVikP6Qoe33JiqcVAdJHE6P2a674acsrClZDu3AWJ61gpIOYPC0DnkvrYXUKJgmqeqgXk4ax9PiuLNDXTqv90BTTSVGlfLVorR5seBNSxOOL_ZvJN8KxHrbQ2BiKni878kiM3U4JeJV6y3R3YWDOca_bemwMVuByrGLCfk4AqResCr_G87iqyvSVYe9eBvfUFaifqbYALe0ccym1oGizwVZrCbXtclKTb79rjvAdEo8GI9PljGjEkMUYpi62yJYjdipfIas3XsN-jHDkpoe_I-YwJdLuW0m_UJlrisZybqzwwy1RTQRV3ylqFalMqLYJwx_YB5H5o3U4YLNfLLj5iIk1sMvFrHqsgGYEyQcnGFaNoKeRYza-ZT8Z5s)

[**SUPPORT TYLER » **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e32e96e0e05549ad88962bb737598f5e&_e=6KK75se87RUg5FYUz1lhfe4Hyt-eeWqwLzoVGhOMuG3sRl7vZKj8BwCEs4h3uQFGrpBx9vuplDREBQOkb6-dkVJ07sks2WAL0p5gTMa9jr7dpTr78eUom4nhP-RyubvlPmcI2OLVikP6Qoe33JiqcVAdJHE6P2a674acsrClZDu3AWJ61gpIOYPC0DnkvrYXUKJgmqeqgXk4ax9PiuLNDXTqv90BTTSVGlfLVorR5seBNSxOOL_ZvJN8KxHrbQ2BiKni878kiM3U4JeJV6y3R3v5QuCIV25IlfDSPAxso18F3T0G4EkRUvyoIQcnYpe3nd58WC7wsR2lZWYTYrGWIT5ucgjAU_V8RvXu6BFLL4481YLhlU0rjS4ywQ4iCIo7MWsgQtkMGmaaC101JhFoFYgZBzmrC_e8JjgPYrMgNCuJxNvDQ8bzd__Qc7cAyAy_eDySM9fTQACsSIlWVmHuYWy25uESsbf6qp214Y8p_prz7w1_guyQYDNMlMwsulUA)
I can guarantee you this – I will never give up on you. I will never stop fighting for what is right (not just what party-leadership says so). I will never sell out for my own personal interests. And **I will never stop defending this country that we both love**.

If that is worth something to you, [**I need your immediate support.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e32e96e0e05549ad88962bb737598f5e&_e=6KK75se87RUg5FYUz1lhfe4Hyt-eeWqwLzoVGhOMuG3sRl7vZKj8BwCEs4h3uQFGrpBx9vuplDREBQOkb6-dkVJ07sks2WAL0p5gTMa9jr7dpTr78eUom4nhP-RyubvlPmcI2OLVikP6Qoe33JiqcVAdJHE6P2a674acsrClZDu3AWJ61gpIOYPC0DnkvrYXUKJgmqeqgXk4ax9PiuLNDXTqv90BTTSVGlfLVorR5seBNSxOOL_ZvJN8KxHrbQ2BiKni878kiM3U4JeJV6y3RzFp33cPLhE9euj_fg-LLD03yeME-gJsOHUqspE2IR2suL0moGCqTnK69ZRTXBURQUfcMNDf7q3AQfXXAY0b5nrtOjOPf2jBZBgsQNlitprCpFHozcipunCxJnmBJFND3VY8qlJsdp86jHlDLuJ0fK4KVYf7jk5af84MU1s7Wp8Oi2hme11C-tWkfTtd9nhdGfBcYdAp5sK7xs-Pt_Y0yxjIyUl7o0FeMagKkIeoz1Pk)

P.S. – Our race is tough, our resources are low, and recent polling is shifting in favor of my opponent. It’s time for our team to band together and work diligently until election day. [**Can I count on you?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e32e96e0e05549ad88962bb737598f5e&_e=6KK75se87RUg5FYUz1lhfe4Hyt-eeWqwLzoVGhOMuG3sRl7vZKj8BwCEs4h3uQFGrpBx9vuplDREBQOkb6-dkVJ07sks2WAL0p5gTMa9jr7dpTr78eUom4nhP-RyubvlPmcI2OLVikP6Qoe33JiqcVAdJHE6P2a674acsrClZDu3AWJ61gpIOYPC0DnkvrYXUKJgmqeqgXk4ax9PiuLNDXTqv90BTTSVGlfLVorR5seBNSxOOL_ZvJN8KxHrbQ2BiKni878kiM3U4JeJV6y3R4Vg3elFG_ZSu2l6HGiMG51plWvjZ25F6RIRK3TjRZhcrO0ZiU87glKH6_JcGEeFH8-8X2W1cxzxFz8RXNkb-o3NLvpgVcMsXLuXVTkAl78afqP6YxzkhNH1OC2tHj6sVolyaq_mJ0ZRPe59wRn7CgX6l5BjqIloM9ZebZYmvoRvmczqsoRz5MTX5ITSGaT_5Yyc9QI6Xvlf6pMrN-rg-sRtqe9rTeNU9u7Z6Kf8di9u)

Friend, I just launched my very first TV ad, and the response has been incredible! **We’re spreading our bold message for change to Arizona voters – but we have a problem:

With time running out before the midnight fundraising deadline, we need to raise another $2,386 to keep our new TV ad on the air. [Will you rush $5 right now so we can keep this ad live and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47958820/356326493/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk802-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzQ5M2M5My1mMjA1LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rvckOfWT8uPjjqGBzJJbOb95qwL4lcA3zWwL5SEjFo=)**

I will not let what happened in TX, happen to AZ Democrats – that’s why we launched our Spanish-language ad focused on AZ Latinos, who we will need to win up and down the ticket. I'm the only bilingual Latino candidate, and this ad is a game changer!

They know we can win this race and flip Arizona blue – and experts from Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight to POLITICO agree. But we’re going to need an outpouring of grassroots support to keep our TV ads live and keep making the critical investments that will decide this race.

| Peter,

I have just a few moments in between campaign stops today, and wanted to send a note to our top supporters. It’s surreal to think that it’s been 250 days since we launched our campaign.

From the moment I announced I was running for Congress, I’ve pledged to fight for working families in Upstate New York and bring good-paying jobs and opportunities back to neighborhoods like the one I grew up in.

_And we’ve been through a lot since then, including our district lines changing (twice!)._

**But, Peter, my guiding principles, bold vision for our future, and commitment to Upstate New York have never changed.

[_Peter, this is a campaign by working people, for working people. I’m so grateful for your support over the past 250 days. Now, the primary election is just over 5 weeks away. This moment is what we’ve been preparing for. If you’re with us 100% until the very end, will you chip in $5, $10, or more right now to help us finish these final weeks strong?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47963764/356351011/1712918886?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220717-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWVkNTEzMi0xNzA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8LRS4UxEx5YLpv7efMQIXE7Jfj58W8YP-uV6ExDoUVo=)**

| [CHIP IN ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47963765/356351012/1712918886?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220717-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWVkNTEzMi0xNzA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8LRS4UxEx5YLpv7efMQIXE7Jfj58W8YP-uV6ExDoUVo=)

I’ve been reflecting on why I chose to run for Congress in the first place. It all comes back to my roots in this community and the way I was raised. My great-grandfather came to the United States in the 1800s in search of opportunity, and he found it. The generations before me found good, blue-collar jobs working at the Endicott-Johnson Shoe Company and the IBM factories. These jobs offered workers dignity and the opportunity to build something greater for future generations.

Unfortunately, today, these opportunities are slipping away for too many working families. Folks have been sold out and had their jobs shipped overseas by greedy corporations and self-serving politicians. Upstate New Yorkers deserve a representative who will work for them, not the special interests that line politicians’ pockets and fund their campaigns.

It’s why I’m in this fight and why I’ve refused to take any corporate PAC money. Our campaign is funded by grassroots supporters like you, and I’m incredibly grateful.

I can’t wait for the road ahead. We’ve already visited all 11 counties in the district multiple times. I’ve enjoyed getting to know so many incredible people in our community, and I can’t wait for the opportunity to connect with even more. And I’m honored to have received endorsements from every single County Democratic Committee that has endorsed in this race.

[_**With just over 5 weeks left until Election Day on August 23rd, we need your support now more than ever! So, please, before closing this email, could you pitch in your first $5 right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47963766/356351013/1712918886?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220717-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWVkNTEzMi0xNzA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8LRS4UxEx5YLpv7efMQIXE7Jfj58W8YP-uV6ExDoUVo=)

clean_body: I have just a few moments in between campaign stops today, and wanted to send a note to our top supporters. It’s surreal to think that it’s been 250 days since we launched our campaign. | = | Peter, I have just a few moments in between campaign stops today, and wanted to send a note to our top supporters. It’s surreal to think that it’s been 250 days since we launched our campaign. From the moment I announced I was running for Congress, I’ve pledged to fight for working families in Upstate New York and bring good-paying jobs and opportunities back to neighborhoods like the one I grew up in. And we’ve been through a lot since then, including our district lines changing (twice!). But, Peter, my guiding principles, bold vision for our future, and commitment to Upstate New York have never changed. = | = I’ve been reflecting on why I chose to run for Congress in the first place. It all comes back to my roots in this community and the way I was raised. My great-grandfather came to the United States in the 1800s in search of opportunity, and he found it. The generations before me found good, blue-collar jobs working at the Endicott-Johnson Shoe Company and the IBM factories. These jobs offered workers dignity and the opportunity to build something greater for future generations. Unfortunately, today, these opportunities are slipping away for too many working families. Folks have been sold out and had their jobs shipped overseas by greedy corporations and self-serving politicians. Upstate New Yorkers deserve a representative who will work for them, not the special interests that line politicians’ pockets and fund their campaigns. It’s why I’m in this fight and why I’ve refused to take any corporate PAC money. Our campaign is funded by grassroots supporters like you, and I’m incredibly grateful. I can’t wait for the road ahead. We’ve already visited all 11 counties in the district multiple times. I’ve enjoyed getting to know so many incredible people in our community, and I can’t wait for the opportunity to connect with even more. And I’m honored to have received endorsements from every single County Democratic Committee that has endorsed in this race. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | | | | = | = With gratitude & high hopes, Josh Riley = = = = * | | = Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 6806 213 Tioga St Ithaca, NY 14851 United States | | ---|--- = = If you wish to donate by check, you can make checks payable to Josh Riley for Congress and send to PO Box 6806, 213 Tioga St, Ithaca, NY 14851. subject: Our best quarter yet – Thank you!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0717 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0717]
Peter –
Adam here, Wade’s Finance Director. I wanted to reach out and say THANK YOU! We just had our best fundraising quarter yet!
I’ve said this before – every time we’ve asked you to meet the moment and support our campaign, you have responded in force! Take a look at the numbers:
☑️ Over $303k raised in Q2 (over $140k more than Q1)
☑️ 1270+ donations (460 more than last quarter!)
☑️ 51.5% were new donors!!!
This level of fundraising is bringing us into the national spotlight. And proves that this campaign is a force to be reckoned with. I am thankful we have a heck of a Brigade backing Wade heading into the general election.
But, I’ll be honest, we really need to keep building this momentum as we approach November!
If you don’t mind me asking... Can you help us get this quarter off to a good start by donating $25 (or whatever you can) today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0717]
Help us kickstart Q3 ➔ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0717]
The proof is in the numbers: every donation counts and adds up, especially when we’re facing Buddy Carter’s PAC-funded campaign.
We are grateful for your continued support – all eyes are on Georgia!
Thank you, thank you, thank you!
Adam Erickson
Finance Director | Wade Herring for Congress

body:
This is my last email before the week of the Primary Election begins, so I’ll get straight to the point: if you have any capacity to contribute to our progressive campaign for governor, the time is now.

My team and I are spending these next 2 days knocking doors in every corner of the state, from Dundalk to Bowie to Frederick, putting out barn signs outside polling sites, and mobilizing our people-to-people grassroots operation. But, campaigning is expensive, and it all adds up.
The direct impact of your donation dwindles as we get closer and closer to the polls actually closing, so if you have any capacity to give today I would really appreciate it. I’m so proud that this campaign is grassroots-funded with a median contribution of $25, and I’m counting on folks like you to chip in whatever you can to fuel us to the finish line.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47964121/356353026/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220717-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220717-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220717&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=2e3084ce-1b06-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTMwODRjZS0xYjA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mQllV8pjyOSdZwLKD6LjkgYFlCbcOSftpFNwgG2g7fQ=)

I’m ready to bring real, positive change to Annapolis and deliver on my promises of world-class public schools, expanded abortion access, and an economy that works for all working families, not just wealthy corporations.
I can’t do that alone though, Peter, and it’s going to take all of us to finish what we started. **If you can chip in to help us reach those undecided voters on the phones or on TV, every dollar will make a big difference.**
[PITCH IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47964127/356353033/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220717-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220717-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220717&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=2e3084ce-1b06-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTMwODRjZS0xYjA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mQllV8pjyOSdZwLKD6LjkgYFlCbcOSftpFNwgG2g7fQ=)

clean_body: This is my last email before the week of the Primary Election begins, so I’ll get straight to the point: if you have any capacity to contribute to our progressive campaign for governor, the time is now. | = | Peter, this is the last time I’ll email you before the week of the Primary Election begins, so I’ll get straight to the point:I’m respectfully asking if you can make a contribution now before we run out of time to fund our get-out-the-vote efforts? | = My team and I are spending these next 2 days knocking doors in every corner of the state, from Dundalk to Bowie to Frederick, putting out barn signs outside polling sites, and mobilizing our people-to-people grassroots operation. But, campaigning is expensive, and it all adds up. The direct impact of your donation dwindles as we get closer and closer to the polls actually closing, so if you have any capacity to give today I would really appreciate it. I’m so proud that this campaign is grassroots-funded with a median contribution of $25, and I’m counting on folks like you to chip in whatever you can to fuel us to the finish line. = = I’m ready to bring real, positive change to Annapolis and deliver on my promises of world-class public schools, expanded abortion access, and an economy that works for all working families, not just wealthy corporations. I can’t do that alone though, Peter, and it’s going to take all of us to finish what we started. If you can chip in to help us reach those undecided voters on the phones or on TV, every dollar will make a big difference. = Thank you for your support, and I look forward to the next 2 days! John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . body:
In our latest Community Survey,
we asked you about
the issues facing our communities.

Jocelyn’s out on the campaign trail listening to your responses.

Here are a few highlights of what YOU believe
voters need to know before November:

Our democracy
is on the line
-Norma B.

Jocelyn is the most
qualified SOS in the country!
-Ron F.

A vote for Jocelyn
will protect our country
from election conspiracies
-Angela A.

With the August primary
right around the corner,
Jocelyn is hard at work to ensure
security and transparency
in every election. (photo)

And nearly everyone agrees that:
this work is vital.

97 percent of you told us
you had either:

Voted by mail
Requested an absentee ballot
or had a plan to vote in person.

Our work isn’t over.
It’s up to us to make sure Jocelyn can keep serving us
as Secretary of State.

We're not just saying that. It's the truth. [**We desperately need your help to turn things around for Josh - so can you please rush in a donation to support our summer organizing program to help us fight back today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/u0fGCSALcHYAARob-WbrwsZqfIpfnz0cSe2ZL_l7kt8=/ZcHImUiDDZOT4w39scgzjGCi7Y8e1jvJ6GjEOOxkKqM=?refcode=E17056-20220716-RatingChange-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/u0fGCSALcHYAARob-WbrwsZqfIpfnz0cSe2ZL_l7kt8=/ZcHImUiDDZOT4w39scgzjGCi7Y8e1jvJ6GjEOOxkKqM=?express_lane=true&refcode=E17056-20220716-RatingChange-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

They can’t stand the fact that Trump lost and they didn’t get away with Trump’s Big Lie. That’s why they’ve introduced over 500 bills to suppress voters nationwide! Congress MUST pass Sen. Klobuchar’s critical Nationwide Vote-By-Mail legislation to BOOST Voter Turnout before the November Elections. We need every single person reading this to sign our petition and pressure Sen. Manchin and Sinema to abolish the Filibuster so Congress can pass a National Vote-by-Mail option. | = Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. name: Bob Fertik, #VOTEPROCHOICE
subject: Add your name: We must stop criminalizing healthcare
body:
Travel bans are an outrageous and intolerable attempt to control our bodies. | | |
---
Dear Friend, On Friday, Democrats in Congress introduced bills to block Republican states from criminalizing out-of-state travel for abortions. These bills would protect abortion seekers, abortion providers and even transportation providers who are forced to cross state lines for essential healthcare because Republican legislators banned abortions in their home states. But we all know these bills face an unlikely future in the Senate. **[Friend, add your name to help us send the message that criminalizing healthcare and implementing travel bans is an outrageous and intolerable attempt to control our bodies and our decisions.](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuzMWsskt2w3_mrFYd-_gvZqPxSADJKSaklUI09fr1ngNx5CymPxDvB0E0y4a9A0BhrbmhxEXNTgWZpSmheUaWxqSFMLPe-waV83zdRSxLPWdTmP13mV0jbzyZqHoDVXkL3tbrc136G2I4i2DAeApMcLUaNKAIpSYDKR6l4oLQfP9irLf8V_qD6ifny07SVOlb4SCkeGBQhACiMjRENYzIO4Y1ZbR9jJBNGpScvL8GyTKWIXEMxNv7XKxh3NQUjdAzkw82eeq69E1AHlHKqJt6Nf9D6KcBOerYNuYt0yic8GMbfBB_recMZ2AIzBNKEqz_/3nt/n_Ns1yciQYuWsdrbu8OnHw/h0/VLgC5LfOPsQNcAHmxJ85WfSIWpQ458ZdiHBXsLlhPyA)** Republicans are certain to use the filibuster to block these bills, and everyone in Washington knows this. To truly decriminalize abortion — for all patients and not just those who can afford to travel — **we need to elect prochoice Democrats at every level of government** from district attorneys, judges, mayors, and city councilors up to governors, attorneys general, and U.S. Senators. ****[**We need you with us in the fight to decriminalize abortion. Add your name and help us amplify the message that Congress must codify the right to abortion access by protecting interstate travel.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuzMWsskt2w3_mrFYd-_gvZqPxSADJKSaklUI09fr1ngNx5CymPxDvB0E0y4a9A0BhrbmhxEXNTgWZpSmheUaWxqSFMLPe-waV83zdRSxLPWdTmP13mV0jbzyZqHoDVXkLFkLnDNuUFbPF6__FqoXIIIK4QteSQb-9A4nFzVQAAzFfB06LDlbGqgRP5IK2wgQEyf05N87bSymRX3w8aICn7zpNkEagdllLk-sVL-sc6Y6UaXGXBoJCUieGbnSUHytnHIfJ6MqLJxJBGu-jTL89YPuKWsSCmeqK1EMK1P1qLqvLo93C-YHvh1Qjl56fCcJl/3nt/n_Ns1yciQYuWsdrbu8OnHw/h1/Fygu6cJq2BmxWadUjPKJCoQrlauCNPdMJkPoLO2Dr5A) Thank you for fighting with us, Bob Fertik, Co-founder
#VOTEPROCHOICE [](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wkqp0niVzxSGyz-H0Qgk3YLPDxma0NQW-u3I_fdga5cSQBpNNGbcl9FnSh3wzoKosD8VVz_cxGOTqqVRpCtQIH82Xu9zkHogbjHZmgRl9cUSkEQxrUzMHavxPYOs0u-QKqscj5SExsJXfIjG2sI9fR7Cy0HIVO_A0-AFYApCNQK7jSrKRMMr19xjWdlVkohYZCGKGf6JsQseSZMkRRDylGno1FYrq5rAB1_fSyqMnSzkpn81YDHIAju6M9zmqPpfav9c5A10CATAokwvJBxrUHRUceBbpxEIQd03RbBMQs1ySc0ShD-AubagmQo5aPoqhdJC6cM51BsCZIOPmZ9Jh5EYwZ-g5utdxmo32C6_H2VHwHFON-fSUMegAEbcIT7D2R7RwGDASNUujHS4EP_caV1LWhCjwMJlEJmQXNm9bYVg/3nt/n_Ns1yciQYuWsdrbu8OnHw/h2/kNfIqlby8htXGhL1mimMggMCCgDWeV-ZhMFZqoY2GWg)

body:

Folks—The crew over at FiveThirtyEight JUST updated their
forecast for Ohio’s Senate race and several polls have Tim jumping into
the lead against millionaire GOP extremist JD Vance!

Silicon Valley billionaires bankrolling his campaign.

Where we are → Thanks to strong, grassroots support and poll after poll
that has Tim taking the lead over JD, political pundits and experts across
the country are saying this race is closer than ever—with FiveThirtyEight
even giving us the slightest of edges.

continue standing up to the national Republicans and far-right super PACs
funding JD’s campaign and flip Ohio blue this November!

body:
Are you losing faith that government can do...ANYTHING, Peter? We are. This lazy (or calculated?) ineptitu | | | [](http://links.kenrussellforfloridaemail.com/u/click?_t=cee06b13e3c1411baa566b417c320e45&_m=23ee3f44233e4a798be7f821c8e02058&_e=C6eWJFpnoMXRR9QAqPYF9HkoUMH7IO19TWeUaX_QO_DJQzKgTgOrhSqz46b4unhICGz19QnbSOybYwZk0vFBJbP0Ohm9hAWPpM65xHsprV8To37F6eiNcrYZIR2f8IqmL9MTuYOm6_FdQS0Rl0RMnksePonu2Hfyspwq30TrlajOo661_idtMXH6TsO2dQ4HYqIc_Mz8nwv8do6TvuvAXWFTSzJ_sW7P9AY9yLeVHzWVswZv1GPVdUGBAKUkhgP8Ti2-NDILpbCbPAUWMdekVm2edJwcAooiPNjfsIw8T-ZydrX6IPY7qDArrTjNy5KLevHyYQSjPEP5c7tfTqaGDaL1KTGAG4NZqHaQWdojwgfG2qmYgXKYqiuFFJZtleYYzuEc-2XGTyIJmjhxrvRm9TZvaQTX4P6MhtkbOwHQU9tEllBrSpavNaFd-E-F0rFQCBwUtl7iWbpsh-DneolN67o3wY-mx9aFYXdfzFqCSsTmtWgkTDzIDUJzJJYXtN7h) Are you losing faith that government can do...ANYTHING, Peter? We are. **[This lazy (or calculated?) ineptitude is why Ken got into politics in the first place.](http://links.kenrussellforfloridaemail.com/u/click?_t=cee06b13e3c1411baa566b417c320e45&_m=23ee3f44233e4a798be7f821c8e02058&_e=C6eWJFpnoMXRR9QAqPYF9HkoUMH7IO19TWeUaX_QO_DJQzKgTgOrhSqz46b4unhICGz19QnbSOybYwZk0vFBJbP0Ohm9hAWPpM65xHsprV8To37F6eiNcrYZIR2f8IqmL9MTuYOm6_FdQS0Rl0RMnksePonu2Hfyspwq30TrlajOo661_idtMXH6TsO2dQ4HYqIc_Mz8nwv8do6TvuvAXWFTSzJ_sW7P9AY9yLeVHzWVswZv1GPVdUGBAKUkhgP8Ti2-NDILpbCbPAUWMdekVm2edJwcAooiPNjfsIw8T-YpPFqeMVrUKVKzjWLdmTdvvWHArdwhYe0csTgIouXaCuq6pjVvbOrKX4AkxRPb8rTV_XBb3Wk11TaNjx4McI2_M913Y5Rhj0igrHa9N7vT6VkdmXxV8ks6W2ybCrG-2W5oc5kRXYC71YXh0t6pcs_wi3DI8GmWacm6Udnj3oclegH9PglKD0pkQwdooSpwh7xJxrQIDgSyczO1GUMnf3xE)** The park across from Ken’s family was filled with junk & pollution. It was truly 🤢. Of course bureaucrats did 💩 about it. So he organized his neighbors, and cleaned it up. As a legislator Ken has continued to clean up & accomplish some real tangible progress -**[but he needs our help to get something, anything, done in Congress.](http://links.kenrussellforfloridaemail.com/u/click?_t=cee06b13e3c1411baa566b417c320e45&_m=23ee3f44233e4a798be7f821c8e02058&_e=C6eWJFpnoMXRR9QAqPYF9HkoUMH7IO19TWeUaX_QO_DJQzKgTgOrhSqz46b4unhICGz19QnbSOybYwZk0vFBJbP0Ohm9hAWPpM65xHsprV8To37F6eiNcrYZIR2f8IqmL9MTuYOm6_FdQS0Rl0RMnksePonu2Hfyspwq30TrlajOo661_idtMXH6TsO2dQ4HYqIc_Mz8nwv8do6TvuvAXWFTSzJ_sW7P9AY9yLeVHzWVswZv1GPVdUGBAKUkhgP8Ti2-NDILpbCbPAUWMdekVm2edJwcAooiPNjfsIw8T-aETn6GtwBsfCRDC1_JKn8NMTiIvJUt-6yYns8NOa1jewJkEiwoHwFWbTuD_azHRuW-XVmguuc5yM_AVwtTbKuTIcOkYr4Rt-uCvkddkqi8K2iKHCeItp2S2HhyvQPLOP4ndtSKX91zxvLc_HLLmvclNO3T3hIUQAk8gVIarX19NAqGGqV04ZXOlMll-HK-93fK76ZXESLbZRq1dD6sqRFB)** Here are just a few of the things I’ve done:
* Passed a $15 minimum wage
* Created affordable housing
* Protected LGBTQ kids with a ban on conversion therapy
* Shut down construction sites that pollute the bay
* Tackled rising sea level
* Banned styrofoam in city parks & marinas
* Opposed offshore drilling & seismic airgun blasting
* Invested $400 MILLION without raising taxes (This goes towards climate change resiliency and green projects)
* Held Miami Police accountable with a DOJ consent decree

This is what Americans need – politicians with a proven track record of taking action and vigilantly fighting for justice. We need honest representatives who put their words into action. If there's anything the past month has shown us, it’s that our representatives have become complacent and hesitant to enact change. clean_body: Are you losing faith that government can do...ANYTHING, Peter? We are. This lazy (or calculated?) ineptitu | | | Are you losing faith that government can do...ANYTHING, Peter? We are. The park across from Ken’s family was filled with junk & pollution. It was truly 🤢. Of course bureaucrats did 💩 about it. So he organized his neighbors, and cleaned it up. As a legislator Ken has continued to clean up & accomplish some real tangible progress - Here are just a few of the things I’ve done: Passed a $15 minimum wage Created affordable housing Protected LGBTQ kids with a ban on conversion therapy Shut down construction sites that pollute the bay Tackled rising sea level Banned styrofoam in city parks & marinas Opposed offshore drilling & seismic airgun blasting Invested $400 MILLION without raising taxes (This goes towards climate change resiliency and green projects) Held Miami Police accountable with a DOJ consent decree This is what Americans need – politicians with a proven track record of taking action and vigilantly fighting for justice. We need honest representatives who put their words into action. If there's anything the past month has shown us, it’s that our representatives have become complacent and hesitant to enact change. We’re tired of being neglected. Russell HQ Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Congress in Florida's 27th District. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today. ** Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: SENATE UPDATE: Honoring America’s True Promise
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501160816%2501100609%2b-%2b07-17-2022%2beNewsletter%250115430.36842201.5839920.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501160816%2501100609%2b-%2b07-17-2022%2beNewsletter%250115430.36842201.5839920.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501)
---|---
| | | **July 17, 2022** |
---|---|---|---
| | | At this critical moment in our nation's history, all of us who love America must redouble our efforts to make sure the United States lives up to its true promise. We have a lot of work ahead to achieve that objective, especially as we tackle the many challenges that our nation now faces. One of our top priorities must be addressing the scourge of gun violence that threatens to rip apart the very fabric of our communities. The American people have been calling for action on gun safety, and the Senate took a modest but meaningful step forward to do just that with the passage of the [Bipartisan Safer Communities Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d0000.0000.0000.0000%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-statement-on-the-bipartisan-safer-communities-act%26redir_log%3d815685874911798&redir_log=38430951681939). This bill marks an important achievement, but I will not rest until we enact comprehensive gun safety reform. I will also work with the Maryland Attorney General and the Maryland General Assembly to shape new Maryland laws in response to the harmful Supreme Court decision overriding state laws - like ours in Maryland - that place reasonable limits on the ability to carry concealed guns. We cannot normalize the idea that Americans must live in fear - whether they're in a classroom, at a July 4th parade, or walking in their neighborhood. Our country has more guns than people, and we need more safeguards to prevent the epidemic of gun violence. And following last month's devastating [ruling ](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d0000.0000.0000.0000%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-statement-on-supreme-court-ruling-overturning-roe-v-wade%26redir_log%3d810049422029848&redir_log=372891139311989)from the far-right packed Supreme Court overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , we must fight even harder to protect the most basic freedoms of all Americans - including the right of privacy and reproductive freedom. Americans don't want elected officials interfering in their most personal, private decisions - but that fact hasn't stopped the Court from [forcing its ideological beliefs down the throats of the American people](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d0000.0000.0000.0000%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252ftwitter.com%252fChrisVanHollen%252fstatus%252f1540355781199278080%26redir_log%3d154379901007374&redir_log=545340414041502). And the ruling in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women 's Health Organization_ is just step one of the anti-choice, far-right's plan. Next, they're aiming to secure a majority in Congress to pass a national law banning the right to choose everywhere - overriding state laws like Maryland's 1991 statute codifying the protections of _Roe v. Wade_ in our state. Republican-run state legislatures are already trying to expand their reach beyond their borders by passing laws to criminalize women who travel to other states to seek abortion care. This extremism is not isolated to Republican-controlled states; it has also infected Senate Republicans. Just this week, they blocked efforts by the Democratic Senate majority to pass legislation that I cosponsored to protect the right of women to travel across state lines in order to receive abortion care. We need a majority of senators and representatives who will vote to pass a national law to codify the protections of _Roe v. Wade. _The House has already passed such a measure, the Women's Health Protection Act. We have tried to do the same in the Senate, but have not been able to get an up-or-down vote on it because of the supermajority filibuster. That's just one more reason why we need the votes to amend or end that undemocratic Senate rule.
---
### Serving Our Veterans
Our nation has a duty to support those who have risked their lives for our country. That includes ensuring our nation's veterans receive the care they deserve. That's why I'm fighting to [pass the Sergeant First Class Heath Robinson Honoring Our Promise to Address Comprehensive Toxics Act (PACT Act)](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1537506901273071616&redir_log=176231824995373), legislation that will improve access to care for all those who served in America's armed forces. Within this bill, I worked to secure funding to open two new veterans clinics in our state - one in Baltimore and one in Prince George's County - to extend the already existing network of these Community-Based Outpatient Clinics (CBOCs) in other parts of Maryland. Additionally, this bill provides health care benefits for all generations of toxic-exposed veterans for the first time in our nation's history, including those exposed to burn pits. This legislation is a big win for our communities and a critical step forward in improving the network of care and new safeguards for veterans across our state. This landmark legislation recently passed the House of Representatives, it will soon return to the Senate for final passage, and I look forward to voting in favor of sending this bill to the President's desk for signature immediately. Recently, I also had the privilege of presenting a POW Medal to Maryland veteran [Ron Dolecki](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1540123622416781313&redir_log=537917532027372), whose bravery in the face of captivity saved lives. Ron was captured by the Eritrean Liberation Front while on a classified mission to Ethiopia in the 1960's and was forced to march more than 150 miles from Ethiopia to Sudan. He managed to escape from his captors and braved the elements without any food or water before finally making it back to safety, where he briefed the Army on the location of his partners. Decades later, his wife, Linda, submitted an application for Ron to receive a POW Medal, but her request was denied. For years, I worked alongside Ron, Linda, and others to fight for this recognition - which was bogged down by an error in the Army's application of the law governing eligibility for this medal. I wrote twice to the Secretary of the Army - and then worked to pass legislative provisions to ensure the accurate application of the law and secure Ron's medal. Finally, the Army formally approved his medal award this March. It was an honor to invite him to the United States Capitol so he could receive his medal in person, along with another POW from Virginia, David Strickland.
### Beating Back Sickle Cell
Last year, a member of my legislative staff, John Amara Walters, died of complications from Sickle Cell Disease. John had been on my staff since my days in the House of Representatives, working hard and climbing the ranks - eventually becoming a Legislative Aide on my Senate team. No matter the challenge, John brought enthusiasm, good humor, and brilliance to everything he did. This illness took John from us far too soon - only a few months before his 30th birthday. But today, his legacy lives on. Since his passing, I have worked with John's mother, Kimberley Davis, to ramp up our efforts to defeat the disease. Last month, I introduced the [Sickle Cell Care Expansion Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-booker-introduce-bill-to-improve-access-to-care-quality-of-life-for-sickle-cell-disease-patients&redir_log=0470972241120) to move this fight forward by improving access to medical treatment and quality of life for people suffering from Sickle Cell Disease. For too long, Sickle Cell Disease has been an overlooked condition, which has left a shortage of medical professionals who can treat it and limited resources for young adults living with it. Our bill will help close gaps in care that Sickle Cell patients often face by training more doctors in the field and boosting access to comprehensive care and other services for young adults transitioning out of pediatric care. As promising treatments for this disease advance and patients live longer, we need to ensure this care is accessible to all who need it. We shouldn't have to lose any more colleagues, friends, neighbors, or loved ones to this disease - and I'm committed to making that vision a reality through this legislation and future efforts to beat back Sickle Cell.
### Ensuring Access to Food and Nutrition
No family should live in fear of not knowing how they will provide their child their next meal. I've been hearing from parents and caregivers across Maryland who are gravely concerned about the current shortage of baby formula. Formula is a critical source of nutrition for newborns and infants, and this supply shortage has put their health and development at risk. In May, I joined Senators Patty Murray and Bob Casey [in sending a letter](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-murray-casey-democrats-push-infant-formula-manufacturers-to-address-crisis-get-formula-on-shelves-asap&redir_log=281136192291171) to Mardi Mountford, President of the Infant Nutrition Council of America, calling on infant formula manufacturers to make every effort possible to get parents and families the formula they need to feed their kids. A few days later, my colleagues and I [sent a letter to the White House](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-murray-casey-democrats-push-biden-for-white-house-formula-coordinator-to-lead-national-strategy&redir_log=205902762221123) urging President Biden to immediately assign a coordinator on infant formula to address the shortage and implement a national strategy to increase the resiliency of the infant formula supply chain and protect against future contamination and shortages. In response to our calls in Congress - and the combined efforts of local leaders and stakeholders across the country - the Biden Administration is taking action to get formula back on shelves. The President is now working to airlift millions of cans of formula into the United States. [This is an important step](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1532448189797781505&redir_log=91265649363374), and we must continue pushing with everything we've got. I also encourage Marylanders to refer to the [resources](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.hhs.gov%2fformula%2findex.html&redir_log=678512303597269) assembled by the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, designed to help families navigate this shortage. In addition to working to tackle the formula shortage, I recently fought to pass emergency, bipartisan legislation that will extend free summer meals and other food assistance programs that my colleagues and I included in earlier COVID-19 relief bills, but were set to expire over the summer. This legislation will extend a crucial lifeline to children and families, keep our kids fed for the coming months, and cut red tape to make food assistance programs more effective. Both of these efforts represent important investments in the health of kids and families in Maryland and across the country. But we cannot stop there. I remain deeply committed to meeting the needs of all of our communities - from tackling the kitchen table issues weighing down our working families to confronting the institutional challenges weighing down our democracy. In particular, I know many working families are deeply concerned about rising costs. That's why right now, my colleagues and I in the Senate are working on a legislative package to ease the strain on working families' pocketbooks - with provisions to bring down the costs of prescription drugs and other items that Marylanders rely on every day. That push is absolutely central to ensuring our economy works for everyone - and that every Marylander and every American can share in America's wealth and prosperity. These efforts, and others, require that all Marylanders join together to address the priorities that matter most. It's in that spirit that I hope you will [continue to stay engaged](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcontact&redir_log=475918421268285).

Chris Van Hollen
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=15430.36842201.5839920.7517223)

name: Tom Brennan
subject: Did you see Peter’s email?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I just wanted to make sure you saw Peter’s email from earlier. Election Day is just two short days away, and we need your help to meet our critical GOTV fundraising goal of $9,000 by our July 18, 11:59 PM deadline.
Anything you can spare will go a long way in these final two days. Click here to chip in. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvfundraising?refcode=em0717_B&amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Tom
Forwarded Message Below:
I hope you're enjoying a restful Sunday with family and friends. This weekend, Team Franchot is out in force speaking with voters at the doors and on the phones, and I’ve been busy meeting with Marylanders on the campaign trail.
With just TWO DAYS TO GO until the July 19 primary, we are doing everything we can to continue to spread our message, and reach as many voters as possible to build the critical mass of support needed to win this highly competitive election.
We are coming down to the wire, and we need all the help you can spare to give us the edge in these final, critical days. My team has set a $9,000 GOTV fundraising goal by our July 18, 11:59 PM deadline. If you are able to help us, will you rush a donation to power our movement to victory?
RUSH $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvfundraising?refcode=em0717_B&amount=10]
RUSH $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvfundraising?refcode=em0717_B&amount=20.22]
RUSH $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvfundraising?refcode=em0717_B&amount=50]
RUSH $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvfundraising?refcode=em0717_B&amount=100]
RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvfundraising?refcode=em0717_B]
I am grateful for each and every one of our supporters who have stepped up in the past week to provide the resources our campaign needs in this home stretch of the race. This movement simply would not be possible without your help, and I am humbled and honored by your trust and support. As Maryland’s next Governor, I won’t let you down. I’ll deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift all of our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
We have only two short days to go until Election Day – click here to help us reach our $9,000 fundraising goal before our July 18, 11:59 PM deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvfundraising?refcode=em0717_B&amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvfundraising?refcode=em0717_B&amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!

This movement simply would not be possible without your help, and I am humbled and honored by your trust and support. As Maryland’s next Governor, I won’t let you down. I’ll deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift all of our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. We have only two short days to go until Election Day – click here to help us reach our $9,000 fundraising goal before our July 18, 11:59 PM deadline. [] Thank you, [] CHIP IN [] By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer. Hey friends,

It’s Kevin Smith here. I wanted to personally reach out and thank you so much for joining my team. I’m looking forward to seeing what we can accomplish together.

**I’m a kitchen table conservative with local, New Hampshire values.**

**I’m running to represent New Hampshire because I truly love our state and believe that we have so much to offer.** I was raised in Londonderry, attended our public schools here, and went to the University of New Hampshire. I still live and work in Londonderry because New Hampshire is home. Whether it’s our world-class mountains, our gorgeous hiking trails, our quaint towns, our top-notch universities, or our beaches and lakes, New Hampshire has it all.

I believe that the most important decisions in America today are being made at the kitchen table, _not the halls of power in Washington or in Concord_. I’ll bring Washington back down to size. That means requiring the federal government to balance the budget, term limits for Members of Congress, putting parents back in control of their kids’ educations, and creating an economy that allows families to thrive.

For nearly a decade, I have served as the Town Manager of Londonderry – one of the state’s largest and most successful communities. I proudly balanced the budget and reduced local taxes while growing and diversifying our economy.

Until January 2022, I was Chairman of the Pease Development Authority, a 3,000-acre world-class office and industrial park which is home to more than 245 companies and employs more than 10,000 people.

I have dedicated my life to Public Service. Before I served as Londonderry’s Town Manager, I was Executive Director of the conservative grassroots organization Cornerstone Policy, a senior aide to Governor Craig Benson, and an aide to Senator Bob Smith.

**With you by my side, we can put New Hampshire First and safeguard our American values. Together, we can put American families back in control of their futures.**

From the bottom of my heart, thank you so much for joining our campaign. _I’m in this campaign to represent YOU, and I’m delighted to have you by my side._

Thank you and God Bless,

[ ](http://links.kevinsmithforsenate.com/u/click?_t=76332162d27f43e28b0f5b474da0fb56&_m=b6ebcd8b917d43f0a136101bf7fad4f1&_e=jr1kLNTE7ImpJJAzQ3DL3GCtbQU-hZgCUD-LYoXnEAGJStda5HpS3IjkUwCsDwagYJaKNnyReNkyfMhGqIi-H0XyvaFY3P0pHJiJoJ0WVjTBdHJGaJeDFfHwDOS8v2mmoEO0FkGCQ1hQx1BXrlSJ5mAWAxh5NTVqTAeull1xc4o_ECmY3jRT_x8D-ufP8RQpPB4KOtvdhZZaxfPi3qFu7pCTQrksfRL-IROSv-HUyTS4WSoJUQsQYbQr-4YSnO3TSu8KD6HFbsZrEV27IBlepnV3UinWr_SvG2aIYhZqv9cn9BS7MIInnWJCKGB8MjPn2PzsRdlOv8qxezjP-eSqasUuAou49krHMmTf8875jcCwODhM2TzMJw5Qa2xmo559RBitI2wQ7zh2kNlAdXMqLRj-OfBPyS3_w_cTDNSkg6RhZ1cbrn0hWfZMVDaMi-LZyShF2mnpnJvzcs83g9FSv3DL2WOS4YMZPkXrUmEzDl7OpCEFH1l2CYgybePSma4BcRlutHTZZQLjMLGHUnFTPexhvaSElEj96QhBR9Rx7Rs%3D)

clean_body: Together, we can put New Hampshire First | Hey friends, It’s Kevin Smith here. I wanted to personally reach out and thank you so much for joining my team. I’m looking forward to seeing what we can accomplish together. I’m a kitchen table conservative with local, New Hampshire values. I’m running to represent New Hampshire because I truly love our state and believe that we have so much to offer. I was raised in Londonderry, attended our public schools here, and went to the University of New Hampshire. I still live and work in Londonderry because New Hampshire is home. Whether it’s our world-class mountains, our gorgeous hiking trails, our quaint towns, our top-notch universities, or our beaches and lakes, New Hampshire has it all. I believe that the most important decisions in America today are being made at the kitchen table, not the halls of power in Washington or in Concord. I’ll bring Washington back down to size. That means requiring the federal government to balance the budget, term limits for Members of Congress, putting parents back in control of their kids’ educations, and creating an economy that allows families to thrive. For nearly a decade, I have served as the Town Manager of Londonderry – one of the state’s largest and most successful communities. I proudly balanced the budget and reduced local taxes while growing and diversifying our economy. Until January 2022, I was Chairman of the Pease Development Authority, a 3,000-acre world-class office and industrial park which is home to more than 245 companies and employs more than 10,000 people. I have dedicated my life to Public Service. Before I served as Londonderry’s Town Manager, I was Executive Director of the conservative grassroots organization Cornerstone Policy, a senior aide to Governor Craig Benson, and an aide to Senator Bob Smith. With you by my side, we can put New Hampshire First and safeguard our American values. Together, we can put American families back in control of their futures. From the bottom of my heart, thank you so much for joining our campaign. I’m in this campaign to represent YOU, and I’m delighted to have you by my side. Thank you and God Bless, Kevin Smith Candidate for U.S. Senate (NH) | Paid for by Kevin Smith for Senate Copyright © 2022 Kevin Smith for Senate, All rights reserved.

Gretchen Whitmer

** _A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. subject: Happy Dance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
When I say we’re a grassroots campaign funded by people like you, I mean it.
| | |
---
Friend,
Let me start by saying this. I’m not a millionaire.
I don’t have enough money to even *think* about self-funding our campaign for U.S. Senate.
And I certainly don’t have million$ to throw around like Dr. Oz + his super PACs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47965127/356357334/1140246662?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1304-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmZlMGZlMy0yNDA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BkM6Edr1dixSR_Lu6zo8XPraDFsoO6H-LfiXvgjBJWM=)
Dr. Oz’s Campaign HQ in New Jersey, probably.
When I say we’re a grassroots campaign funded by people like you, I mean it.
We don’t take a single dollar for granted. Each + every dollar we raise is used strategically to help reach + mobilize voters across the Commonwealth. In fact, a couple campaign staffers even get an automated email alert every single time someone donates.
(Yep, that means when you donate to this email, someone on the finance team will see it and do a little Happy Dance. 😂)
Believe me when I say your donation will not go unseen or unappreciated. In a tough race like this, every single dollar makes a huge difference. I really just couldn’t be more grateful for your support.
Want to inspire a Happy Dance today, friend? Split a donation of any amount between our campaign + Maggie Hassan.

clean_body: When I say we’re a grassroots campaign funded by people like you, I mean it. | | | Friend, Let me start by saying this. I’m not a millionaire. I don’t have enough money to even think about self-funding our campaign for U.S. Senate. And I certainly don’t have million$ to throw around like Dr. Oz + his super PACs. = Dr. Oz’s Campaign HQ in New Jersey, probably. When I say we’re a grassroots campaign funded by people like you, I mean it. We don’t take a single dollar for granted. Each + every dollar we raise is used strategically to help reach + mobilize voters across the Commonwealth. In fact, a couple campaign staffers even get an automated email alert every single time someone donates. (Yep, that means when you donate to this email, someone on the finance team will see it and do a little Happy Dance. 😂) Believe me when I say your donation will not go unseen or unappreciated. In a tough race like this, every single dollar makes a huge difference. I really just couldn’t be more grateful for your support. Want to inspire a Happy Dance today, friend? Split a donation of any amount between our campaign + Maggie Hassan. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Maggie Hassan and John Fetterman immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = — John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania P.S. Uh I wouldn’t say I’m the Happy Dancing type. But if I see your name come across our ActBlue tonight, maybe you’ll catch me doing this. 👇 = = | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: Laura Loomer
subject: We did it again!
body:
The finance reports were recently released by the FEC, and thanks to your help, we've outraised my RINO opponent EVERY SINGLE QUARTER of this race!
****
| | | **[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/5wglnv2Tb7630at6KeeYx763IQ/fd9CSc1763OutihFY1rtnScA)**
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/5wglnv2Tb7630at6KeeYx763IQ/fd9CSc1763OutihFY1rtnScA) The finance reports were recently released by the FEC, and thanks to your help, we've outraised my RINO opponent EVERY SINGLE QUARTER of this race!

**Do-Nothing Daniel Webster raised $139k, while we put in the work and raised $168k!**

But there's a bigger difference in those numbers that you have to dig for.

Forty-four thousand dollars of Webster's fundraising haul came from Political Action Committees, and the rest came from big money, major donors.

**That means Webster has BARELY ANY support for his reelection.**

And he called for help from big corporate PACs like FedEx, Lockheed Martin and even received money from execs at US Sugar.

Webster didn't stop there. He asked for help from his establishment cronies and received thousands of dollars from RINO PACS.

Most shocking was the max contribution Webster received from AIPAC. Yep, the American Israel Public Affairs Committee, a Leftist group that is SUPPOSED to advocate for pro-Israel policies, but in reality, spends more time genuflecting to Islam by giving free trips to Israel to Jew-hating Democrats. They backed Webster with a $2,900 donation... and here's the kicker! I'm Jewish. So AIPAC is campaigning against a Republican Jewish candidate, even though they claim to be a Jewish organization.

**But, with all of that big-money and PAC help, Webster STILL couldn 't beat us!**

Now, we have to make sure we beat Webster one last time in the Republican Primary that's just 37 days away!

[Will you please chip in and help me win by making a donation today?](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/5wglnv2Tb7630at6KeeYx763IQ/fd9CSc1763OutihFY1rtnScA)

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Critical Race Theory?!
subject: What are our children learning?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
| | | Peter, Our children are being pitted against each other because of the color of their skin, and it’s _disgusting._

Critical race theory is poisoning our classrooms, and socialist politicians are trying to permanently seal it into curriculums.

**We live in a country where _anyone_ can achieve their dreams regardless of the color of their skin - but the Left wants to destroy that in the name of woke extremism.**

We’re building a coalition of voters across the country to STAND UP to critical race theory, and we need your help.

[**Do you think critical race theory should be taught in classrooms? **AOC and Nancy Pelosi have started to roll out their plan to flip NY-11 in 2022.**

If we don’t meet our upcoming mid-month fundraising goal, we won’t be on a path for victory in November. Can you spare a couple of dollars to help my team out? My team attached an exclusive offer below.

Nicole Malliotakis

Sent from my iPhone.

_Please excuse errors._

Hey Congresswoman,

**[Here](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=33e40e4efa634042be58cd798f2a2744&_e=tq6h4KRFRo1j0HUMPoGZRkgUrXltbPgmrlNtZDBDoqvFjjF2Yri8Rko1X4kkY7g-4UIRzzB4OU5Ck2j1DmqazOxXylnuZWRu7HlN3n8hImglPmlZ5Ib3jQ92yZtC6UXT18ipmdhod4WUFkYYs2FsHpUYLvtC9VQb4W1dl-Ghtw9MryPgvA5107KRK0-gDwyLU42cpOSHFevsxtXgW1xVc0gNrlB0SRyotfrts5HCO5RHJImLvXgsTBjjRS8RVC4yM-KDQukUzsFB3alS8FMQx75MtSxn1kR9YFQT5N4LzhVsZF3YqKDlc5bITnyWYw38ngA95PtD_l66ITOdki4X6a6gg-u_5ShlPZ-_7Ruj1TfBq0kjO4TTK6lOQ8DZYNnaldRpvg8PKA8fGPPwxUHdU8_P8-oK9G-PduefjNlJYdXREwd5_OvF29hnSSGK0zMxQnrCdJZP7paF2N4Mema3cjtvlgh5EqegQF4uUDJaDe6OnHpSFdmjTaz5OsRAgVex)** are our takeaways from our last finance meeting:

We’re analyzing our end-of-month June reporting and we’re behind on our numbers. We need to meet or exceed every goal this summer to be ready for a messy political fight in the fall.

**[Your record as a conservative leader has inspired a ton of grassroots support but we need that to translate into financial contributions if we want to beat the Democrats and their huge ActBlue donor network and friends in the liberal media.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=33e40e4efa634042be58cd798f2a2744&_e=tq6h4KRFRo1j0HUMPoGZRkgUrXltbPgmrlNtZDBDoqvFjjF2Yri8Rko1X4kkY7g-4UIRzzB4OU5Ck2j1DmqazOxXylnuZWRu7HlN3n8hImglPmlZ5Ib3jQ92yZtC6UXT18ipmdhod4WUFkYYs2FsHpUYLvtC9VQb4W1dl-Ghtw9MryPgvA5107KRK0-gDwyLU42cpOSHFevsxtXgW1xVc0gNrlB0SRyotfrts5HCO5RHJImLvXgsTBjjRS8RVC4yM-KDQukUzsFB3alS8FMQx75MtSxn1kR9YFQT5N4LzhW2LQB1TRy43Z4SGtRM-LD5EmLZHcc_f1Z-YND9Y2E7x3Am2vVBzdf5WQWxc9I1ERQ43Lvxr_53_OLadKUOEFPHmOkRlpNN4AV3bOZmXyVLfCO5XG8qVzfKhzii1QvqNbgiDYAqW74GF2xPuPwyv6OtFq_ElZm4VM-wtxH-qfSgHwCNzyXk2MBZSGM9wU5yyYPxcaWLF7_kWQ6zyVc65KV5)**

We still have time to turn this around, so we put together a special offer for select supporters. **[This link](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=33e40e4efa634042be58cd798f2a2744&_e=tq6h4KRFRo1j0HUMPoGZRkgUrXltbPgmrlNtZDBDoqvFjjF2Yri8Rko1X4kkY7g-4UIRzzB4OU5Ck2j1DmqazOxXylnuZWRu7HlN3n8hImglPmlZ5Ib3jQ92yZtC6UXT18ipmdhod4WUFkYYs2FsHpUYLvtC9VQb4W1dl-Ghtw9MryPgvA5107KRK0-gDwyLU42cpOSHFevsxtXgW1xVc0gNrlB0SRyotfrts5HCO5RHJImLvXgsTBjjRS8RVC4yM-KDQukUzsFB3alS8FMQx75MtSxn1kR9YFQT5N4LzhUxxu5I9qkEsoxro_5kdAPOl7849EpL8It3OCnUANpyXKW_YLKH6XGC7G9oZC8drYxtOZAaojzhk7baRHoWu3L2uJlO83NakUxmQZW30szJNYgAGhNw3Mt3oKD-X3kL9BU3BpSJ0RtJv2cm2vw3E8lAZjOYvCAGEwNjd7umxNOkjqP9GtEQ2WLLCxIyzHUWdkfv0V7sx_9ezeq7NFV3yuGJ)** will provide a 3X matching opportunity for anyone who donates before our July mid-month deadline. Please share as you see fit.

We can discuss the strategy at our meeting this afternoon.

Mac

Congresswoman Malliotakis is the daughter of immigrants, her father from Greece and her mother a Cuban exile of the Castro dictatorship. She is currently the only Republican member of Congress representing New York City and the only Hispanic Republican elected official citywide. | Paid for by Nicole for New York Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306

Great news Peter: _The Seattle Times_ just endorsed Kim’s re-election campaign!

_The Seattle Times_ highlighted Kim’s commitment to constituent service and “scorecard of success” – including passing legislation signed into law that will help farmers, ensure our district has a reliable water supply, and bring down the cost of medications like insulin.

**Kim’s ready to keep delivering results for our district, but winning in November won’t be easy.** Election experts agree WA-08 is a “toss-up” race and a Kevin McCarthy-aligned super PAC is spending at least $3.9 million on attack ads in our district.

In their endorsement, _The Seattle Times_ also addressed what’s at stake if any of Kim’s Republicans do flip this seat and help the GOP reclaim the House Majority: _"Republican control of the House would likely embolden the worst instincts of the current GOP leadership."_

Under Republican leadership, we can expect Congress to focus on “alleged election fraud and a host of other issues that don’t make the life of a single American any better. _Expect legislation to ban abortion across the nation, state protections be damned.”_

**[With so much on the line this November, Kim’s counting on your support. clean_body: “Schrier deserves reelection for representing her district well, putting political partisanship aside and helping people navigate federal bureaucracies... Vote for Kim Schrier.” | The Times recommends: Kim Schrier for the 8th Congressional District "Schrier deserves reelection for representing her district well, putting political partisanship aside and helping people navigate federal bureaucracies... Vote for Kim Schrier." | = Great news Peter: The Seattle Times just endorsed Kim’s re-election campaign! The Seattle Times highlighted Kim’s commitment to constituent service and “scorecard of success” – including passing legislation signed into law that will help farmers, ensure our district has a reliable water supply, and bring down the cost of medications like insulin. Kim’s ready to keep delivering results for our district, but winning in November won’t be easy. Election experts agree WA-08 is a “toss-up” race and a Kevin McCarthy-aligned super PAC is spending at least $3.9 million on attack ads in our district. In their endorsement, The Seattle Times also addressed what’s at stake if any of Kim’s Republicans do flip this seat and help the GOP reclaim the House Majority: "Republican control of the House would likely embolden the worst instincts of the current GOP leadership." Under Republican leadership, we can expect Congress to focus on “alleged election fraud and a host of other issues that don’t make the life of a single American any better. Expect legislation to ban abortion across the nation, state protections be damned.” = = Thank you, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in November? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: Republican Task Force
subject: Investigation Casts Doubt on This Story
body:
The Washington Post first cast doubt on the story of a 10-year-old rape victim in Ohio whose pregnancy was deemed three days too late to be terminated.

---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans will impeach Joe Biden, and try to overturn our lawful elections that way if they can’t succeed at the ballot box. Rep. Angie Craig can help us stop them.
body:
Don’t let them impeach Biden
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **They. Will. Impeach. Joe. Biden.** The Republican Party isn't just content with trying to rig our elections in the states, "electing" Donald Trump as President again in '24, taking away the very right for women to control their own bodies and attack our Capitol in an attempted coup. They're favored to take back the House in 2022 as of right now, and if they do, besides the insane things they'll vote for such as banning all abortion, requiring gun ownership and stopping all efforts to mitigate climate change, they have already said they'll Impeach President Biden. **Corrupt House member Ken Buck, Senator Ted Cruz and many other among the emotionally-challenged GOP caucus have already made this clear. Why? They don't know. They'll just make it up as they go along.** _**Terrific House Member Rep. Angie Craig from Minnesota's 2nd District had the fifth-closest win out of any House Democrat in 2020** , **so Republicans will be targeting her district with all the dark money, propaganda, Oath Keeper voting intimidation and any other despicable, racist, sexist and anti-democratic trick they can dream up. **_ **[Could you please give Rep. Angie Craig $2, $5, $10, or whatever you can afford, so we can hold onto her House seat? Because if we do, we will hold the House.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d2a4885-fbba-44ea-8575-47e860504723/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: ANGIE CRAIG FOR MINNESOTA!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta036a33e-3d46-4478-9e67-920a34f786d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **We. Must. Stop. Them.** _If we lose the House, we may lose our democracy. I hate even writing these words, but I promise they're no exaggeration._ Remember the thousands of hours of hearings on Benghazi Republicans held when they controlled the House, all to damage President Obama and Secretary of State Clinton (_Kevin McCarthy admitted it on Fox, so we don't need to speculate_)._** This time they'll shut down the January 6th Commission and impeach President Biden. And that will only be the beginning.**_ **We. Must. Stop. Them.** **[Would you please give Rep. Angie Craig $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford so we can hold onto her House seat? Because if we do, we will hold the House.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4684418d-c0f2-49b4-bd9e-6fd7f8c16b9c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you for reading this email, and knowing the stakes when it comes to this must-win race. Cliff Schecter

name: Stacey Abrams HQ
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, we didn’t
want you to miss the email from our campaign manager, Lauren Groh-Wargo.
It’s critical that all of Stacey’s supporters know that Brian Kemp is
preparing to spend $1 million in attack ads disparaging our positive
vision for One Georgia.

With a few more grassroots donations today, we can cement our plans to
counter Kemp’s attacks. But we need your help to get there.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220717_B2_Bump_S1_T1_AG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1033%2E1862389%2EdWFsLI ]Will you invest $5 or any amount in our campaign to help
us counter Kemp’s attacks? Your $5 contribution allows us
to reach out to voters all across the state.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220717_B2_Bump_S1_T1_AG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=1033%2E1862389%2EdWFsLI ]DONATE

Thank you,

Stacey Abrams HQ

- - - - - Begin original message - - - - -
From: Lauren Groh-Wargo
Subject: Derek,
you have to see this:
Date: Friday, July 14, 2022

Hello Derek,

This is Lauren Groh-Wargo, Stacey Abrams’ campaign manager.

I’m reaching out personally because I just heard some news that every one
of Stacey’s supporters needs to know: Brian Kemp is preparing to spend $1
million in attack ads that lie about Stacey’s plans and record.

Yes, you read that correctly ... $1 MILLION!

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220717_B2_Bump_S1_T1_AG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=1033%2E1862389%2EdWFsLI ]Derek, I’m
personally asking for your support to push back against Kemp’s hate. Can
you chip in your first
$5 contribution today so that we can spread Stacey’s vision
for One Georgia, where opportunity, safety and success are not determined
by zip code, background or access to power?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220717_B2_Bump_S1_T1_AG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=1033%2E1862389%2EdWFsLI ]DONATE

The truth about Kemp is clear — he does not care about Georgians and is
dangerously unfit to lead. But he’s spending money at an alarming rate to
spread lies about Stacey and about the things he’s done.

Last week when we announced that we outraised Kemp in the previous
reporting period, I said we still had so much work to do to win in
November. And today that reality remains true.

Georgians deserve to know the truth about Stacey’s vision for their future
and Kemp’s extreme, dangerous agenda. However, if we fail to respond to
Kemp’s $1 million attack ads, he’ll drown out our message.

Right now, my team tells me that just a few more grassroots donations
today are key to implementing our plans to counter Kemp’s attacks. But we
need your help to get there.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220717_B2_Bump_S1_T1_AG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=1033%2E1862389%2EdWFsLI ]Can you make your
first donation
before midnight to ensure we hit this critical goal and stand up to Brian
Kemp’s lies? Any amount — however big or small — will make a real
difference at this moment.

Thank you,
LGW

Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager, Abrams for Governor

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=1033%2E1862389%2EdWFsLI ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1033%2E1862389%2EdWFsLI
