name: Arne Carlson
subject: Why I stand with Jeff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
body:
It is becoming all too clear that our democracy is in serious jeopardy and, unless we act now, it may be too late. Traditionally, we have always had two parties that agreed on the end goals while differing on the means. That is no longer the case. ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47966297/356373108/-895462045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTQ1MGU0My0zMTA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AYHfp1J4KGP0FElQ_HiQhSjZV6igAWVoQsK3E-P2Jrs=&emci=cc7e3c7a-f705-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a5450e43-3106-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=5460736)
Dear friend, It is becoming all too clear that our democracy is in serious jeopardy and, unless we act now, it may be too late. Traditionally, we have always had two parties that agreed on the end goals while differing on the means. That is no longer the case. Increasingly, the Republican Party is falling under the control of Donald Trump and candidates feel compelled to totally surrender to his will in order to achieve the nomination. This is the path to autocratic control.

Jeff Ettinger has stepped up as a candidate for Congress in order to protect our traditional pro-democracy values. Right now, there is not a single CEO of a Fortune 500 company in Congress nor anyone with comparable business experience. If elected, he will instantly become an important national voice, particularly in matters of budgets and finance. But, he also intends to lead efforts designed to expand the middle class via an increased focus on vocational training and job specific educational programs.

Today, we are feeling the pain of high inflation, particularly at the pump. Like so many problems, there is no simple solution nor some one person to blame. However, we can take action that will clearly help.

Last April, President Biden released 1 million barrels of oil per day for the next six months from the Federal Strategic Oil Reserve. This had the impact of increasing supply and lowering prices. It also helped the United States strengthen its position as the world’s leading producer of oil surpassing Russia and Saudi Arabia.

Now, current oil prices are around $96 a barrel, and the last time we had prices at that level, the cost at the pump was around $3.60 a gallon. Hopefully, the market will continue to move prices downward. If not, we may have to consider imposing a temporary excess profits tax on oil companies. This strategy has been around since the Civil War and has been used to protect the best interests of the economy and the consumer.

But, we also have to fully appreciate the impact the war in Ukraine is having on the global economy, particularly the supply chain. Some of us are old enough to remember that following World War II, there were higher prices for all kinds of items and shortages because of the war effort. We had leaders who helped us to understand the sacrifices that were being made for freedom. We also had leaders who came up with solutions so that people could afford to provide for their families. Jeff Ettinger is that leader for Southern Minnesota.

Simply put, Jeff Ettinger, as a highly successful retired CEO of Hormel, will be a welcomed voice in the highest councils of government: a voice that is highly respected by all economic groupings from labor to agriculture and business to academic and community leaders.

Frankly, at this moment, we need Jeff Ettinger in Congress, and I applaud his willingness to run for public office at this most crucial moment in our nation’s history. clean_body: It is becoming all too clear that our democracy is in serious jeopardy and, unless we act now, it may be too late. Traditionally, we have always had two parties that agreed on the end goals while differing on the means. That is no longer the case. ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS | Dear friend, It is becoming all too clear that our democracy is in serious jeopardy and, unless we act now, it may be too late. Traditionally, we have always had two parties that agreed on the end goals while differing on the means. That is no longer the case. Increasingly, the Republican Party is falling under the control of Donald Trump and candidates feel compelled to totally surrender to his will in order to achieve the nomination. This is the path to autocratic control. Jeff Ettinger has stepped up as a candidate for Congress in order to protect our traditional pro-democracy values. Right now, there is not a single CEO of a Fortune 500 company in Congress nor anyone with comparable business experience. If elected, he will instantly become an important national voice, particularly in matters of budgets and finance. But, he also intends to lead efforts designed to expand the middle class via an increased focus on vocational training and job specific educational programs. Today, we are feeling the pain of high inflation, particularly at the pump. Like so many problems, there is no simple solution nor some one person to blame. However, we can take action that will clearly help. Last April, President Biden released 1 million barrels of oil per day for the next six months from the Federal Strategic Oil Reserve. This had the impact of increasing supply and lowering prices. It also helped the United States strengthen its position as the world’s leading producer of oil surpassing Russia and Saudi Arabia. Now, current oil prices are around $96 a barrel, and the last time we had prices at that level, the cost at the pump was around $3.60 a gallon. Hopefully, the market will continue to move prices downward. If not, we may have to consider imposing a temporary excess profits tax on oil companies. This strategy has been around since the Civil War and has been used to protect the best interests of the economy and the consumer. But, we also have to fully appreciate the impact the war in Ukraine is having on the global economy, particularly the supply chain. Some of us are old enough to remember that following World War II, there were higher prices for all kinds of items and shortages because of the war effort. We had leaders who helped us to understand the sacrifices that were being made for freedom. We also had leaders who came up with solutions so that people could afford to provide for their families. Jeff Ettinger is that leader for Southern Minnesota. Simply put, Jeff Ettinger, as a highly successful retired CEO of Hormel, will be a welcomed voice in the highest councils of government: a voice that is highly respected by all economic groupings from labor to agriculture and business to academic and community leaders. Frankly, at this moment, we need Jeff Ettinger in Congress, and I applaud his willingness to run for public office at this most crucial moment in our nation’s history. = | **=** Best regards, Arne Carlson Former Governor of Minnesota, Lake City | PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 741 AUSTIN, MN 55912 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Friend – Republicans are making Arizona ground zero for their extremism, which means it's on us to fight back, flip our state blue and defend our rights.
The Washington Post confirms that electing Democratic governors is the best way to win the fight for our democracy – so we have to craft an airtight strategy to win this race and defeat our extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R).

******Stand with Justice Sonia Sotomayor:****
[Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition by midnight to show that you stand for reproductive freedoms!](https://go.dscc.org/go/8449?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220717-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorLetsFight-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220717-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorLetsFight-Pros-sl1&akid=5272%2E9716520%2ERVljDX)******

---

Team, one of our worst nightmares has come true: Mitch McConnell and the GOP stacked the Supreme Court with _ultra-conservative_ justices **who have now officially OVERTURNED _Roe v. Wade_.**

But the fight's not over. Justice Sotomayor says that at times like this, we need to channel our anger into action -- **_and she's RIGHT._**

We've launched an emergency petition to show we support a woman's right to make her own health care decisions, and we can’t emphasize this enough: It has _never_ been more crucial to raise our voices. **Let's fight -- before midnight:**

**[Stand with Justice Sonia Sotomayor: Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition to show that you stand for reproductive freedoms >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8449?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220717-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorLetsFight-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220717-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorLetsFight-Pros-sl1&akid=5272%2E9716520%2ERVljDX)**

**_Goal: 250,000 signatures needed!_**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8449?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220717-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorLetsFight-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220717-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorLetsFight-Pros-sl1&akid=5272%2E9716520%2ERVljDX)

Team DSCC

body:
The clock is ticking. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/onlyonemonthleft?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=2f28716852&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

**The clock is ticking.**

**_My primary election is on August 2nd - only THREE weeks away._**

These next few weeks are going to be **_critical_**. **_Republicans MUST secure a majority this election to ensure Joe Biden’s radical tyranny can be checked in Congress._**

**With time running out, millionaire Leftist donors and progressive super PACs have been flooding my district with hit pieces in the media, media attack advertisements on local television, and support for my opponents’ radical campaigns. **

I need to punch back at these lies by running TV ads to make sure my America-First, pro-Trump message is heard by EVERY voter possible.

To keep up with the Democrats seeking to hurt my chances, I **_NEED_** to rely on grassroots supporters to fund my campaign.

If we want to have a shot at regaining a Republican majority this midterm, and so the Republican agenda can be advanced even with Joe Biden in office, **_I need you to step up and_**[**support**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=faf0cfc46e&e=645b3b1338)** _my campaign today._**

[**Are you willing to join me as I fight for Conservatives nationwide by donating today to help fund our next round of TV ads?**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=6f061aa6ff&e=645b3b1338)

**I am being attacked by the witch hunt Jan. 6 committee, slammed by the Leftist-owned mainstream media, and targeted THIS election.**

**For our message of truth and Conservatism to win, we need ALL HANDS ON DECK**.

[**Stand with me by chipping in to my reelection campaign today. >> **](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=03039e449b&e=645b3b1338)
[**_< < DONATE $250 >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=dda9865ee3&e=645b3b1338)

[**_< < DONATE $150 >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=35e5077c80&e=645b3b1338)

[**_< < DONATE $100 >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0242a1ec62&e=645b3b1338)

[**_< < DONATE $50 >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1c7d1c7bed&e=645b3b1338)

[**_< < DONATE $25 >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=92de31ffdd&e=645b3b1338)
Thank you in advance for your support.

Respectfully,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ac6613c0b9&e=645b3b1338) Paul Gosar, D.D.S. Currently Serving Arizona’s 4th CD
Candidate for Arizona’s 9th CD

P.S.: My primary is August 2nd! I need grassroots Conservatives across our country to support me and my America First agenda TODAY so we can win big in August! Help me push back on the Leftist billionaires that are seeking to silence my voice of truth in Washington by [**donating**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b6b4d4055d&e=645b3b1338) to my campaign today. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AOC: When they tell you to "vote harder"...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, when the
Democratic Party tells folks to vote, it's missing a big part of the
story. AOC is on point here:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/111664?refcode=em20220717-24288&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=24288%2E1203867%2Ee8rW3K ]Tweet from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez that reads: FYI: When they tell you
to “vote harder” that should also apply to primary elections, too. The
party needs to change and that’s not going to happen on its own.

We can’t just vote our way out of a broken status quo in November. Because
solving the crises of our day will require organizing, fighting, and
electing BETTER Democrats — not just the same old Democrats.

Nancy Pelosi supported anti-choice Democrat Henry Cuellar in a primary
against pro-choice progressive Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros. And in
the face of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade, the Democratic
establishment did nothing but tell us to vote. We can’t keep voting for
corporate-backed incumbents unwilling to fight for our rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/111664?refcode=em20220717-24288&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=24288%2E1203867%2Ee8rW3K ]Peter, we
need your support to elect a new class of leaders, re-elect the Squad, and
transform the Democratic Party. Are you with us? Make a $3
contribution right now to support our work to upend the political status
quo in this country.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/111664?refcode=em20220717-24288&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=24288%2E1203867%2Ee8rW3K ]Contribute $3

It wasn’t just Jessica’s race against Cuellar that showed which side the
Democratic establishment is really on. Pelosi and Pres. Biden endorsed
corporate Democrat Danny Davis against Justice Democrat Kina Collins, a
young gun violence prevention organizer from Chicago.

How can the Democratic establishment expect us to fight for a party that
tries to stop young progressive women of color from representing the
people and not corporate donors in Congress?

Corporate Democrats have thrown millions against us, they've thrown
high-powered endorsements against us...they’ll do whatever they can to stop
us — even if that means using resources to stop progressive change instead
of focusing those critical resources to stop Republicans from taking the
majority in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/111664?refcode=em20220717-24288&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=24288%2E1203867%2Ee8rW3K ]If we want to win more primary challenges and protect the Squad while
we’re up against millions in corporate Super PAC spending and endorsements
from corporate Democrats like Nancy Pelosi, we need our grassroots
supporters to step up. Can you donate $3 today to help us
take on the political establishment and elect progressive fighters to
Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/111664?refcode=em20220717-24288&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=24288%2E1203867%2Ee8rW3K ]Contribute

We’ve seen what can happen when we get outspent by corporate Super PACs
with access to unlimited funds. Now, we need to make sure we’re prepared
to protect the Squad in their primaries and build up our fundraising for
the future so we can continue building the Squad.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=24288%2E1203867%2Ee8rW3K ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=24288%2E1203867%2Ee8rW3K ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220717-24288-footer&t=1028&refcode2=24288_1203867_e8rW3K&akid=24288%2E1203867%2Ee8rW3K

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=24288%2E1203867%2Ee8rW3K

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Carl Marlinga
subject: I need you in my corner
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLINGA FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | Hi Peter, Carl here. There are just over two weeks left in this primary race, and it is sure to be a close race. I need your help to push our campaign over the finish line and closer to the Democratic nomination. subject: Let’s kick Chevron’s politicians out

body:
Before it’s too late| | | Hi there, [**Help me get Chevron's politicians out of Congress — donate now! My primary is only 16 days away.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47966568/356388987/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjcwOTkwZi00MjA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XVg-08PVL_BI7uMtoaETlB80aNBYPh-OuIknkm0E9h4=) The incumbent in my race is a Chevron-funded politician who opposes the Green New Deal. Even though Washington’s 6th District has hundreds of miles of coastline — communities that could be underwater if we continue with business as usual. Even though over 1,000 people died during last summer’s heatwave in the Pacific Northwest. Even though his constituents have been asking him for years to support the Green New Deal. If we don’t end the fossil fuel industry and rapidly transition to 100% renewable energy, all other issues will become moot. It is inexcusable to take money from Chevron and other fossil fuel corporations when the climate crisis threatens human civilization. That’s why I’m proud to have taken the No Fossil Fuel Money pledge. I’m the only candidate in my race who has. The clock is ticking and we don’t have time to waste with corporate-owned politicians who don’t take the climate crisis seriously. Incrementalism has failed. It’s time for system change. clean_body: Before it’s too late| | | Hi there, = The incumbent in my race is a Chevron-funded politician who opposes the Green New Deal. Even though Washington’s 6th District has hundreds of miles of coastline — communities that could be underwater if we continue with business as usual. Even though over 1,000 people died during last summer’s heatwave in the Pacific Northwest. Even though his constituents have been asking him for years to support the Green New Deal. If we don’t end the fossil fuel industry and rapidly transition to 100% renewable energy, all other issues will become moot. It is inexcusable to take money from Chevron and other fossil fuel corporations when the climate crisis threatens human civilization. That’s why I’m proud to have taken the No Fossil Fuel Money pledge. I’m the only candidate in my race who has. The clock is ticking and we don’t have time to waste with corporate-owned politicians who don’t take the climate crisis seriously. Incrementalism has failed. It’s time for system change. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ⭐= ⭐= ⭐= Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for Washington PO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Friends —

I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that
doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine, I can
assure you it’s a gift.

And while I know our campaign sends a lot of emails your way, I want to
take a few of these minutes to tell you about my decision to run for
Senate in the first place — and why your support today is so important to
our success.

The truth is: When Gabby and I first started talking about running, we
weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in
the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first,
who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who
would prioritize building bridges between the two parties — not burning
them down.

We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re
talking about such a big campaign, we realized we’d need support from a
lot of people we hadn’t met yet. Especially since I was making the
decision to reject corporate PAC money.

You know the rest. We won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest
grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen.

But now we have a new mission: Re-election.

And we’ve got our work cut out for us. The stakes were high before, but
after last month it’s more critical than ever that we win this race.
Because the Senate is now the final defense against a national abortion
ban in the United States.

And in Arizona, the candidate that Trump just endorsed against me wants to
go even further than the Supreme Court. He’s called for a national ban on
abortion.

I know times are tough, but we can’t give in now. We need to make sure a
ban like that never happens. Which is why I have to ask:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17165?t=1007&amount=25&akid=4606%2E3611125%2EniLj8Q ]Can you please add a contribution to our campaign before midnight? The
amount you give isn’t as important as the number of donations we receive.
Because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17165?t=1008&amount=25&akid=4606%2E3611125%2EniLj8Q ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17165?t=1009&amount=50&akid=4606%2E3611125%2EniLj8Q ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17165?t=1012&amount=250&akid=4606%2E3611125%2EniLj8Q ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17165?t=1013&amount=30&akid=4606%2E3611125%2EniLj8Q ]Other Amount

Thank you again. For everything you do.

Mark Kelly

Hi Team, it’s Governor Gretchen Whitmer. Though I’ll always root against Ohio teams during football season, I’m putting aside sports today to reach out to you about the competitive races both Nan Whaley and I are running for governor in our states.
With the Supreme Court overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and draconian anti-choice bills being pushed around the country, the clock on reproductive rights is turning back **decades.**
That’s why we need strong Governors who will stand up for abortion rights, no matter what.
**[Can you help me continue to lead the fight for abortion rights in Michigan – with a donation of $5 or whatever you can manage today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47964667/356355787/-2084124783?refcode=nw_em_220717_1_t2_a&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTkyNDYzMC0yNDA2LWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_pfDIcZEiMN-dL4d534QB0GcY6HJe-mQVbyA6Es_kN4=)**

In other words, the stakes couldn’t be higher. A future in which we lose the right to a safe and legal abortion is here. And we need strong leaders to help us fight back.
**That’s why I filed a lawsuit and asked the Michigan Supreme Court to ensure Michigan’s arcane abortion ban _never_ goes into effect.**
And while leaders like me and Nan are standing strong to protect reproductive rights, anti-choice radicals and their special interest backers are prepared to pour millions of dollars into attack ads.

How Georgia votes WILL DETERMINE who controls the Senate majority, but our opponent is outraising us by MILLIONS. Thanks to his misleading attack ads against us - he has pulled slightly ahead in the polls. We can STOP our Democrat opponent and his Far-Left agenda from further crippling our country, but we can't do it without you, Peter. subject: Teamwork makes the dream work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
When I was commissioned into the Marine Corps more than ten years ago, it was for a multitude of reasons. I was inspired to take action, protect our country, and answer a call for public service. I believed America was worth protecting, and I still do. These are the same motivations that have driven me to run for Congress today. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c41101009ead427c8e8a9d9ad7d76275&_e=hBEctJjveMnrQX9yxGSrVeLy1482_a-MV2pSc4Ulj2EwXCE0q37i9nMQBTfGfLPA4l39E_B0JVhfqzeIkoWboi3v8qxaFpDkbgm9y1SW5nzTNrMm3OAEMQsKL8KxqB7Jjyvjk4fPYU8yMJq8ZFObJ585fui7vZzt87ruQrpLQsI9hiPr9mb-vJI-5jvuB90Wav4yu37qoZKdBIAGJhxkZc0VjdMk4HOrQl4lQP1WvqMQb_FLnRCkE8_TSshtA0QjkKCYEmqLDXXJ9QwbWX4BAXTDpHxx_qMz9H6tlRXmvU0ChziFsV3H3k5zwQGo-nQm77oUhb1ebfqyH660v4bY5xHkhl1FtRxh32hKqtyT2wcFYEbCrgFmQQmA_oJWTLp_pCPslz9wNh1Xpy86g3EXoeADAVY90LDdUB926ImpaflyFqX8uwF03iPasUDUhHqjQoR3vrk33jJKKhjqj8iQtvJ_PHFmlYQWsH9HjJUVMxs%3D)

---
Peter,

When I was commissioned into the Marine Corps more than ten years ago, it was for a multitude of reasons. I was inspired to take action, protect our country, and answer a call for public service. I believed America was worth protecting, _and I still do_.

[**These are the same motivations that have driven me to run for Congress today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c41101009ead427c8e8a9d9ad7d76275&_e=hBEctJjveMnrQX9yxGSrVeLy1482_a-MV2pSc4Ulj2EwXCE0q37i9nMQBTfGfLPA4l39E_B0JVhfqzeIkoWboi3v8qxaFpDkbgm9y1SW5nzTNrMm3OAEMQsKL8KxqB7Jjyvjk4fPYU8yMJq8ZFObJ585fui7vZzt87ruQrpLQsI9hiPr9mb-vJI-5jvuB90Wav4yu37qoZKdBIAGJhxkZc0VjdMk4HOrQl4lQP1WvqMQb_FLnRCkE8_TSshtA0QjkKCYEmqLDXXJ9QwbWX4BAcelO2LOLuBIztYSzEbioLGhk_OtLG90mQw6p8qW6azn2XoVQNT9i2Z2Q_TCfuUpYnWTPMVU1fHrKy8oZPDB_Q-xRBU2btPnqDiVLKmXIVjGWgFLql9rgDqZ9yNmO3lAXVwshpwEzQTpXJ8pxK0aubWKXxg3QnCA3jlLUyF9riNw2BBQq9xoUBSVNxMoPR5n-lt1Kuv3wGC1bF77GWO1L1g%3D)

As Americans, we _deserve_ a new generation of leaders representing us in Congress. Leaders who understand the problems families all over the country are experiencing. Leaders who will fight for a strong economy, good paying jobs, affordable and high-quality healthcare, security and safety, education for our kids, and a better life for all Americans.

Many leaders in Congress right now have sold out our kid’s futures and put their own needs before the needs of constituents.

**The Marines taught me that teamwork is essential to the success of a mission, and a service-first mindset is fundamental.** Far too many folks in Washington are too busy playing partisan politics, instead of putting their heads down and doing the work of the people.

[**I promise you, as your next Representative in Washington, that I will commit to serving you and your family – because that’s what it’s all about right?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c41101009ead427c8e8a9d9ad7d76275&_e=hBEctJjveMnrQX9yxGSrVeLy1482_a-MV2pSc4Ulj2EwXCE0q37i9nMQBTfGfLPA4l39E_B0JVhfqzeIkoWboi3v8qxaFpDkbgm9y1SW5nzTNrMm3OAEMQsKL8KxqB7Jjyvjk4fPYU8yMJq8ZFObJ585fui7vZzt87ruQrpLQsI9hiPr9mb-vJI-5jvuB90Wav4yu37qoZKdBIAGJhxkZc0VjdMk4HOrQl4lQP1WvqMQb_FLnRCkE8_TSshtA0QjkKCYEmqLDXXJ9QwbWX4BAXqtWrr3pwEuu0X3ipfcj345WRdzAxnVQDGiqcW9xa1UJdhq0zZ_KAR3BfB9j-em7W2lkSOjkvd00d0gLiWqrFToABvtuP3PsLOpgjwUAbCPD4xhv42mL9ttJjHxwufdPVLDVpWTuq1oDDU-CTjS5NPNNRm9T7pCoKD7z3R5w_3oXO0t6AZ43sOlaCG2T2AFVoMduRpjghXrsuA6bqJllIA%3D)

[**Will you support me today, so that I can make good on that promise, and be the change that Congress so desperately needs?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c41101009ead427c8e8a9d9ad7d76275&_e=hBEctJjveMnrQX9yxGSrVeLy1482_a-MV2pSc4Ulj2EwXCE0q37i9nMQBTfGfLPA4l39E_B0JVhfqzeIkoWboi3v8qxaFpDkbgm9y1SW5nzTNrMm3OAEMQsKL8KxqB7Jjyvjk4fPYU8yMJq8ZFObJ585fui7vZzt87ruQrpLQsI9hiPr9mb-vJI-5jvuB90Wav4yu37qoZKdBIAGJhxkZc0VjdMk4HOrQl4lQP1WvqMQb_FLnRCkE8_TSshtA0QjkKCYEmqLDXXJ9QwbWX4BASlaAQSr-GNGYujESdwyu7pG6Q4thc8bFqRtsYhGY8TsfS8qIz9R6EjVJA0qXbLjRGZetETZwEFJzmGavAHrzzZ0ZemqnyPhyyzogLwkvNtY28kEBlPdwEpo9TtpDjJEGdFULcL7ca3UoFsMndJMCD8xtNnq4g51x_98LtB-jxg0SOsKXRt2VUXsC7gkVVVejiD1fA2157beWvPXMC2OY0k%3D)

[**SEND IN THE MARINE » **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c41101009ead427c8e8a9d9ad7d76275&_e=hBEctJjveMnrQX9yxGSrVeLy1482_a-MV2pSc4Ulj2EwXCE0q37i9nMQBTfGfLPA4l39E_B0JVhfqzeIkoWboi3v8qxaFpDkbgm9y1SW5nzTNrMm3OAEMQsKL8KxqB7Jjyvjk4fPYU8yMJq8ZFObJ585fui7vZzt87ruQrpLQsI9hiPr9mb-vJI-5jvuB90Wav4yu37qoZKdBIAGJhxkZc0VjdMk4HOrQl4lQP1WvqMQb_FLnRCkE8_TSshtA0QjkKCYEmqLDXXJ9QwbWX4BAdJ8hh8daQ5XrACSGKSWL9IVCFJ48aNY2JQYonv7CzUskkJC4u7RwhlH6DZXuH-Qd77V5knZV56sLpxxNMS053_BOCsaLHjmcQi2LVTFYR25Nej_snkaSkdsJQy_Onfr23QkWmtIq-QFv6usj6TKdyLvRhW_hdFVMQfqfdIjVLLqiwzWfI-qEQkmZw1qSTAtQEZdbSHVe_PKBiSQnzn8HTc%3D)
When I first ran for Congress in 2020, _no one_ thought I had a shot.

I was facing a well-funded Democrat who took checks from the likes of Nancy Pelosi, corporate PACs, and special interest donors. _**But sitting around doing nothing went against every instinct in my body.**_ With zero resources or experience, I narrowly lost to my opponent, coming within just two points.

After a tough race and an even tougher loss, I picked myself up and decided to try again. **The Marines taught me to jump in, resolve problems, take action, and to have the courage to try.**

If I’ve learned anything in my 34 years on this earth, it’s that failure often teaches us more than success. So, I’m failing forward. I’m giving this race all that I’ve got. clean_body: When I was commissioned into the Marine Corps more than ten years ago, it was for a multitude of reasons. I was inspired to take action, protect our country, and answer a call for public service. I believed America was worth protecting, and I still do. These are the same motivations that have driven me to run for Congress today. | Peter, When I was commissioned into the Marine Corps more than ten years ago, it was for a multitude of reasons. I was inspired to take action, protect our country, and answer a call for public service. I believed America was worth protecting, and I still do. As Americans, we deserve a new generation of leaders representing us in Congress. Leaders who understand the problems families all over the country are experiencing. Leaders who will fight for a strong economy, good paying jobs, affordable and high-quality healthcare, security and safety, education for our kids, and a better life for all Americans. Many leaders in Congress right now have sold out our kid’s futures and put their own needs before the needs of constituents. The Marines taught me that teamwork is essential to the success of a mission, and a service-first mindset is fundamental. Far too many folks in Washington are too busy playing partisan politics, instead of putting their heads down and doing the work of the people. When I first ran for Congress in 2020, no one thought I had a shot. I was facing a well-funded Democrat who took checks from the likes of Nancy Pelosi, corporate PACs, and special interest donors. But sitting around doing nothing went against every instinct in my body. With zero resources or experience, I narrowly lost to my opponent, coming within just two points. After a tough race and an even tougher loss, I picked myself up and decided to try again. The Marines taught me to jump in, resolve problems, take action, and to have the courage to try. If I’ve learned anything in my 34 years on this earth, it’s that failure often teaches us more than success. So, I’m failing forward. I’m giving this race all that I’ve got. I can guarantee you this – I will never give up on you. I will never stop fighting for what is right (not just what party-leadership says so). I will never sell out for my own personal interests. And I will never stop defending this country that we both love. If that is worth something to you, In service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. Marine. P.S. – Our race is tough, our resources are low, and recent polling is shifting in favor of my opponent. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelly=20Schulz?=
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9493d7559723/announcing-watermen-for-kelly-11819003?e=64ac72257a)
---
| | [ ](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=dcab4f7e05&e=64ac72257a)
---
| |
# Dear Peter,
The polls open in THIRTY-SIX HOURS.

_That's right. Maryland's Primary is this **Tuesday, July 19th, **and I need your help. _

**Turnout in this election is critical.**

The media has turned this race into a proxy war between Larry Hogan and Donald Trump.

The Democratic Governors Association is meddling in the Republican primary. They are spending over $2mil to fuel the fire and prop-up my opponent, Dan Cox.

I'm not one for name-calling and I value my integrity. But I can tell you with a clear conscience that Dan has absolutely no business running for governor.

Dan speaks at QAnon conferences. He tells lies and touts conspiracy theories in a way I have never seen before. He even Tweeted "Mike Pence is a Traitor".

The national Democrats would love nothing more than a Cox victory on Tuesday. They know he is unelectable and whoever the Democratic nominee is will sail to victory in November. Not only will he lose, he will be a drag on the entire Republican ticket, and we stand the chance of losing county executive and legislative races. The Republican Party in Maryland would be irrelevant for a decade or more.

_You and I know what will happen if we go back to one-party rule in Maryland. _

**Martin O'Malley, our last Democratic governor, raised your taxes over FORTY TIMES in eight years. **

By contrast, under Governor Hogan, _**there have been ZERO tax increases since he took office**_.

Why? Because he destroyed the ability for the liberals in the legislature to rubber-stamp tax increases.

Inflation and gas prices have reached record highs. It is CRITICAL we have a commonsense conservative as governor in Maryland to check the legislature and look out for the Maryland taxpayer.

I am running for governor to stand up for every hardworking Marylander who is struggling to make ends meet. I am running to represent every parent who demands their child get a world-class education to create a brighter future for their kids. I am fighting for the safety of our communities and the integrity of the officers that protect our families. And I am fighting to create opportunity in our great state, and to make Maryland more affordable so that you can raise a family, start a business and retire right here in Maryland.

**I am fighting for YOU. **

Serving as your governor will be the greatest honor of my life.

_**I am asking for your vote. And I am asking you to remind your friends and neighbors that the primary is this Tuesday, July 19th. **_

Thank you,

---
|
---
| **Kelly Schulz**
Candidate for Governor

|
---
|
---

name: Dr. Kermit Jones
subject: re: my shoes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress

I’ve been getting a lot of questions lately about why I wear combat boots every day. I’ve been getting a lot of questions lately about why I wear combat boots every day. Rather than loafers or tennis shoes as you’ll typically see candidates in, **I wear my combat boots as a reminder of where I come from, and what we’re fighting for.** I joined the military after 9/11, and served in Iraq as a Navy flight surgeon. Upon returning home, I continued to provide medical care for my fellow veterans at my hospital and volunteering at local free clinics. I met servicemember after servicemember who was struggling to find a job, get housing, or access care for the health issues their military service caused. **I became increasingly upset that our elected officials were paying lip service to us on the holidays, while continuing to ignore our struggling veteran’s needs.** And then the January 6 attack on the Capitol happened. We witnessed a direct attempt by domestic terrorists to undermine our democracy — the democracy my fellow veterans fought for — while elected “leaders” egged them on. Me and the friends I served with in Iraq were disgusted. _I decided to run for Congress, and now I wear these combat boots to remind me where I come from, and what we’re fighting for – a country that cares deeply about protecting our neighbors, our environment, and our democracy._ Sincerely, Dr. Kermit | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

subject: Vote Shawnna Bolick for Secretary of State
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
Getting to Work for Arizona

Good afternoon Freedom Fighters,

Arizonans have lost confidence in the integrity of our elections. Fifty-one percent of voters believe cheating affected the outcome of the 2020 election. Guess what? It’s happening again. Pinal County just sent (https://azfreenews.com/2022/07/incorrect-ballots-sent-to-pinal-county-voters-weeks-after-officials-ignored-ag-candidates-concerns/?mc_cid=c1a65b46bc&mc_eid=UNIQID) 65,000 incomplete ballots to voters. This astonishing blunder is completely unacceptable—no wonder Arizonans feel like their vote no longer counts.

Making matters worse, under Katie Hobbs’ failed leadership the Secretary of State’s office has grown far too political. She regularly uses the office as her own partisan platform, often at the expense of doing the job she was elected to do. Even more worrisome, she wants Arizona to elect her Governor. No thank you.

The Secretary of State’s job is simple: oversee elections, work with businesses, and administer the affairs of the state. The Secretary of State also plays an important role as next in line to govern the state. I’ve grown tired of watching Arizonans suffer while elected officials abuse their roles and erode the trust we have placed in one of our state’s highest offices.
Support a Workhorse, Not a Show Horse (https://secure.winred.com/vote-bolick/donate?mc_cid=c1a65b46bc&mc_eid=UNIQID)
processes back in 2019. I listened to voters’ experiences and questioned local and federal elections officials. Slowly, I began uncovering the significant underlying problems laid bare by the 2018 and 2020 elections. I soon realized that as a state representative I couldn’t address all of these problems at their root. That’s why we must elect a leader to Arizona’s highest elections office who will check her politics—but not her principles—at the door, while working hard to listen to voters, follow the evidence, find solutions, and restore confidence and integrity into our elections.

I understand what the job demands, and I have proven I can handle it. I am more interested in doing the job right than taking credit. I’ve built a solid, verifiable conservative legislative track record, but I promise to set partisan politics aside. I will stand firm. I will not cower to bullying or intimidation and as promised, I will remain 100% committed to election integrity for all Arizonans. I will ensure that we clean up our messy voter rolls and count every legally cast vote.

Now that early voting has started, please cast your vote for Shawnna Bolick for Secretary of State.
Thank you for your continued support,
Shawnna Bolick
Send a True Conservative Leader to the Secretary of State Office (https://secure.winred.com/vote-bolick/donate?mc_cid=c1a65b46bc&mc_eid=UNIQID)
VOTING INFORMATION

If you received an early ballot, hand it in at any polling location on Election Day. Find a location here (http://url141.azpolicy.org/ls/click?upn=DyJOC-2B-2Bt2AJTtMMMztS3OTI6MDEmuN7ALSOxAqLNF2Q20iN2kWQszDHmOtsrKbjxnGFFubOPPhqYL28PMe6GQ-2BtLUgsC0xwSdJNCG3TDWEs-3DRska_yw-2BFsruRZRvGaTjlc1SIG4VKkFEEBIvmY4meOxrv4AihVYUVzmVkiE7h-2FAJamFr27ONpM6owB1O2KO6JFwjpe1-2BaZviMyE2At0I7rj7jbkTNXReuRk0RO2ZpTpkHiTgW9V9qrQG7Kw4A-2B1bapDSlpSVcigNQIjbg-2FZIKjsDHz046gwkQObiL06pycCjIVtzRmfBKvUGvkqk5b0UPp38gN5x3jVr0rThKYnwiDoxGzFyJ77X998CnUX7GndT6IgQWkQd9asyyOHlGtOqh3ZgtKu3V-2FFsS7yP4PHeIBjnRJm5xz-2F20pSe6P1xh7YMwHF-2BJ3uAGEOhA6J4ouctXfET1uw-3D-3D&mc_cid=c1a65b46bc&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

Track your ballot here (http://url141.azpolicy.org/ls/click?upn=DyJOC-2B-2Bt2AJTtMMMztS3OUdF4HVShO-2BhgXHHLZ56SZwtJTzi4EKJs10-2BbLBEHQAPMa-2BNjP2SXb8XrUWOCxSb4g-3D-3DKeRu_yw-2BFsruRZRvGaTjlc1SIG4VKkFEEBIvmY4meOxrv4AihVYUVzmVkiE7h-2FAJamFr27ONpM6owB1O2KO6JFwjpe1-2BaZviMyE2At0I7rj7jbkTNXReuRk0RO2ZpTpkHiTgW9V9qrQG7Kw4A-2B1bapDSlpSVcigNQIjbg-2FZIKjsDHz05EJa3JN-2BUA-2FIDui4JlqblxBML1UMyb-2FBhvRS4PuyiXmHxrOSF0h-2BgpCwaS1gsL1D1SANGifIHAjV05uo2OJtmjL9vmohzRdGbvXS0KDgmTRwP234Qh949q4bpusljWeV6L4sOA0eYNFeskY-2FmQAK0rnLb7CXfn60LrbJzkdIXamA-3D-3D&mc_cid=c1a65b46bc&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

Important upcoming dates:
Primary date — August 2
Early voting — July 6 to July 26
Poll hours — 6 a.m. to 7 p.m.
Absentee/mail-in deadline — July 26

Visit Arizona.Vote (http://url141.azpolicy.org/ls/click?upn=DyJOC-2B-2Bt2AJTtMMMztS3ORKivKOR-2BzCh-2FQJ6WmWb2ICPh2XQnuN17lC6XW6m0VHPjEpz_yw-2BFsruRZRvGaTjlc1SIG4VKkFEEBIvmY4meOxrv4AihVYUVzmVkiE7h-2FAJamFr27ONpM6owB1O2KO6JFwjpe1-2BaZviMyE2At0I7rj7jbkTNXReuRk0RO2ZpTpkHiTgW9V9qrQG7Kw4A-2B1bapDSlpSVcigNQIjbg-2FZIKjsDHz07IxV2oUUhL6eyy5lgqxQb3mq6yflDvj-2FXuqEJBk9D0x4FtGF-2B3dYN7Xo2A7hPY-2FVuNHqHFl0byGGwKHmd7bwq6cpb5itzAfVpMEF8-2BzDmaFmqegcqrnY-2FAKIgUCT1y3tvtepTJeUsQnF5JgJzjhq7G-2BTDl5aEQn4XRctmQXsnKxA-3D-3D&mc_cid=c1a65b46bc&mc_eid=UNIQID) for more information.

Please join us at one of our upcoming events:

Friday, July 19^th
Please join me and other statewide candidates for a Candidate Meet and Greet in Phoenix. For address please RSVP to Ben at info@bolickforarizona.com (mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com) .

Friday, July 21st
Please join me and other statewide candidates for a Candidate Meet and Greet in Phoenix. For address please RSVP to Sue Ritter at SRITTER@DSAWEB.COM (mailto:SRITTER@DSAWEB.COM) .

name: Grace
subject: I am honestly worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate
body:
|
---
Hello there,

My name is Grace, and I was born and raised in Pennsylvania. Over the past couple of years, the Commonwealth has gone downhill.

I am worried about my children going to school every day and having CRT pushed on them, crime is out of control, and I can barely afford to put food on the table and gas in my car.

I met Dr. Oz while he was on the campaign trail, and he told me he will do everything he can to fix the problems at hand but that he needs support because John Fetterman is spreading LIES about him. Dear Friend,

The polls open in THIRTY-SIX HOURS.

That's right. Maryland's Primary is this **Tuesday, July 19th, **and I need your help.

**Turnout in this election is critical.**

The media has turned this race into a proxy war between Larry Hogan and Donald Trump.

The Democratic Governors Association is meddling in the Republican primary. They are spending over $2mil to fuel the fire and prop-up my opponent, Dan Cox.

I'm not one for name-calling and I value my integrity. But I can tell you with a clear conscience that Dan has absolutely no business running for governor.

Dan speaks at QAnon conferences. He tells lies and touts conspiracy theories in a way I have never seen before. He even Tweeted "Mike Pence is a Traitor".

The national Democrats would love nothing more than a Cox victory on Tuesday. They know he is unelectable and whoever the Democratic nominee is will sail to victory in November. Not only will he lose, he will be a drag on the entire Republican ticket, and we stand the chance of losing county executive and legislative races. The Republican Party in Maryland would be irrelevant for a decade or more.

You and I know what will happen if we go back to one-party rule in Maryland.

**Martin O'Malley, our last Democratic governor, raised your taxes over FORTY TIMES in eight years.**

By contrast, under Governor Hogan, **there have been ZERO tax increases since he took office**.

Why? Because he destroyed the ability for the liberals in the legislature to rubber-stamp tax increases.

Inflation and gas prices have reached record highs. It is CRITICAL we have a commonsense conservative as governor in Maryland to check the legislature and look out for the Maryland taxpayer.

I am running for governor to stand up for every hardworking Marylander who is struggling to make ends meet. I am running to represent every parent who demands their child get a world-class education to create a brighter future for their kids. I am fighting for the safety of our communities and the integrity of the officers that protect our families. And I am fighting to create opportunity in our great state, and to make Maryland more affordable so that you can raise a family, start a business and retire right here in Maryland.

**I am fighting for YOU. **

Serving as your governor will be the greatest honor of my life.

**I am asking for your vote. And I am asking you to remind your friends and neighbors that the primary is this Tuesday, July 19th. **

Thank you,

---
---
---
Kelly Schulz Candidate for Governor

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, The polls open in THIRTY-SIX HOURS. That's right. Maryland's Primary is this Tuesday, July 19th, and I need your help. Turnout in this election is critical. The media has turned this race into a proxy war between Larry Hogan and Donald Trump. The Democratic Governors Association is meddling in the Republican primary. They are spending over $2mil to fuel the fire and prop-up my opponent, Dan Cox. I'm not one for name-calling and I value my integrity. But I can tell you with a clear conscience that Dan has absolutely no business running for governor. Dan speaks at QAnon conferences. He tells lies and touts conspiracy theories in a way I have never seen before. He even Tweeted "Mike Pence is a Traitor". The national Democrats would love nothing more than a Cox victory on Tuesday. They know he is unelectable and whoever the Democratic nominee is will sail to victory in November. Not only will he lose, he will be a drag on the entire Republican ticket, and we stand the chance of losing county executive and legislative races. The Republican Party in Maryland would be irrelevant for a decade or more. You and I know what will happen if we go back to one-party rule in Maryland. Martin O'Malley, our last Democratic governor, raised your taxes over FORTY TIMES in eight years. By contrast, under Governor Hogan, there have been ZERO tax increases since he took office. Why? Because he destroyed the ability for the liberals in the legislature to rubber-stamp tax increases. Inflation and gas prices have reached record highs. It is CRITICAL we have a commonsense conservative as governor in Maryland to check the legislature and look out for the Maryland taxpayer. I am running for governor to stand up for every hardworking Marylander who is struggling to make ends meet. I am running to represent every parent who demands their child get a world-class education to create a brighter future for their kids. I am fighting for the safety of our communities and the integrity of the officers that protect our families. And I am fighting to create opportunity in our great state, and to make Maryland more affordable so that you can raise a family, start a business and retire right here in Maryland. I am fighting for YOU. Serving as your governor will be the greatest honor of my life. I am asking for your vote. And I am asking you to remind your friends and neighbors that the primary is this Tuesday, July 19th. Thank you, Kelly Schulz Candidate for Governor | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

name: Abrams for Georgia
subject: For the cost of your morning cup of coffee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

You’ve probably heard by now that Brian Kemp just launched at least $1
million worth of attack ads with lies about Stacey’s plans — and Politico
is reporting that he’s stepping up his outreach to right-wing
billionaires. This is just the beginning — the attacks are only going to
get worse from here.

Countering $1 million may sound overwhelming, but here’s the good news:
for the price of a cup of coffee — just $5 — you can make a real
difference in our work to push back and correct the record.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220717_B3_Coffee_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1037%2E1862389%2EaoYqkT ]As a grassroots team, we rely on
supporters like you
to give us the resources we need to push back against Kemp’s lies. Can you
make your first $5
investment to elect Stacey Abrams now?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220717_B3_Coffee_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=1037%2E1862389%2EaoYqkT ]DONATE

To put this into perspective,
Derek: if less than half the
people reading this email chipped in $5 or more right now, that would
immediately balance out Brian Kemp’s $1 million.

We have the power of a grassroots team on our side. Every dollar that we
raise goes directly to campaigning for Stacey’s vision of One Georgia,
where opportunity, safety and success are not determined by zip code,
background or access to power.

That means pushing back against Kemp’s relentless lies.
That means training volunteers to organize their communities.
That means reaching out to voters most campaigns ignore.
That means overcoming rampant Republican attempts to suppress the vote.
And more.

As you can imagine, none of this is inexpensive or easy. While Kemp is
relying on right-wing billionaires to fund his campaign, we rely on
grassroots
supporters like you
to power us to victory.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220717_B3_Coffee_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=1037%2E1862389%2EaoYqkT ]All it takes is $5 or whatever you can afford right now.
Please, Derek,
make your first
contribution to stand up to Brian Kemp’s lies now.

Thanks,

Abrams for Georgia

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=1037%2E1862389%2EaoYqkT ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1037%2E1862389%2EaoYqkT
